title: Paella Valenciana
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large paellera.
Step 2: Add chicken and deer pieces, and fry until they are golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add chopped red peppers and garlic, and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 4: Add rice and stir to toast it slightly.
Step 5: Add water or chicken broth until the rice is covered, season with salt and pepper to taste, and let cook at medium-high heat.
Step 6: Once the rice is almost done, add beaten eggs and stir to set.
Step 7: Let the paella rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Lentil Stew with Chorizo
steps: Step 1: Cook the lentils until they are tender.
Step 2: Sear the chorizo in a pan until it is golden brown.
Step 3: Add the cooked lentils to the pan with the chorizo and mix well.
Step 4: Cook everything together for a few minutes more to allow the flavors to meld.

title: Pasta with Tomato and Cheese
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, make a homemade tomato sauce or use a prepared tomato sauce.
Once the pasta is cooked and drained, combine it with the tomato sauce in a large pot.
Add shredded cheese to the pasta and tomato sauce mixture, stirring until the cheese melts completely.

title: Grilled Chicken with Lemon and Herbs
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet.
Brush the chicken with lemon juice and water.
Add fresh herbs around the chicken.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked.

title: Hake in Green Sauce
steps: Season the hake with salt and pepper.
Dredge the hake in flour and fry in hot oil until golden brown.
Remove the hake from heat and reserve.
In the same oil, sauté the garlic until golden.
Add white wine and reduce to half.
Add parsley chopped and cook for a few minutes more.
Combine fried hake with green sauce and serve.

title: Madrid Stew Complete
steps: Place beef bones in a pot with water for 1 hour.
Add lamb and pork leg to the pot and cook for another 2 hours.
Add potatoes, greens, and beans to the pot and cook for 30 minutes.
In a separate pan, fry bacon until crispy.
Serve stew in individual plates with a small amount of rice on each. Top with fried bacon.

title: Potato Omelette with Onion
steps: Cook the potatoes and onion until they are soft.
Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
Add the cooked potatoes and onion to the beaten eggs and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a hot skillet with oil and cook until it is golden brown on both sides.

title: Meatballs in Spanish-Style Sauce
steps: Step 1: Finely chop the onion and garlic. Mix them with the ground pork, breadcrumbs, egg, and chopped parsley.
Step 2: Form meatballs with the mixture and lightly dust them with flour.
Step 3: Fry the meatballs in a hot pan until they are golden brown on all sides. Remove them and reserve them.
Step 4: In the same pan, sauté the finely chopped onion until it is transparent. Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add red wine to the sauce and let it reduce until the alcohol evaporates.
Step 6: Incorporate the fried meatballs into the sauce, stirring to coat them evenly. Let them cook for a few more minutes.
Step 7: Serve hot.

detailedIngredients.name: flour
detailedIngredients.quantity: to dust the meatballs, to taste

title: Pork Loin Roasted with Apple
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Season the pork loin with salt and pepper.
Peel and cut the apples into small pieces.
Finely chop the garlic cloves and mix with the chopped parsley.
Place the pork loin on a baking sheet, surround the pork loin with apple pieces.
Sprinkle the garlic-parsley mixture over the pork loin and apples.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the pork is cooked.

title: Homemade Burger Complete
steps: Cook the beef until it is medium-rare or to your preference.
Toast the hamburger bun in a pan with a little butter.
Place the cooked beef on top of the toasted bun and add cheese so that it melts.
Add lettuce, tomato, and onion slices on top of the beef and cheese.

title: Spaghetti with Carbonara (with Egg)
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a bowl, mix eggs and parmesan cheese until obtaining a homogeneous mixture.
In a pan, fry the bacon until crispy. Add cooked spaghetti and egg-cheddar mixture. Mix well.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Grilled Salmon with Dill
steps: Step 1: Season the salmon with dill and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add the salmon to the pan and cook for 4-5 minutes per side or until cooked through.

title: Chicken Curry with Coconut Milk
steps: Heat the oil in a pan and sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Add the garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute more.
Add the chicken cut into pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the curry powder and sweet paprika, mix well with the chicken.
Pour in the coconut milk and let cook at medium heat for 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious chicken curry with coconut milk.

title: Beef Stew with Potatoes
steps: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a pot and brown the meat on all sides.
Add chopped onion and whole garlic, cook until they are soft.
Incorporate large potato chunks, thyme, and laurel.
Pour red wine and enough water to cover the meat.
Cook at medium heat for approximately 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Remove the meat and potatoes from the pot, mix flour with a little water and add to the broth.
Let the stew thicken and serve the beef and potatoes in individual plates, accompanied by the broth as a sauce.

title: Pork Ribs in BBQ Sauce
steps: Step 1: Preheat the grill.
Step 2: Add pork ribs to the grill and cook until they are well done.

title: Cod with Pil-Pil Sauce
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod in water for at least 24 hours to remove salt.
Step 2: In a pan, heat olive oil and add minced garlic.
Step 3: Add the cod, broken into pieces, to the pan and cook until tender.
Step 4: Add sweet paprika to taste and mix well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Homemade Margherita Pizza
steps: Prepare the dough: Mix flour, water and yeast until a ball forms.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Stretch the dough over a floured surface.
Add tomato sauce and sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top.
Cook the pizza in a preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius for about 15 minutes.

title: Cuban Rice with Fried Egg
steps: Cook the rice until it is cooked.
Fry the eggs in a pan with oil.
In the same pan, sauté the minced garlic.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook until they are tender.
Serve the rice in a plate, place the fried eggs on top and cover with tomato sauce.

title: Pork Loin with Roquefort Sauce
steps: Salt and pepper the pork loin.
Melt butter in a pan and sear the pork loin pieces at high heat.
Add garlic, minced, and cook until fragrant.
Incorporate red wine and reduce liquid until it thickens.
Add roquefort cheese and stir until it melts and forms a creamy sauce.
Serve the pork loin with the roquefort sauce on top.

title: Chicken Fajitas
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and season with salt and pepper.
In a hot pan, add a little oil and cook the chicken strips until they are golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add the bell peppers and onion cut into large pieces. Cook until they are soft.
Add garlic to the pan with the bell peppers and onion. Cook for an additional minute.
Return the chicken to the pan and mix everything together to combine flavors. Cook for a few more minutes.
Serve the fajitas hot with wheat or corn tortillas.

title: Lasagna of Meat (Bolognese)
steps: Cook the ground meat until it is browned.
Add the bolognese sauce and cook for a few minutes more.
Assemble the lasagna in a baking dish, alternating layers of pasta, meat with sauce, and shredded cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 25 minutes or until the pasta is cooked and the cheese is golden.

title: Tuna Cakes with Tomato
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
Mix the tuna and tomatoes to make a filling.
Fill the cannelloni with the tuna and tomato mixture.
Cover the cannelloni with bechamel sauce.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Chicken in Chili Sauce
steps: Cook the chicken in a pan with oil until browned.
Add diced bell peppers and tomatoes.
Add minced garlic and vinegar.
Let cook until the chicken is tender.

title: Emperor on the grill with garlic and parsley
steps: Step 1: Cut the emperor into medallions.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic cloves.
Step 3: Mix the chopped garlic with fresh parsley chopped.
Step 4: Brush the garlic-parsley mixture onto the emperor medallions.
Step 5: Place the medallions on a hot grill and cook until done.

title: Risotto with Mushrooms and Parmesan
steps: Heat the oil in a large pot and add the chopped onion. Cook until it's soft.
Add the minced garlic and cook for one minute more.
Add the rice and stir to coat with oil. Cook for a few minutes until the rice is translucent.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for a few minutes until they release their liquid.
Start adding the vegetable broth little by little, stirring constantly.
Once the rice has absorbed all the broth, add more broth and continue cooking until the rice is cooked.
Add the grated parmesan and stir well. Let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Rabbit with Garlic
steps: 1. Cut the rabbit into pieces and season them with salt and pepper.
2. In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the rabbit pieces and cook until they are well done on all sides.
4. Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for a few minutes more until it is soft.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Callos in Madrilean Style
steps: Cook the beef callops in water for 30 minutes.
In a saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic with oil until they are golden brown.
Add the cooked beef callops and brown them along with the onion and garlic.
Add the sweet paprika and hot paprika, stirring well to mix with the sofrito.
Add the triturated tomato and white wine. Cook for 1 hour and a half over medium heat.

title: Sepia Grilled with Alioli
steps: Clean the sepia and cut it into strips.
In a hot olive oil pan, cook the sepia pieces until they are cooked.
Grind the egg for making the alioli. Add olive oil slowly while mixing.

title: Beef in Garden Style
steps: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides. Remove the beef from the skillet and reserve.
In the same skillet, add the bell peppers, carrots, garlic, and onion chopped. Cook until they are tender.
Add the tomatoes chopped to the skillet and cook for a few minutes more.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine all the ingredients. Cook for a few minutes more.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Manchego Egg Fried Pisto
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and bell pepper in oil.
Step 2: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Step 4: Beat the eggs in a bowl and fry them separately in a pan.
Step 5: Serve the pisto with the fried egg.

title: Lamb Chops on the Grill
steps: Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper.
Place the lamb chops on a preheated grill.
Cook until to your liking.

title: Lobster in the oven on the back
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Clean the lobster and pat it dry with paper towels.
Place it in a baking dish, add a drizzle of olive oil virgin extra, sweet smoked paprika, and salt to taste.
Bake for 20 minutes or until cooked.

title: Chicken Breasts Villaroy
steps: Marinate the chicken with spices and oil for 30 minutes.
Cook the chicken breasts in a hot pan until they are golden brown on all sides.

title: Seafood Paella
steps: Heat the oil in a paellera and sauté the onion and garlic.
Add the tomato and cook until it's smooth.
Incorporate the rice and toast it lightly.
Add water or seafood broth, season with salt and pepper, and let it cook.
When the rice is almost done, add the fish pieces and the seafood.
Cook until they're cooked through and serve the paella in the paellera.

title: Chicken Stuffed Legs in the Oven
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Mix the chicken legs with the chopped onion, minced garlic, and parsley.

title: Ham Croquettes
steps: Cut the ham into small pieces.
Mix the ham with beaten egg and bread crumbs until a compact dough is formed.
Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden brown.
Remove the croquettes from the oil and let them cool on paper towels to remove excess grease.

title: Calamari alla Romana
steps: Step 1: Clean and dry the calamari.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a shallow dish.
Step 3: Dredge the calamari in flour, shaking off excess.
Step 4: Coat the calamari with beaten eggs.
Step 5: Fry the calamari in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Shrimp in Garlic
steps: Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Add minced garlic and sauté until golden.
Add shrimp and cook until pink.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Boiled Octopus in Galician Style
steps: Cook the octopus in a pot with water and coarse salt for about 45 minutes.
Once cooked, let it cool down and cut into slices.
In a pan, heat extra virgin olive oil and add the pieces of octopus.
Add sweet smoked paprika and coarse salt to taste.
Serve hot with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil on top.

title: Potatoes in spicy sauce
steps: Cut the potatoes into large pieces.
Fry the potatoes in hot oil until they are golden and crispy.
Mix the sweet smoked paprika with vinegar to make the spicy sauce.
Serve the potatoes hot with the spicy sauce on top.

title: Tuna Stuffed Eggs
steps: Cook the eggs until they are hard. Let them cool and then cut them in half.
Mix the tuna with mayonnaise in a bowl.
Fill each egg half with the tuna and mayonnaise mixture.

title: Mussels Steamed or with Vinegar Sauce
steps: Step 1: Wash the mussels and discard if they do not open by shaking.
Step 2: Place the mussels in a pot with enough water to cover them. Cook until all the mussels are open.
Step 3 (optional): For the vinegar sauce, mix olive oil, vinegar, and a little salt in a small bowl.

title: Table of Iberian Cheeses and Cured Meats
steps: Cut the cheese and ham into suitable portions.
Arrange the cured meats on a plate in an attractive manner.

title: Tuna and Tomato Empanadas
steps: Mix the flour with water until a dough forms.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cut the tomato into small pieces and mix with the tuna.
Stretch the dough and cut circles for the empanadas.
Fill each circle with the tuna and tomato mixture.
Close the empanadas and bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Smoked Salmon Toasts with Cream Cheese
steps: Toast the bread.
Apply a thin layer of cream cheese on each toast.
Place a piece of smoked salmon on each toast.

title: Garlic Mushrooms
steps: Finely chop the garlic.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-low heat.
Add mushrooms and cook until golden brown.
Add chopped garlic and cook for a few minutes more.
Sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.

title: Boquerones in Vinegar
steps: Clean the boquerones and cut them into small pieces.
Mix vinegar with a little water and salt.
Soak the boquerones in the vinegar mixture for 1 hour.

title: Spring Rolls
steps: Finely chop the pumpkin, garlic, and ginger.
Mix the chopped ingredients with soy sauce and a drizzle of oil.
Spread the mixture over lettuce leaves and roll them up to form the spring rolls.
Fry the spring rolls in a pan with plenty of hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Classic Hummus with Vegetables
steps: Cook chickpeas until they are soft.
Mix cooked chickpeas with tahini, egg and lemon juice in a food processor until you get a smooth mixture.
Add sweet smoked paprika to the hummus and mix well.
Serve the hummus with various vegetables.

title: Homemade Guacamole with Nachos
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the avocado.
Step 2: Chop the onion, cilantro, and tomato.
Step 3: Mix everything in a bowl and squeeze the lemon.

title: Stuffed Dates with Bacon
steps: Cut the dates in half and wrap them in bacon strips.
Place the stuffed dates in a baking dish and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes or until the bacon is crispy.

title: Wild Asparagus Grilled
steps: Wash the wild asparagus and cut off the lower part of the stem.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the wild asparagus to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes or until tender.

title: Shrimp and Asparagus Stir-Fry
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan and add the chopped asparagus.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink.

title: Provolone in the oven with oregano
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Cut the provolone into slices and place them in a baking dish.
Sprinkle dried oregano over the slices of provolone.
Bake for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: Chorizo with Apple Cider
steps: Step 1: Heat a pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the chorizo and cook until it's browned on all sides.
Step 3: Add apple cider to the pan and let it boil until it reduces by half.
Step 4: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Rice with Milk with Cinnamon
steps: Step 1: Wash the rice and put it in a pot with milk. Cook on medium heat until the rice is soft.
Step 2: Add sugar and cinnamon to the rice and milk mixture. Cook for a few minutes more until the sugar dissolves completely.
Step 3: Remove from heat and let cool before serving.

title: Homemade Egg Flan
steps: Mix eggs with half the sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Add milk gradually, mixing continuously.
Flambé caramel in a pan and pour it into a mold for flan.
Pour the egg mixture into the mold and bake in a water bath for 45 minutes.

title: Chocolate Brownie with Nuts
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Mix the melted chocolate with eggs and sugar until you get a homogeneous mixture.
Add flour and nuts to the previous mixture and mix well.
Pour the dough into a brownie mold and bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Cheese Cake in the Oven
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the cream cheese, milk, flour, sugar, and eggs in a bowl until you get a smooth mixture.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a tart mold and bake for 45 minutes or until it's firm in the center.
Step 4: Let it cool before serving.

title: Homemade Custards with Cookies
steps: Step 1: Heat the milk in a pot until it boils.
Step 2: Beat the eggs with sugar until they become frothy.
Step 3: Pour the hot milk over the beaten eggs, stirring constantly.
Step 4: Return the mixture to the pot and cook on medium-low heat until it thickens.
Step 5: Remove from heat and add cinnamon to taste.
Step 6: Pour the custards into individual cups or glasses and let cool.
Step 7: Once cooled, decorate with crushed cookies.

title: Catalan Cream Burnt
steps: Cook the milk with cinnamon until it starts to boil.
Beat the eggs with sugar until they become frothy.
Add the hot milk little by little to the beaten eggs, without stopping to stir.

title: Apple Pie Classic
steps: Prepare the pie crust according to package instructions.
Peel and chop the apples.
Fill the crust with apple mixture and bake.

title: Strawberries with Whipped Cream
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into pieces.
Whip the cream and serve over the strawberries.

title: Chocolate Mousse
steps: Melt the black chocolate with the vegetarian butter in a bain-marie.
Add granulated sugar and mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add water little by little while mixing to form a thick cream.
Remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the chocolate mousse in individual cups and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Yogurt Cake (by the glass size)
steps: Mix all ingredients in a bowl until you get a homogeneous dough.
Pour the dough into a cake mold greased with butter.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes or until it's done.

title: Torrijas of Milk
steps: Soak the bread in milk for a few minutes.
Drain off excess milk from the bread.
Pass the bread through beaten eggs.
Fry the bread in a hot pan with oil until golden brown.
Remove the torrijas from heat and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Fruit Salad of the Season
steps: Wash all the fruits.
Peel apples, bananas, and kiwis.
Cut strawberries, grapes, and oranges into small pieces.
Mix all the fruits in a bowl.
Serve and enjoy your fruit salad of the season.

title: Vanilla Ice Cream
steps: 1. Mix the milk and cream in a pot.
2. Add vanilla and heat until it boils.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Place in an appropriate container for ice creams and freeze for at least 6 hours.
5. Take out of freezer and beat with a mixer before serving.

title: Tiramisu
steps: Separate the egg whites from the yolks and whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Mix the yolks with sugar until a clear and frothy mixture is obtained.
Add mascarpone to the previous mixture and mix well until smooth.
Add dissolved coffee and cognac or rum.
Remove ladyfinger cookies from the coffee with liquor.
In a baking dish, place a layer of mascarpone mixture followed by a layer of ladyfingers soaked in coffee.
Repeat layers until the mascarpone and ladyfinger mixture is exhausted.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.

title: Curd with Honey and Nuts
steps: Heat the milk until it boils.
Remove from heat and add honey.
Stir until completely dissolved.
Pour into individual molds and let cool.
Once set, decorate with chopped nuts.

title: Mixed Green Salad Classic (lettuce, tomato, onion, tuna)
steps: Cut the lettuce and tomatoes into small pieces.
Finely chop the onion.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Add tuna to taste.

title: Cesar Salad with Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken and cut it into small pieces.
Mix the romaine lettuce leaves with croutons and garlic.
Add the chicken pieces to the lettuce mixture and serve.

title: Caprese Salad (fresh Tomato and Mozzarella)
steps: Cut the tomatoes and fresh mozzarella into slices.
Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices in a plate, placing a basil leaf between each layer.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Pasta Rainbow Salad
steps: Cook the pasta rainbow according to package instructions.
Cut cherry tomatoes and onion into small pieces.
Wash and cut mixed vegetables into small pieces.
Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil, vinegar, and salt to taste.

title: Russian Salad
steps: Step 1: Boil the potatoes and peas.
Step 2: Mix them in a bowl.

title: Lentil Salad with Spinach
steps: Cook the lentils until they are tender.
Wash and chop the spinach, tomato, and onion.
Mix the cooked lentils with the chopped spinach, tomato, and onion.
Add olive oil to taste.

title: Quinoa Salad with Avocado and Tomato
steps: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
Cut the avocado and tomato into pieces.
Mix the cooked quinoa with the avocado and tomato.
Add salt, pepper, and olive oil to taste.

title: Campbell's Salad (Baked Potatoes)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Mix the chopped lettuce with the sliced bell peppers and tomatoes.
Add the cooked, diced potatoes.
Serve the salad chilled.

title: Waldorf Salad (celery, apple, nuts)
steps: Cut the celery and apple into small pieces.
Mix the ingredients in a bowl.
Add the nuts and mix again.

title: Goat Cheese Salad with Nuts
steps: Wash and chop the lettuce.
Cut the goat cheese into small pieces.
Mix the lettuce, goat cheese, and nuts in a bowl.

title: Homemade French Fries
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into strips.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan until it reaches 170 degrees Celsius.
Add the cut potatoes to the pan and fry until they are golden brown and crispy. Remove with a slotted spoon.

title: Potato Pure Creamy
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Add milk and butter to a pot and heat until it boils.
Add cooked potatoes to the pot with milk and butter, and mix until you get a smooth texture.

title: Steamed Vegetables (Broccoli, Carrot, Cauliflower)
steps: Step 1: Cut the vegetables into small pieces.
Step 2: Steam for 10 minutes until tender.

title: White Rice Loose
steps: Step 1: Wash the rice until the water runs clear.
Step 2: In a pot, heat water and add the rice. Cook at medium-low heat until the rice is soft and all the water has been absorbed completely.

title: Sauteed Mushrooms
steps: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they are golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Padrón Fried Peppers
steps: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add Padrón Peppers and fry until golden brown on all sides.
Drain the peppers on paper towels to remove excess oil.

title: Roasted Tomatoes Provenzal
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Cut the tomatoes in half and place them on a baking sheet.
Peel the garlic and put one clove inside each tomato half.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with rosemary.
Bake for 20 minutes or until tender.

title: Green Beans Stir-Fried with Ham
steps: Cook the green beans until they are tender.
In a pan, sauté the ham until it is golden brown.
Add the green beans to the pan and stir-fry everything together for a few minutes.

title: Onion Rings
steps: Cut the onion into thick rings and separate the rings.
Mix the flour with a little water to make a thick paste.
Dip each onion ring in the flour mixture, then in beaten egg.
Coat them evenly in bread crumbs until they are completely covered.
Fry them in hot oil until golden brown. Remove from heat and drain on paper towels.

title: Roasted Bread Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into slices.
Step 2: Mix the flour with water until a thick batter is obtained.
Step 3: Coat the potatoes in the flour mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Gazpacho Andalusian
steps: Step 1: Soak the hard bread in water for a few minutes.
Step 2: Peel and chop the red peppers, peanuts, tomatoes, and garlic.
Step 3: Add all the ingredients to a blender along with some olive oil and salt to taste.
Step 4: Blend until you get a creamy texture.
Step 5: Pour the gazpacho into bowls or individual cups and serve fresh.

title: Salmorejo Cordobés
steps: Peel the mature tomatoes and cut them into pieces.
Soak the hard bread in water for a few minutes.
Drain the bread and add it to the blender jar along with the tomatoes, 1 clove of peeled garlic, and a pinch of salt.
Blend everything until you get a thick cream. If needed, add a little water to achieve the desired consistency.
Serve the salmorejo in bowls or individual plates and garnish with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

title: Seafood and Fish Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add chopped onion, garlic, and celery. Cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add chopped carrot and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 4: Add the fish cut into pieces and the seafood. Cook until almost done.
Step 5: Pour vegetable broth into the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Step 6: Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Cream of Zucchini and Quesitos
steps: Step 1: Cook the zucchini until it is smooth.
Step 2: Mix the cooked zucchini with cheese to obtain a cream.

title: Garlic Soup (Castilian Soup)
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add garlic chopped and sauté until golden.
Step 3: Add hard bread cut into pieces.
Step 4: Pour white wine and reduce to half.
Step 5: Add water until covering ingredients, season with salt and cook for 20 minutes.
Step 6: Add sweet paprika at the end of cooking.

title: Spanish Sangria Traditional
steps: Peel the oranges and lemons and put the peels in a large jar.
Pour red wine into the jar.
Add sugar to taste.
Cover with water and let macerate for several hours or all night in the refrigerator.
Serve over ice.

title: Homemade Lemonade with Mint
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Add water and mint to the lemon juice.
Mix well all the ingredients.
Serve over ice and enjoy your homemade lemonade with mint.

title: Fresh Strawberry and Banana Smoothie
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the strawberries.
Step 2: Peel and chop the banana.
Step 3: Add the ingredients to a blender and mix until smooth.

title: Homemade Mayonnaise Sauce
steps: Step 1: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 2: Add olive oil slowly while continuing to beat until a thick sauce is obtained.

title: Homemade Basic Bread (Hog Sausage)
steps: Mix the flour and water until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface.
Let the dough rise for 1 hour.
Bake at 200 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes.

title: Fabada Asturiana
steps: Soak the beans overnight.
In a large pot, fry the bacon and pork belly until they are golden brown.
Add the soaked beans to the pot along with enough water to cover them.
Add the sausage and blood sausage.
Cook everything for approximately 1 hour or until the beans are tender.
Serve hot.

title: Spaghetti with Bolognese (ground meat and tomato)
steps: Cook the ground meat in a pan until it is browned.
Add the crushed tomatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Add water and let it reduce to half.
Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Mix the spaghetti with the bolognese sauce.

title: Dorado in Salt
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Rinse the dorado and pat dry with paper towels.
Place the dorado on a baking sheet suitable for oven use.
Cover the dorado completely with coarse salt.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.

title: Chicken with Garlic
steps: Cuts the chicken into pieces and seasons with salt and pepper.
Heats olive oil in a pan and adds the chicken pieces. Cooks until they are golden brown on all sides.
Adds chopped garlic to the pan and cooks for a few minutes more until it is soft.
Removes the pan from heat and lets the chicken rest in the garlic before serving.

title: Beef Shank Stew
steps: 1. Chop the onion and garlic into small pieces.
2. In a large pot, brown the beef shank over medium-high heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic, cook until they are translucent.
4. Add the triturated tomato, red wine, sweet paprika, laurel, and allspice.
5. Bring to a boil and let cook for 2 hours approximately.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Stuffed Eggplants with Meat
steps: Cut the eggplants in half and scoop out the pulp. Cook the pulp in a pan until it's soft.
Mix the ground meat with chopped onion, garlic, and tomato puree. Cook over medium heat until the meat is cooked.
Stuff the empty eggplant halves with the meat mixture and breadcrumbs. Dip in beaten egg and fry in a pan until golden brown.

title: Cod with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Soaking the cod overnight.
Step 2: Cooking the tomatoes until they are soft.
Step 3: Adding the cooked cod to the tomatoes and cooking for a few more minutes.

title: Beef Cutlet Breaded (Milanesa)
steps: Step 1: Season the beef with salt and pepper on both sides.
Step 2: Pass the beef cutlets through beaten egg, then breadcrumbs. Fry them in a hot pan until they are golden brown.

title: Grilled Mackerel
steps: Step 1: Chop the onion and red peppers into small pieces.
Step 2: In a large pot, heat the olive oil and add the onion and red peppers. Cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the potatoes chopped into cubes and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomato and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Step 5: Add the mackerel cut into large pieces and cook for 20-25 minutes until the fish is well cooked.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Cannelloni with Spinach and Ricotta
steps: Cook the spinach and drain well.
Mix the spinach with ricotta until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Fill the cannelloni with the spinach and ricotta mixture.
Cook the cannelloni in boiling water for a few minutes.
Prepare the bechamel sauce and cover the cannelloni with it.
Bake the cannelloni at medium-low temperature until golden brown.

title: Grilled Swordfish
steps: Step 1: Cut the swordfish into fillets
Step 2: Sear the swordfish fillets in a pan with oil for a few minutes on each side

title: Broken Eggs with Ham
steps: Cut the ham into small pieces.
In a pan, heat a little oil and add the eggs. Stir until they are cooked.
Add the ham to the pan with the eggs and mix everything so that it integrates well.
Serve hot and enjoy your dish.

title: Pork Belly in Red Wine
steps: 1. Season the pork belly.
2. In a pot, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
3. Add the seasoned pork belly to the pot and seal it on all sides.
4. Add sweet paprika and red wine. Cook until the wine is reduced by half.
5. Add enough water to cover the pork belly, along with laurel leaves and thyme sprigs.
6. Cover the pot and cook over low heat for 2 hours approximately.
7. Remove the pork belly from the pot and reduce it over high heat until the liquid has thickened.

title: Black Rice with Squid
steps: Step 1: Cook the black rice until it is smooth.
Step 2: Add the squid cut into pieces and cook until tender.

title: Roasted Turkey Stuffed with Herbs
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Clean and finely chop the onion and garlic.
In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden brown.
Mix the gluten-free breadcrumbs with the herbs.
Stuff the turkey with the breadcrumb and herb mixture.
Cook in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until the turkey is cooked.

title: Trout in Navarran Style (with Ham)
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Fry the trout in a pan with olive oil until it is golden brown on both sides.
Step 3: Add the ham to the pan and cook until crispy.
Step 4: Serve the trout with the ham on top.

title: San Jacobos homemade (ham and cheese)
steps: Step 1: Take a slice of bread and place a ham slice on top of it.
Step 2: Place a cheese slice on top of the ham.
Step 3: Cover with another slice of bread to make a sandwich.
Step 4: Heat a pan over medium heat and add a little butter.
Step 5: Place the sandwich in the pan and let it brown on both sides until the cheese is melted.

title: Pasta in a Cazuela with Pork Ribs
steps: Cook the pork ribs until they are browned and tender.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, cook until they are soft.
Add the sweet smoked paprika and triturated tomato, cook for a few minutes.
Incorporate the pasta and cover with beef broth. Cook until the pasta is tender.
Serve hot.

title: Chicken in Pepitoria
steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Brown the chicken in a pot with olive oil.
Add chopped onions and sauté until they are golden brown.
Add sweet paprika and stir.
Add triturated tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add white wine and let it reduce.
Cover the pot with water, add salt, and cook until the chicken is tender.

title: Cod with Donostiarra Sauce
steps: Step 1: Season the cod with salt and sweet smoked paprika.
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a pan and add minced garlic.
Step 3: Add the cod to the pan and cook for a few minutes on each side until it is golden brown and cooked.

title: Greek Moussaka
steps: Cook the eggplants and potatoes in the oven until they are soft.
Make a sauce with the onion, garlic, and lamb meat.
Mix the cooked lamb with milk and bread crumbs.
Assemble the moussaka in an oven-safe dish, alternating layers of eggplant, potatoes, and lamb with milk.
Bake at 180 degrees until golden brown on top.

title: Grilled Snails
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a pan and add the snails to brown them.
Step 2: Add the garlic, sweet paprika, and laurel. Simmer everything for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the vinegar and cook at medium heat until it reduces slightly.

title: Four Cheese Pizza
steps: Preheat the oven to high temperature.
Stretch the pizza dough in a pizza mold.
Cover the dough with tomato sauce.
Add the cheeses: mozzarella, gorgonzola and roquefort.
Sprinkle parmesan over the cheese.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.

title: Stuffed Piquillo Peppers with Cod
steps: Step 1: Soak the Piquillo Peppers in hot water for a few minutes.
Step 2: In a pan with olive oil, sauté the cod, broken into small pieces and add garlic, chopped.
Step 3: Mix the cod with breadcrumbs until you get a compact texture.
Step 4: Fill the Piquillo Peppers with the cod and breadcrumb mixture.
Step 5: Fry the stuffed peppers in a pan with hot olive oil until they are golden brown.

title: Fish and Seafood Stew
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the tomatoes and cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Incorporate the fish and seafood into the sofrito and cook until almost done.
Step 4: Add white wine and let it reduce.
Step 5: Add water and let it cook until the ingredients are well combined.

title: Filet Mignon Wellington
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Step 2: Cover the filet mignon with pastry dough.

title: Iberian Pork Chops on the Grill
steps: Season the Iberian pork chops and let them rest for 30 minutes.
Preheat the grill to high heat.
Place the Iberian pork chops on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Shrimp in their Ink with Rice
steps: Step 1: Clean the shrimp and separate the ink.
Step 2: Cook the rice in salted water until it is al dente.
Step 3: In a pan, heat olive oil and add the shrimp. Fry until they are golden brown on both sides.
Step 4: Add the shrimp ink to the pan with the fried shrimp and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Mix the cooked rice with the shrimp and its ink. Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Zucchini Omelette
steps: Peel and slice the zucchini into thin rounds.
Cook the zucchini slices for a few minutes until they are tender.
In a bowl, mix the beaten eggs with chopped parsley.
Add the cooked zucchini slices and chopped onion to the bowl with the eggs.
Mix well all the ingredients.
Heat an anti-stick pan over medium heat. Once hot, pour the zucchini and egg mixture into the pan.
Cook the omelette for a few minutes until the edge is golden brown and can be easily removed from the pan.
Flip the omelette with care to cook the other side. Repeat until both sides are golden brown.
Remove the omelette from the pan and let it cool before serving.

title: Roasted Piglet
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the piglet with salt and pepper.
Place the piglet on a baking sheet.
Bake for approximately 45 minutes or until cooked.

title: Ossobuco in Milanese Style
steps: Cut the meat into large pieces and season with salt and black pepper.
In a large pot, sauté the onion, celery, and carrots until they are golden brown.
Add the meat to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the garlic, vinegar, red wine, tomato paste, laurel, and beef broth. Cover the meat with the liquid.
Cook over medium heat for 2 hours or until the meat is tender.
Serve the ossobuco with reduced sauce.

title: Beef Stir-Fry (Peruvian Style)
steps: Cut the beef into thin strips.
In a hot pan, add a little oil and fry the beef strips until they are golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and minced garlic. Fry until they are translucent.
Add large potato chunks and fry them along with the onion and garlic for a few minutes.
Return the beef to the pan and mix everything well. Add a little water, salt, and pepper to taste.
Cook everything at medium heat until the potatoes are tender.
Serve hot and serve with rice.

title: Rice with Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic in oil until they are golden.
Step 2: Add the rice and stir to toast it lightly.
Step 3: Add the sweet smoked paprika and stir well.
Step 4: Pour in the fish stock and let it simmer. Then, cook at low heat until the rice is done.
Step 5: Incorporate the shrimp cut into pieces and cook for a few more minutes.

title: Roasted Lamb
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Season the lamb with salt, pepper, garlic, and thyme.
Place the lamb in a baking dish and add a little water.
Bake for 45 minutes or until the lamb is cooked.
Remove from the oven and let rest for some minutes before serving.
Add fresh parsley chopped as garnish.

title: Beef and Mashed Potato Cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Peel and chop the onion and garlic. Sauté them in a pan with a little oil until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the ground beef to the pan and cook until it is well done. Remove from heat and let cool.
Step 4: Peel and chop the potatoes. Cook them in a pot of water until they are tender. Drain and mash until you get a smooth paste.
Step 5: Mix the beef, mashed potatoes, bread crumbs, egg, and milk in a bowl. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Step 6: Pour the mixture into a cake mold. Bake for 25 minutes or until it is golden brown and cooked through.

title: Seafood Salad
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the garlic, onion, and bell pepper.
Step 2: In a hot pan with oil, sauté the garlic, onion, and bell pepper until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the seafood cut into small pieces and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Incorporate the chopped tomatoes and cook everything together for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve the seafood salad hot or cold.

title: Habitas Baby with Ham
steps: Step 1: Cook the Habitas Baby according to package instructions.
Step 2: Cut the Ham into small pieces.
Step 3: Mix the cooked Habitas Baby with the Ham and serve.

title: Garlic Bread with Parsley
steps: Step 1: Mix the ingredients.
Step 2: Knead the dough.

title: Goat Cheese Toast with Caramelized Onion
steps: Caramelize the onion in oil until it's golden.
Cut the goat cheese into slices.
Toast the bread.
Place the cheese slices on top of the toasted bread.
Heat in the oven until the cheese melts.
Serve hot.

title: Chicken Wings Fried Crispy
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken wings into pieces.
Step 2: Mix flour with salt and pepper.
Step 3: Dip the chicken pieces in the flour mixture.
Step 4: Fry the chicken pieces in hot oil until they are golden brown and crispy.

title: Cheese Fingers (Mozzarella Sticks)
steps: Cut the mozzarella cheese into sticks.
Dip the cheese sticks in Tequeños dough, making sure they are completely covered.
Fry the cheese fingers in hot oil until golden and crispy.
Drain excess oil on absorbent paper.
Serve hot with your preferred sauce.

title: Beef Carpaccio with Parmesan
steps: Freeze the beef for a few hours before cutting it.
Cut the beef finely and arrange it on a plate.
Shred the parmesan over the meat.
Add salt, pepper, and olive oil to taste.

title: Tuna Tartare with Avocado
steps: Cut the tuna into small pieces and place it in a bowl.
Add chopped onion, cilantro, lemon juice, and mix everything together.
Cut the avocado into cubes and add it to the bowl.
Mix all the ingredients carefully.
Serve Immediately.

title: Grilled Clams
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Clean the clams and place them in a baking dish.
Mix bread crumbs, parmesan, and melted butter.
Add garlic minced to the bread crumb mixture.
Cover each clam with the bread crumb mixture.
Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Navaja Grilled
steps: Clean the navajas.
Place in a hot pan without oil.
Cook until they open and are golden brown on both sides.

title: Garlic Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add minced garlic and peas, cook until tender.

title: Morcilla de Burgos Fried
steps: Heat oil in a pan.
Add the morcilla and fry until it is golden brown on all sides.

title: Tuna Cake with Serrano Ham
steps: Peel the tomato and garlic in a bowl.
Add salt to taste and mix with bread crumbs.
Finely chop the serrano ham.
Assemble the pieces of bread with the tomato and garlic mixture.
Decorate with slices of serrano ham.

title: Ham and Cheese Quesadillas
steps: Step 1: Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Step 2: Place a wheat tortilla in the skillet.
Step 3: Add ham and cheese to half of the tortilla.
Step 4: Fold the tortilla in half to cover the filling.
Step 5: Cook until both sides are golden brown and the cheese melts.

title: Shrimp Cakes
steps: Step 1: Mix shrimp and flour
Step 2: Fry the mixture

title: Provoleta on the Grill
steps: Light the grill and wait for it to be hot.
Place the provolone cheese over a special cheese rack or on aluminum foil with holes.
Season the cheese with salt to taste.
Put the rack or foil in the grill and cook until the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Nachos with melted cheese
steps: Heat the cheese in a microwave-safe container until it's melted.
Place the nachos on a plate.
Pour the melted cheese over the nachos.

title: Chistorra with Cider
steps: Step 1: Heat the chistorra in a pan without oil until crispy.
Step 2: Add cider and cook until it reduces to half.

title: Cod Fritters
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod loin for a few hours.
Step 2: Drain and dry the cod thoroughly. Process it in a food processor until you get a fine paste.
Step 3: Mix the flour with eggs and add the cod paste. Knead until you get a smooth dough.
Step 4: Form small balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.

title: Mushroom and Shrimp Revuelto
steps: Step 1: Sear the mushrooms in a pan with oil until they are golden.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink. Add the beaten eggs and stir until they set.

title: Santiago Cake (Almond Flour)
steps: Mix eggs and glazed sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Add almond flour gradually and mix until a homogeneous dough is formed.
Pour the dough into a greased mold and bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Sky Bacon
steps: Beat the eggs with sugar until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a baking mold and cook in a water bath for 45 minutes at low heat.

title: Fried Milk
steps: Step 1: Mix the milk with flour until a thick batter is obtained.
Step 2: Add eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 45 minutes.
Step 4: Once cooked, cool the fried milk before serving.

title: Quesada Pasiega
steps: Mix the quesadah flour with milk until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Add the egg and continue mixing.
Add sugar and cinnamon to taste.
Pour the mixture into a baking mold and cook at 180 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Melt the black, milk, and white chocolate separately in a bain-marie.
Add the melted butter to each chocolate and mix until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Mix the rice flour with sugar in a bowl.
Incorporate the melted chocolates into the flour-sugar mixture, alternating between the three types of chocolate.
Pour the mixture into a tart mold and bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.
Let it cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Coulant
steps: Melt the butter along with the chocolate in a double boiler.
Add eggs and mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Incorporate flour and sugar, mix well.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and bake at 200 degrees for 12 minutes.

title: Apples in Red Wine
steps: Peel the apples and cut them into pieces.
In a pot, heat the red wine over medium heat until it starts to boil.
Add the apples to the red wine and cook for about 15 minutes or until they are tender.
Serve the apples hot with a little of the red wine from the pot.

title: Panna Cotta with Red Fruits
steps: Mix the cream of milk, milk, and sugar in a pot.
Heat the mixture over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and add unflavored gelatin soaked in cold water.
Mix well until the gelatin is fully dissolved.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and chill in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
Unmold the panna cotta and serve with a garnish of red fruits.

title: Crepes with Chocolate
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with the eggs and milk.
Step 2: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Step 3: Add the melted chocolate to the crepe mixture.
Step 4: Cook the crepes in a hot pan until they are golden brown on both sides.

title: Apple Compote
steps: Peel and cut the apples into pieces.
Cook the apple pieces in a pot with a little water until they are soft.
Mash the apple compote until it reaches a smooth texture.

title: Egg Custards of Santa Teresa
steps: Separate the egg yolks from the whites.
Mix the egg yolks with sugar until a thick and yellowish paste is obtained.
Cook the mixture in a bain-marie, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
Let cool and serve.

title: Cream Puffs with Custard
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with water until a dough forms.
Step 2: Add the custard and knead until a homogeneous mass is obtained.

title: Carrot Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Grate the carrots and reserve.
Mix the softened butter with sugar until a creamy mixture is obtained.
Add eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour sifted together with chemical yeast and mix until well combined.
Add grated carrots and mix to distribute them evenly.
Pour the batter into a greased tart pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a skewer inserted in the center comes out clean.
Let it cool before serving.

title: Miguelitos of Cream
steps: Mix the flour, sugar, and eggs until a dough forms.
Add the cream to the mixture and stir until smooth.
Make balls with the dough and place them in a cookie mold.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Lemon Sorbet with Cava
steps: Squeeze the lemon juice.
Add cava and mix well.
Freeze in an appropriate container for sorbets.

title: Grilled Pepper Salad with Anchovy
steps: Step 1: Grill the peppers and let them cool.
Step 2: Peel and cut the peppers into strips. Mix with anchovy, chopped.

title: Greek Salad (feta, olives, cucumber)
steps: Slice the cucumber into thin slices.
Mix the salad, olives, and feta in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil and vinegar.

title: Coleslaw Salad
steps: Cut the cabbage into thin strips.
Mix the mayonnaise and yogurt to make a creamy sauce.
Add the chopped onion to the sauce.
Mix the cabbage with the mayonnaise and yogurt sauce.

title: Rice Salad with Corn and Peas
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Hervir los guisantes hasta que estén tiernos.
Mezclar el arroz cocido, maíz y guisantes en un bol.
Agregar una vinagreta de aceite de oliva y limón al gusto.

title: Malagueña Salad (Cod and Orange)
steps: Step 1: Cook the cod.
Step 2: Mix the cod with orange in a bowl.

title: Pipirrana of Jaen
steps: Cuts all the ingredients into small pieces.
Mixes all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Adds olive oil and vinegar to taste.

title: White Bean Salad with Tomato
steps: Cook the white beans until they are tender.
Cut the tomatoes into pieces and mix them with the white beans.

title: Smoked Salmon Salad (smoked salmon, cod)
steps: Cut the lettuce and tomatoes into small pieces.
Peel and finely chop the onion.
Place the lettuce, tomatoes, and onion in a bowl.
Add the smoked salmon and cod cut into small pieces.
Mix all the ingredients and serve.

title: Tabulé (salad of couscous)
steps: Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
Cut the red pepper, onion, and tomatoes into small pieces.
Wash and finely chop the mint.
Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and lemon juice. Mix well.

title: Tomato Salad with Raf Salt
steps: Cut the raf tomato into pieces.
Place the tomato pieces in a plate.
Season with salt to taste.

title: Potatoes in Poor Style
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Heat the oil in a pan and add the potatoes.
Cook at medium heat until they are golden brown on all sides.
Serve hot.

title: Roasted Vegetable Salad
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Peel and cut the eggplants into thick slices.
Cut the peppers in half, remove seeds, and cut them into large pieces.
Peel the onion and cut it into quarters.
Place the eggplants, peppers, and onion on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 25 minutes or until they are soft and lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool.

title: Rice Three Delights
steps: Step 1: Wash and drain the rice.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the pumpkin diced with a little oil until it is transparent.
Step 3: Add the pork diced to the pot and cook until it is browned.
Step 4: Add the washed rice to the pot, stir well so that it absorbs the sauce.
Step 5: Add water until the rice is covered, season with salt to taste and let cook at medium heat until the rice is done.
Step 6: Turn off the heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Spinach in Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the spinach until it is tender.
Step 2: Add the cream and mix well.
Step 3: Serve hot.

title: Grilled Corn
steps: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Place the corn on the grill and cook for 10-15 minutes, turning every few minutes until slightly charred.
Remove from heat and let cool a bit before serving.

title: Vegetable Stew
steps: Chop the cauliflower and carrot into small pieces.
Sauté the bell peppers in a pan with a little oil until they are tender.
Add the cauliflower and carrot to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Add the peas and cook everything together until the vegetables are tender.

title: Roasted Potatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and dry the potatoes.
Cut the potatoes into large pieces.
Place the potato pieces on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 25 minutes or until they are golden brown and tender.

title: Yuca Fritter
steps: Peel the yuca and cut it into pieces.
Fry the yuca pieces in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Eggplant and Zucchini Stew
steps: Step 1: Cut the eggplants and bell peppers into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic in a pan with oil until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the sliced bell peppers and sauté for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the eggplants and cook until they are tender.
Step 5: Add the crushed tomatoes and let them cook along with the vegetables for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Season with salt and serve hot as a side dish.

title: Beans with Ham
steps: Step 1: Cook the beans until they are tender.
Step 2: Add the ham and cook for a few minutes more.

title: Ham and Egg Soup (Picadillo)
steps: Cook the ham until it is golden.
Add the eggs and cook them until they are set.

title: Vichyssoise (Cold Mushroom Cream)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the mushrooms in butter until they are soft.
Step 2: Add the potatoes cut into pieces and cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Blend the mushroom-potato mixture to obtain a smooth cream.
Step 4: Chill before serving.

title: Pumpkin and Carrot Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the pumpkin and carrots until they are tender.
Step 2: Blend the cooked pumpkin and carrots in a blender until you get a smooth cream.
Step 3: Add water or vegetable broth to adjust the desired consistency.
Step 4: Season with salt, pepper, and any other spice that you prefer.
Step 5: Warm up the cream before serving.

title: Beef Consommé
steps: Cook the beef until it is browned on all sides.
Add the vegetables and cook until they are tender.
Add water and cook at low heat for several hours to obtain a flavorful broth.
Serve hot

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the onion and garlic, cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the chicken cut into small pieces and cook until it is browned.
Step 4: Add the bell peppers and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 6: Add the noodles and cook until they are tender.
Step 7: Serve hot.

title: Horchata of Chufa
steps: Soak the chufas overnight.
Peel and dry the soaked chufas.
Grind the chufas in a grinder or food processor.
Add water and sugar to the chufa puree and mix well.
Strain the mixture to obtain a homogeneous horchata.

title: Summer Red Wine
steps: Mix red wine and orange juice in a 1:1 ratio.
Serve over ice cubes.

title: Lemon Granita
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Mix the lemon juice with sugar until it dissolves completely.
Add water and mix well all ingredients.
Freeze the mixture in a mold for ice cream or on a flat tray, stirring every hour until a granita forms.

title: Pink Sauce (cocktail)
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 2: Sauté the garlic in a pan with olive oil until it's golden.
Step 3: Add chopped bell peppers to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add chopped tomatoes and cook at medium heat until they're soft.
Step 5: Blend all ingredients together to get a smooth sauce.

title: Homemade Strawberry Jam
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into pieces.
Mix the strawberries with sugar in a pot and cook on medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Add the strawberry-sugar mixture to a larger pot and cook on low heat for approximately 20 minutes or until it thickens.
Let the jam cool before storing it in an airtight container.

title: Chicken in Beer
steps: Step 1: Season the chicken.
Step 2: Fry the chicken in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: Add beer and cook at medium heat until half of the liquid is reduced.
Step 4: Cover the pan and let it cook for a few minutes until the chicken is cooked.

title: Pork in Sweet and Sour Style
steps: Cuts the pork into small pieces and marinates with sweet and sour sauce, garlic minced, and ginger grated.
Heats oil in a pan and fries the pork pieces until they are golden brown on all sides.
Adds the marinade to the pan and cooks for a few more minutes until the pork is cooked.

title: Beef with Bamboo and Mushrooms
steps: Step 1: Cut the beef into pieces and season it.
Step 2: In a hot pan, add a little oil and brown the meat on all sides.
Step 3: Add the bamboo and mushrooms to the pan and cook until they are tender.
Step 4: Add water or beef broth and let it simmer until the meat is tender.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Canelones of Meat (Roasted)
steps: Cook the ground meat with chopped onion until it is golden.
Stuff the cannellones with the meat mixture and cook them in boiling water for a few minutes.
Prepare the bechamel sauce and cover the cannellones with it.
Sprinkle raked cheese on top and bake in the oven until they are golden.

title: Fish Fritter in Andalusian Style
steps: Season the fish fritter with salt and pepper.
Coat the fish fritter in flour and beaten eggs.
Fry the fish fritter in hot oil until golden brown.
Add garlic and sweet smoked paprika during frying.
Serve hot with lemon and fresh parsley.

title: Grilled Sardines (Skewers)
steps: Preheat the grill to high temperature.
Season the sardines with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the grill with aluminum foil.
Place the sardines on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve the sardines hot and enjoy.

title: Potage of Vigilia (Lentils, Spinach, and Cod)
steps: Step 1: Soaking the lentils overnight.
Step 2: Cooking the lentils until they are tender.
Step 3: In a separate pot, cooking the spinach until it is soft.
Step 4: Adding the cod, broken into small pieces, to the pot with the lentils and cooking for a few minutes.
Step 5: Incorporating the cooked spinach into the potage and mixing everything well.
Step 6: Serving hot.

title: White Beans with Mussels
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add white beans and rehydrate them.
Step 3: Incorporate sweet paprika, laurel, and triturated tomato.
Step 4: Cover with water and cook until they are tender.
Step 5: Add mussels and cook until they open.

title: Potatoes in Rioja Style (with Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Fry the chorizo in a pan until it is golden brown.
Step 3: Add the potatoes to the pan with the chorizo and fry until they are tender and golden brown.

title: Spanish Omelette (Vegetables and Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the potatoes into small pieces.
Step 2: In a hot pan with oil, fry the potato pieces until they are golden brown. Remove them and reserve them.
Step 3: Finely chop the onion and green pepper.
Step 4: In the same pan where the potatoes were fried, add the chopped onion and green pepper. Fry until they are soft.
Step 5: Add beaten eggs to the pan with the vegetables and mix well.
Step 6: Add sliced chorizo to the pan and mix everything again.
Step 7: Add the fried potatoes reserved earlier and mix so that all ingredients blend in well.
Step 8: Pour the mixture into a round mold and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until it is set.

title: Spaghetti with Shrimp and Guindilla
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Step 2: In a pan, heat the olive oil and add minced garlic and guindilla.
Step 3: Add shrimp to the pan and cook until they are pink.
Step 4: Add cooked spaghetti to the pan and mix everything together.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Barbecue Pizza
steps: Prepare the pizza dough.
Add tomato sauce to the dough.
Add cooked chicken in pieces.
Add chopped onion and bell pepper.
Add grated cheese.

title: Roasted Chicken with Pan Breads
steps: Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Wash and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Season the chicken with salt and sweet smoked paprika.
Place the potatoes on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and season with salt.
Place the chicken on another baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
Add the potatoes to the chicken's baking sheet and roast for an additional 20 minutes or until they are golden brown and cooked.

title: Grilled Pork Chop in German Style
steps: Preheat the oven to 220 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork chop with salt and black pepper.
Add minced garlic to the pork chop.
Place the pork chop in a baking dish and bake for about 45 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Pork with Greens
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork in a pot of water and salt until tender.
Step 2: In another pot, cook whole potatoes until they are soft.
Step 3: In a large pan, sauté the greens with a little olive oil.
Step 4: Add the cooked pork and cooked potatoes to the pan with the greens. Mix everything well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tuna in Caramelized Onion
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.

title: Baked Salmon with Honey and Mustard
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
In a bowl, mix honey and mustard until a paste is formed.
Brush the honey-mustard mixture over salmon fillets.
Place the fillets on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the salmon is cooked.

title: Eggplant Parmesan (Melanzane)
steps: Cut the eggplant into thick slices.
Dredge the slices in cornmeal and bread crumbs.
Fry the eggplant until golden brown.
Layer fried eggplant with parmesan cheese in a baking dish, topped with more parmesan cheese.
Repeat the process until no more eggplant is left.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden brown.

title: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Ground Meat
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Remove the top part of the bell peppers and empty them.
Step 3: Mix the ground meat with spices to taste.
Step 4: Fill the bell peppers with the meat mixture.

title: Rabbit with Rosemary
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Season the rabbit and brush it with olive oil.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and rosemary sprigs to the rabbit.
Step 4: Place the rabbit in a baking dish and bake for about 45 minutes or until cooked.

title: Duck Breast with Red Fruits
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Grilled Beef Steak
steps: Season the meat with salt and pepper.
Cook the meat in a hot grill for a few minutes on each side until it is cooked to your liking.

title: Lamb Stew
steps: Sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add the lamb, cut into pieces, and brown it.
Add the tomato, bell pepper, and potatoes.
Cook everything together with beef broth until tender.

title: Roast Cod with Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Wash and cut the potatoes into slices.
Step 3: Season the cod fillets and place them on a baking sheet.
Step 4: Add the potatoes around the cod.
Step 5: Brush with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes or until the cod is cooked.

title: Swordfish in Madrid Style
steps: Season the swordfish with salt and sweet smoked paprika.
Heat oil in a pan and add the garlic, chopped.
Add the seasoned swordfish to the pan and fry both sides until golden brown.
Add white wine to the pan and reduce the liquid.
Serve the swordfish with the cooking sauce.

title: Trout with Almonds
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Mix ground almonds with a little olive oil.
Step 3: Coat the trout in the almond mixture.
Step 4: Cook the trout in a preheated skillet over medium heat until golden brown and cooked.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
steps: Mix the chicken with yogurt, egg, and ginger. Let it marinate for an hour.
Cook the chicken until it's golden brown on all sides.
Add brown sugar and curry powder to the chicken. Cook for a few minutes.
Add crushed tomato and cook at medium-low heat for 20 minutes.
Add coconut cream and cook for a few more minutes until the sauce thickens.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Beef and Bean Burritos
steps: Cook the ground beef with onion and garlic until it is well done.
Add beans and cook for a few minutes more.
Warm tortillas in a pan.
Fill each tortilla with the meat and bean mixture.
Roll up the burritos and serve hot.

title: Tacos al pastor (pork and pineapple)
steps: Step 1: Cut the pork into small pieces.
Step 2: Grill the pineapple on a grill.

title: Quiche Lorraine (bacon and cheese)
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Eggs with Plate, Chorizo, and Tomato
steps: Heat a pan with a little oil.
Add the chorizo and fry until it's golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they're soft.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and add salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the eggs into the pan with the chorizo and tomatoes. Cook until they're done.
Serve hot.

title: Old Clothes (Leftovers from Stew)
steps: Cook the beef until it's tender.
In a pan, sauté the onion and bell pepper chopped.
Add garlic chopped and cook for another minute.
Add crushed tomato and spices.
Add cooked and shredded beef to the pan.
Cook everything together for a few minutes.
Add vinegar and olive oil, let reduce a bit.

title: Beef Stew with Mushrooms
steps: Salt and pepper the meat. Coat with flour.
Fry the meat in a pan with hot oil until it is golden brown on all sides.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan, cook until they are soft.
Add sliced mushrooms and parsley. Cook until the mushrooms are tender.
Add water or beef broth until the meat is covered, let cook slowly for about two hours.
Remove the meat and reduce the broth to thicken it.
Serve the meat with reduced broth and mushrooms on top.

title: Chicken and Rice Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides.
Step 2: Remove the chicken from the pot and add the onion, garlic, and bell pepper. Cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the rice to the pot and cook for a few minutes until it is lightly toasted.
Step 4: Add the chicken broth and carrot to the pot. Bring to a boil.
Step 5: Add the cooked chicken to the pot. Reduce heat and let the rice cook until tender.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Cachopo Asturian of Beef
steps: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Pass the beef pieces through beaten eggs and breadcrumbs.
Fry the cachopos in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown.
Serve accompanied by fried potatoes or salad.

title: Crab Cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Cut the crab into pieces and season with salt.
Step 3: Sauté the garlic in olive oil until golden.
Step 4: Add the crab to the pan and cook until well done on all sides.
Step 5: Mix in the parsley and bread crumbs, combine well.
Step 6: Place the mixture in a cake mold and bake for 20 minutes.

title: Cod Brandade
steps: Soak cod loin in water for 24 hours.
Drain the water from cod and cook it in a pan with a little oil.
Add minced garlic, cook until golden brown.
Remove the pan from heat and add chopped parsley.
Mash everything together with a fork until you get a paste.

title: Mussels in Sauce (Bienmesabe)
steps: Step 1: Cut the mussels into pieces.
Step 2: Mash the garlic cloves and mix with vinegar, sweet paprika, and cumin.
Step 3: Add the laurel to the sauce.
Step 4: Soak the mussel pieces in the sauce for at least 2 hours.
Step 5: Heat a pan with oil and fry the mussel pieces until they are golden brown.

title: Piquillo Pepper Confitados
steps: Preheat the oven to medium-low temperature (150°C).
Clean and dry the piquillo peppers with a kitchen towel.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for approximately 30 minutes or until tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Fried Cheese with Jam
steps: Cut the cheese into slices.
Heat a pan with oil and fry the cheese slices until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove the fried cheese slices from the pan and place them over paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fried cheese slices hot accompanied by jam.

title: Sobrasada with honey on toast
steps: 1. Spread the sobrasada on a slice of toast.
2. Add a little honey on top.

title: Shrimp Carpaccio
steps: Freeze the shrimp for 2 hours before preparing them.
Cut the frozen shrimp finely.
Arrange the cut shrimp in individual plates.
Season with lemon and olive oil.

title: Eggs stuffed with avocado
steps: Cook the eggs until they are hard. Let them cool and then cut them in half.
Mix the avocado meat with chopped onion, sweet paprika, and cilantro.
Fill each egg half with the avocado mixture.
Adorn with a little fresh cilantro and lemon before serving.

title: Steamed Mussels
steps: Place the mussels in a pot with a little water and minced garlic.
Cook at high heat until the shells open.
Add chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Shrimp cooked with mayonnaise
steps: Step 1: Cook the shrimp in boiling water for a few minutes.
Step 2: Once cooked, chill and peel them.

title: Grilled Shrimp
steps: Clean the shrimp and reserve.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Cod Cakes
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours and then drain it well.
Step 2: Mix the soaked cod with flour until a thick batter forms.
Step 3: Heat oil in a pan and fry portions of the batter until they are golden brown and crispy.
Step 4: Drain the cakes on paper towels to remove excess oil.

title: Stuffed Mushrooms with Ham
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and cut off the top.
Step 2: Stuff each mushroom with a little bit of ham chopped.
Step 3: Place the mushrooms on a baking sheet and bake at 180 degrees for 15 minutes.

title: Mushroom Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Cook the mushrooms until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked mushrooms with the rallied bread and an egg.
Step 3: Shape the croquettes with the mixture.
Step 4: Fry the croquettes in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Chicken Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Shred the chicken and mix it with rumbled bread.
Step 2: Add an egg and mix well all the ingredients.
Step 3: Shape the croquettes and fry them in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Grilled Pork Skewer
steps: Cut the pork into small pieces.
Mix sweet smoked paprika and hot smoked paprika with garlic and oil.
Marinate the pork skewers in the mixture for 2 hours.
Skewer the pork pieces onto brochets.
Grill the brochets until they are golden brown.

title: Wild Boar Morteruelo
steps: Step 1: Soak the hard bread in water for a few hours.
Step 2: Place the wild boar meat in a mortar and add the peeled garlic.
Step 3: Add the soaked bread to the mortar and mix everything with a masher.
Step 4: Add sweet and spicy paprika to taste and continue mixing until you get a homogeneous paste.
Step 5: Taste the morteruelo and adjust the seasonings if necessary.

title: Liver Pâté Homemade
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork liver until it is cooked.
Step 2: In a pan, melt the butter and add the chopped onion. Cook until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
Step 4: Add the cooked pork liver to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the rumbledoat and mix everything well. Let it cool down before serving.

title: Mushrooms on the grill with parsley
steps: Wash the mushrooms and cut them into slices
Heat a pan with a little oil
Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until they are golden brown on both sides
Remove from heat and sprinkle with chopped parsley

title: Snails in Spicy Sauce
steps: Cook the snails in water with salt for 5 minutes.
In a pan, sauté the minced garlic until it is golden.
Add the sweet and hot smoked paprika, and reheat for 1 minute.
Combine the cooked snails and drained sauce in the pan, and mix well.
Add the red wine and cook everything together until the sauce reduces.

title: Sobao pasiego
steps: Mix milk, flour, and sugar in a pot.
Add eggs and mix well.
Heat at medium heat until thickens.
Pour into a mold and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Mallorca Pastry
steps: Mix the yeast in a little warm water with a teaspoon of sugar.
Combine the flour with the rest of the sugar, salt, and pork fat.
Add the yeast mixture to the dry ingredients' center and knead until you get a soft dough.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for a few hours.
Once the dough has doubled its size, stretch it over an floured surface and shape the Mallorca pastries.
Let the pastries rise again for 20 minutes.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Anise Cookies
steps: Grind the anise seeds in a mortar or food processor.
Beat the eggs with sugar until a light batter is obtained.
Add flour and chemical yeast to the previous mixture.
Incorporate the ground anise seeds.
Make small balls with the dough obtained and fry them in hot oil.
Drain the cookies on absorbent paper to remove excess oil.

title: Pestitos with Honey
steps: Mix the flour with water until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface.
Cut the dough into triangle shapes.
Paint the triangles with honey and roll them up to form the pestitos.
Fry the pestitos in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Alfajores with Cornstarch
steps: Mix the cornstarch with sugar.
Add melted butter and milk.
Beat until a smooth dough is obtained.
Make balls with the dough and fry in hot oil until golden brown.
Fill the balls with dulce de leche and join them to form the alfajores.

title: Lemon Pie
steps: Step 1: Mix milk, sugar, and flour in a bowl.
Step 2: Add butter and mix well.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a tart mold and bake at 180 degrees for 30 minutes.

title: Apple Strudel
steps: Peel the apples and cut them into pieces.
Spread the hajjar pastry over a flat surface.
Place the apple pieces on top of the pastry.
Cover the apples with the remaining pastry.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes.

title: Grilled Apples
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Wash the apples and dry them with a clean cloth.
Place the apples on a baking sheet, cut each apple in half and remove the core.
Sprinkle the apples with lemon juice to prevent oxidation.
Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar over the apples.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until they are tender.

title: Lemon Mousse
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Mix the sugar with egg yolks until they become frothy.
Add the lemon juice to the previous mixture and stir well.
Beat the egg whites to a stiff peak and mix them carefully with the whipped cream.
Combine both mixtures (the one of sugar, lemon, and egg yolks with the one of egg whites and whipped cream) and mix until you get a smooth consistency.
Pour the preparation into individual molds and let it cool in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Volcan of Chocolate
steps: Melt the chocolate with butter in a bain-marie.
Mix the flour with sugar and add it to the chocolate mixture.
Beat the eggs and mix them with the previous preparation.
Pour the dough into a greased mold, buttered with butter, and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Pastry Bites
steps: Spread the pastry dough over a floured surface.
Brush the dough with water and sprinkle with glazed sugar.
Cut the dough into triangles and roll each one to form a pastry bite.

title: Brazo de Gitano with Nata
steps: Step 1: Beat the eggs with sugar until they become light and fluffy.
Step 2: Add flour gradually, mixing carefully.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a greased rectangular mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 15 minutes.
Step 4: Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack. Once cooled, remove from the mold and roll up the brao de gitano using parchment paper.
Step 5: Whip the nata until it becomes stiff and spread it over the brao de gitano. Roll it carefully and refrigerate for a few hours before serving.

title: Grandma's Tart (Cookies and Chocolate)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Mix the cookie dough until it is smooth.
Pour the mixture into a tart pan and bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Melt the chocolate in the bain-marie or in the microwave.
Once the cookie base is chilled, spread the melted chocolate over it.
Chill in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Calatrava Bread
steps: Dissolve the fresh yeast in a little warm water.
Mix the flour with sugar and form a volcano in the center.
Add the yeast mixture to the flour volcano and mix well until you get a smooth dough.
Let the dough rise for 1 hour in a warm place.
Knead the dough again and shape it into a round loaf.
Let the loaf rise for another 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius and bake the bread for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Wind Fritters
steps: Mix the flour with water until a soft dough is obtained.
Add salt to the mixture.
Heat oil in a deep pan.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on paper towels to drain excess grease.

title: Spinach Salad with Strawberries and Goat Cheese
steps: Wash the spinach and place it in a bowl.
Cut the strawberries into small pieces.
Shred the goat cheese and add to the mixture.

title: Lentil Salad with Vegetables
steps: Cook the lentils according to package instructions.
Cut the carrots, onion, and celery into small pieces.
Peel the garlic and finely chop it.
In a hot skillet with a little oil, add the onion, carrots, and celery. Cook until they are tender.
Add the chopped garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked lentils with the vegetable mixture from the skillet.
Add any other desired ingredients (e.g., tomato, cucumber) and season to taste.

title: Rice Salad with Tuna and Mayonnaise
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Mix cooked rice with tuna and mayonnaise until well combined.
Serve the salad in a plate and enjoy.

title: Grilled Manchego Asadillo (Roasted Peppers)
steps: Step 1: Grill the peppers on a grill or directly over the flame until they are charred all over.
Step 2: Remove the peppers from the heat and place them in a tupper to seal the container for a few minutes.

title: Xátó (escarola, bacalao y salsa romesco)
steps: Step 1: Cook the cod until it is tender.
