Step 2: Mix the ingredients of the romesco sauce and add to the cooked cod.

title: Endive Salad with Roquefort and Nuts
steps: Wash and cut the endives.
Rasp the roquefort.
Toast the nuts.

title: Remojon Granadine (Orange and Cod)
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the oranges into small pieces.
Step 2: Soak the cod in water for 24 hours, changing the water every 6 hours.

title: Esqueixada of Cod
steps: Step 1: Soaking the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Chopping the onion and red peppers.
Step 3: Breaking down the soaked cod.
Step 4: Mixing all ingredients in a bowl.

title: Tzatziki (cucumber and yogurt salad)
steps: Chop the bell peppers and garlic finely.
Grate the cucumber and mix with yogurt.
Add the chopped bell peppers and garlic to the yogurt-cucumber mixture.
Mix well all ingredients.

title: Salad of Beet and Apple
steps: Peel and grate the beet and carrot.
Cut the apple into small pieces.
Wash the spinach and dry it.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add olive oil to taste and mix well.

title: Potatoes duquesa
steps: Peel and mash the potatoes until you get a smooth puree.
Add corn flour to the potato puree and mix well.
Shape the potatoes duquesa with your hands or with a special mold.
Fry the potatoes duquesa in hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.
Drain over paper towels and serve hot.

title: Potatoes (deluxe) in the oven
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Wash and dry the potatoes. Cut into wedges.
Place the potato wedges in a large bowl, add olive oil and mix so they are well coated.
Spread the potato wedges over a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.

title: Sauerkraut (fermented cabbage)
steps: Step 1: Cut the cabbage into small pieces.
Step 2: Add salt and vinegar to the cabbage pieces. Mix well.
Step 3: Let it rest for at least an hour before serving.

title: Puré de calabaza
steps: Cook the pumpkin until it's smooth.
Pass the cooked pumpkin through a blender or food processor until you get a smooth puree.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as an accompaniment.

title: Pilaf Rice
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for a few minutes more.
Add the vegetable broth and let it simmer.
Incorporate the cooked rice into the pan and stir to combine flavors.
Cook for a few minutes until the rice is well infused with flavor.

title: Couscous with Vegetables
steps: Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Add the red peppers, carrots, and zucchini, chopped. Cook until they are tender.
Add the garlic, chopped, and cook for an additional minute.
Mix the cooked couscous with the sautéed vegetables. Season to taste.

title: Glazed Carrots
steps: Peel and cut the carrots into pieces.
In a pan, heat the sugar and honey until it melts and forms a caramel.
Add the carrots to the pan and cook until they are tender and coated in caramel.
Season with pepper to taste.

title: Broccoli with Vinaigrette
steps: Wash the broccoli and cut it into thin slices.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the broccoli and cook until tender and golden.
Remove the pan from the heat and add red wine vinegar and mustard. Mix well.
Season with salt to taste.

title: Broccoli gratin with bechamel sauce
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Cook the broccoli in water with salt until it's tender.
Make a bechamel: melt the butter, add the flour and cook for one minute. Add milk little by little, stirring constantly.
Mix the cooked broccoli with the bechamel and shredded cheese.
Put the mixture in a baking dish and gratinate in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until it's golden brown.

title: Steamed Broccoli with Garlic
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add minced garlic and sauté until golden brown.
Step 3: Add broccoli cut into pieces and sauté for a few minutes until tender.

title: Onion Gratin Soup
steps: Chop the onion into small pieces.
Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until it is soft and translucent.
Add the beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat and let the soup simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve the soup in individual bowls and sprinkle with croutons.

title: White Asparagus Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the white asparagus until it is tender.
Step 2: Add the potatoes, cut into pieces, and cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth, garlic, and pepper to taste. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Blend everything together with an immersion blender until you get a smooth and thick cream.

title: Minestrone Soup with Vegetables
steps: Cook the vegetables until they are tender.
Add lentils and rice, cook until they are cooked.
Serve hot.

title: Mushroom Cream
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add chopped onion and garlic, cook until they are soft.
Step 2: Add chopped mushrooms to the pot and cook until they release their liquid.
Step 3: Add vegetable broth and let it simmer for a few minutes. Then, add chopped parsley.
Step 4: Use a hand blender to puree the mixture until it is smooth and creamy.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy!

title: Ramen Noodle Soup (Basic Ramen)
steps: Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the lean pork and cook until browned. Add the green onion and paprika, cook for a few minutes more.
Add the chicken broth powder and 4 cups of water to the pot. Bring to a boil.
Stir the cooked noodles in the water and add to the pot. Cook for a few minutes until the noodles are well heated.
Serve the soup hot in bowls.

title: Queimada Gallega
steps: Heat the ingredients in a large pot.
Once the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is hot, but not boiling, serve it in cups or glasses.
It can be flamed with a little alcohol to give it a special touch.

title: Meringue Milk
steps: Heat the milk until it is hot but not boiling.
Whisk the milk with a mixer until a foamy layer forms on the surface.
Serve hot.

title: Orange Juice Natural
steps: Peel the oranges.
Add peeled oranges to a juicer or citrus press.
Beat until a smooth juice is obtained.
Serve immediately.

title: Bechamel Sauce Homemade
steps: Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add the flour and constantly stir until forming a roux.
Gradually add the milk while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
Continue cooking until the sauce thickens.

title: Romesco Sauce
steps: Step 1: Soak the dried Tomatoes in hot water for 20 minutes.
Step 2: Toast the Almonds until they are golden.
Step 3: Peel and finely chop the Garlic.
Step 4: In a food processor, combine the soaked Dried Tomatoes, toasted Almonds, chopped Garlic, and Dried Peppers. Process until a thick paste is obtained.
Step 5: Add Vinegar and Olive Oil to the processor and process until the sauce is smooth and well integrated.
Step 6: Taste and adjust the flavors if necessary. Serve the Romesco Sauce chilled or hot.

title: Duck in Orange Sauce
steps: 1. Preheat the oven to 200°C.
2. Wash and dry the duck, season with salt and pepper.
3. Heat a large pan over medium-high heat, add some oil and sear the duck on all sides until golden brown.
4. Remove the duck from the pan and set aside in a plate.
5. Add chopped onion to the same pan and cook until it's translucent.
6. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
7. Add orange juice, red wine vinegar, and honey to the pan, stir well to combine.
8. Return the duck to the pan, cover with the orange mixture and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Transfer the duck and orange mixture to a baking dish, cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
10. Remove the foil, increase oven temperature to 220°C and cook for another 15 minutes until the duck is golden brown.

title: Beef Round in Sauce
steps: 1. Cut the beef round into large pieces.
2. In a large pan, brown the meat over medium-high heat until it is browned on all sides.
3. Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pan and cook until they are soft.
4. Add the sweet paprika, concentrated tomato, and vinegar to the pan and stir well to combine flavors.
5. Add enough water to cover the meat and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook the meat for approximately 1 hour or until it is tender.
7. Remove the meat from the sauce and simmer it to thicken it slightly.
8. Serve the meat with the sauce on top.

title: Golden Cod (Bacalhau à Brás)
steps: Step 1: Soaking the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Peeling and chopping the potatoes and onion.
Step 3: Frying the cod, potatoes, and onion in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Rice and Vegetables
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Cut the bell peppers in half and remove the seeds.
Finely chop the onion, garlic, and carrots.
Sauté the onion, garlic, and carrots in a pan with oil until they are tender.
Add the rice and sauté for a few more minutes.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for 15 minutes.
Fill the bell peppers with the rice and vegetable mixture.
Place the bell peppers on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.

title: Pork Chops in Whiskey Sauce
steps: Season the pork chops with salt and black pepper.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil to the skillet and when it's hot, add the pork chops. Cook until they're browned on all sides.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add whiskey to the skillet and cook until it reduces by half.
Remove the pork chops from the skillet and let them rest in a plate for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the pork chops in whiskey sauce.

title: Lamb Cutlet
steps: Step 1: Season the lamb cutlet and sauté it in a pan with olive oil.
Step 2: Add rice to the same pan and cook until golden brown.
Step 3: Add enough water or beef broth to cover the ingredients, salt, and let cook at medium-low heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Beef Murcian Pastry
steps: Step 1: Sauté the sliced portobello mushrooms and onion until they are tender.
Step 2: Add the ground beef and cook until it is browned. Add the minced garlic.
Step 3: Incorporate the flour and mix well. Add the milk and let the mixture thicken.
Step 4: Beat the eggs and mix them with the beef. Add the bread crumbs and mix everything.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into a greased mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Caldero of the Mediterranean Sea (rice and fish)
steps: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until it is transparent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for one minute more.
Incorporate the diced tomatoes and let them cook for a few minutes.
Add the sweet and hot paprika to taste, stirring well.
Add the rice and stir so that it is covered with the tomato and paprika mixture.
Cover the rice with water or fish broth until it is completely submerged.
Incorporate the cut fish into large pieces, ensuring they are fully submerged in the liquid.
Bring the pot to a boil and then reduce the heat to the minimum.
Cover the pot with a fitted lid and let cook for 20 minutes without lifting the lid.
Remove from heat and let rest for another 10 minutes before serving.

title: Atascaburras (cod and potato)
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Peel and cut the potatoes into large pieces.
Step 3: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Step 4: In a pan, fry the soaked cod until it is golden brown.
Step 5: Add the cooked potatoes to the pan and stir everything together.
Step 6: Cook for a few minutes more until they are well combined.

title: Duels and Breaks (eggs, chorizo, bacon)
steps: Step 1: Cut the chorizo and bacon into small pieces.
Step 2: In a pan, fry the pieces of chorizo and bacon until golden brown. Remove them from the pan and reserve.
Step 3: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 4: Pour the beaten eggs into the same pan where the chorizo and bacon were fried. Cook until they are set.
Step 5: Add the reserved pieces of chorizo and bacon to the pan with the cooked eggs. Mix everything well.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Cod Fritter
steps: Step 1: Soaking the cod overnight.
Step 2: Draining and desalting the cod. Breaking it down into a bowl.
Step 3: Beating the eggs and adding the cod broken down.
Step 4: Mixing well until a homogeneous mass is formed.
Step 5: Heating oil in a pan and pouring the egg-cod mixture.
Step 6: Cooking at medium-low heat until the fritter is set on both sides.

title: Rape in American Sauce
steps: Step 1: cut the rape into pieces and season.
Step 2: sauté the chopped onion in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: add the chopped garlic to the pan and reheat it along with the onion.
Step 4: add the crushed tomato and sweet paprika, cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: incorporate the seasoned rape into the American sauce and cook until done.
Step 6: add vinegar to taste and adjust the seasoning.

title: Chicken Stew
steps: 1. Cut the chicken into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. In a pot, brown the chicken pieces in olive oil.
3. Add chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook until they are soft.
4. Add diced red peppers and crushed tomato. Cook for a few minutes.
5. Add red wine and reduce to half.
6. Mix in cornmeal and stir well so it combines with the wine.
7. Add water to cover the chicken pieces and cook at medium-low heat for 45 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
8. Season and serve hot.

title: Rabbit with Rice
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Sepia with Peas
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the sepia into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the peas until they are tender.
Step 3: In a pan, lightly brown the sepia with a little oil.
Step 4: Add the cooked peas and season to taste.
Step 5: Mix everything well and serve hot.

title: Meatballs of Chocolate (Sepia)
steps: Finely chop the chocolate (sepia) and mix with minced garlic.
Add eggs and breadcrumbs until a compact dough forms.
Make balls of the desired size and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.

title: Pochas in Navarran Style
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the pochas and fry until they are golden.
Step 3: Add chopped onion and cook until it is soft.
Step 4: Add chopped garlic and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Add sweet and hot smoked paprika to taste, stirring well.
Step 6: Add enough water to cover the pochas and bring to a boil.
Step 7: Cook until the pochas are soft. If necessary, add more water during cooking.
Step 8: Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Beef Stew
steps: Heat oil in a large pot.
Add beef and cook until browned.
Add chopped onion, garlic, and bell pepper and cook until softened.
Incorporate crushed tomato and lamb.
Cover with meat broth and simmer for 2 hours.
Season to taste and serve.

title: Beef Stew
steps: Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
In a pot, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until they are golden.
Add the beef pieces and fry until browned on all sides.
Add the crushed tomato, smoked paprika, laurel, and red wine. Cook over medium heat for approximately 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until the meat is tender.
Serve hot and enjoy your beef stew.

title: Pork Ribs with Honey and Mustard
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix honey and mustard in a bowl.
Season pork ribs with salt and pepper.
Place pork ribs on a baking sheet.
Brush pork ribs with honey-mustard mixture.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chicken in Coca-Cola
steps: Marinate the chicken in coca-cola for 2 hours.
Remove the chicken and mix the coca-cola with garlic, sweet paprika, and sugar.
Cook the chicken in a pan until it is golden brown on all sides.
Add the coca-cola mixture to the pan and cook until reduced.
Serve the chicken with the reduced sauce.

title: Spinach Omelette
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion in a pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the chopped spinach and cook until it's soft.
Step 3: Beat the eggs and add the spinach and sautéed onion, mix well.
Step 4: Pour the mixture into an anti-stick pan that's hot and let it cook until it's set on both sides.

title: Fried Eggs with Potatoes and Peppers
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into small pieces.
Heat oil in a pan and sauté the peppers until they are tender.
Add the potatoes to the pan and cook until they are golden brown on all sides.
Remove the potatoes from the pan and reserve.
Add a little more oil to the pan if necessary and fry the eggs until they are cooked to your liking.
Serve the eggs accompanied by fried potatoes.

title: Lamb in Galician Style (smoked paprika and olive oil)
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the lamb and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Step 3: Add water to cover the lamb, then add smoked paprika.
Step 4: Cook at medium-low heat for about two hours or until the lamb is tender.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Stuffed Squid with Meat
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the squid into rings.
Step 2: Mix the ground meat with minced garlic and parsley.
Step 3: Stuff each squid ring with the meat mixture.
Step 4: Coat the stuffed squid with breadcrumbs.
Step 5: Fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Spaghetti with Clams (Vongole)
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Step 2: In a large pan, sauté garlic in olive oil over medium heat.
Step 3: Add clams and cook until they open. Remove clams from the pan and reserve the cooking liquid.
Step 4: Add cooked spaghetti to the pan with the clam cooking liquid. Mix well.
Step 5: Add parsley chopped and serve hot.

title: Vegetable Pizza
steps: Preheat the oven to 220 degrees Celsius.
Stretch the pizza dough in a pizza mold.
Add tomato sauce over the dough and spread it evenly.
Cut the vegetables into small pieces and distribute them over the sauce.
Rake mozzarella cheese over the vegetables.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the pizza is golden brown and crispy.

title: Chicken Burger
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Place the chicken in a burger and add lettuce, tomato, and onion.

title: Mushroom Cachopo
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a shallow dish.
Step 3: Dip the mushrooms in the beaten eggs and then in the bread crumbs.
Step 4: Fry in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown on both sides.

title: Tallarines Three Delights
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is golden.
Step 2: Add the carrots and cook them until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the pasta and cook it until it is al dente.

title: Fried Fish Variado
steps: Step 1: Dry the fish with paper towels.
Step 2: Mix the flour with salt and pepper in a shallow dish.
Step 3: Coat the fish pieces evenly with the flour mixture.
Step 4: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Step 5: Add the fish pieces to the skillet and fry until golden brown and crispy. Remove from heat.
Step 6: Serve hot with lemon and a green salad.

title: Grilled Chicken Breast
steps: Preheat the grill or non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper to taste.
Add oil to the hot grill and place the chicken breasts.
Cook for approximately 6 minutes per side or until cooked through.
Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Pork Chops
steps: 1. Season the pork with salt and pepper.
2. Cook the pork in a hot skillet or grill until it is well done.

title: Lamb Cutlets with Cheese
steps: Step 1: Cut the lamb into thin cutlets.
Step 2: Place a layer of cheese on each cutlet and roll them up.

title: Canelones of Foie
steps: Cook the Cannelone Pasta according to package instructions.
Salt and sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Fill the canelones with cooked foie gras.
Cover the canelones with bechamel sauce and bake at high temperature for 15 minutes.

title: Fried Ortigas
steps: Wash the ortigas and dry them.
Pass them through flour and fry in hot oil.

title: Manchego cheese in oil
steps: Cut the manchego cheese into cubes.
Add the cube of cheese to a glass jar.
Cover the cheese with oil until it is completely submerged.
Cover the jar and let macerate for at least 24 hours in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Mojama with Almonds
steps: Step 1: Cut the mojama into thin slices.
Step 2: Peel and chop the almonds.
Step 3: Arrange the mojama slices on a plate.
Step 4: Sprinkle the chopped almonds over the mojama.
Step 5: Serve immediately.

title: Codornis Egg with Ham
steps: Step 1: Beat the codornis eggs in a bowl.
Step 2: Heat an anti-stick pan over medium heat and add the beaten eggs.
Step 3: Cook until they are set but still moist.
Step 4: Remove from heat and add diced ham.
Step 5: Mix well and serve hot.

title: Avocado and Smoked Salmon Toast
steps: Step 1: Cut the avocado into slices and place it on top of toasted bread.
Step 2: Add smoked salmon on top of the avocado.

title: Ham Serrano Tacos
steps: Slice the ham serrano into thin strips.
Warm the corn tortillas in a pan without oil.
Place the ham serrano strips on top of each tortilla and fold the tortilla in half.
Serve the tacos hot with your preferred accompaniment.

title: Marinated Olives
steps: Chop the garlic and mix it with the sweet smoked paprika.
Add the olives to the garlic and paprika mixture.

title: Crispy Cádiz Pork Rinds
steps: Cut the pork fat into small pieces.
Fry the minced egg in oil until golden brown.
Add the pork fat pieces and fry until crispy.
Sprinkle with sweet smoked paprika at the end of the frying process.

title: Torrenitos of Soria
steps: Cut the pancetta into small pieces.
Fry the pancetta pieces until they are golden and crispy.
Add the chopped egg and sweet smoked paprika to the pan, stirring constantly until fragrant.
Add vinegar and let it reduce until the sauce thickens.
Serve hot

title: Flamenquines cordobeses
steps: Cuts the pork meat into thin slices.
Seasons the slices with salt and pepper.
Passes the slices through beaten egg and then through breadcrumbs.
Fries in hot oil until golden brown.
Adds garlic and white wine during frying.

title: Wedding (Anchovies and Boquerones)
steps: Step 1: Clean and fillet the anchovies and boquerones.
Step 2: Serve them on a plate with a lemon garnish.

title: Gildas (Pinch)
steps: Stick a green pepper with a hollow olive and an anchovy.
Repeat until desired number of pinches are achieved.

title: Fried Eggplant with Honey
steps: Cut the eggplant into thick slices.
Dip the slices in beaten egg and then flour.
Fry them in hot olive oil until golden brown. Remove from heat and place on paper towels to drain excess fat.
Heat the honey in a saucepan over low heat for 2 minutes.
Dip the fried eggplant slices in the hot honey and serve.

title: Artichokes with Ham
steps: Step 1: Clean the artichokes and cut them into quarters.
Step 2: Cook the artichokes in water with salt until they are tender.

title: Toledo Chickpea Fritters
steps: Mix chickpea flour with water until a homogeneous dough is obtained.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cook the fritters in an anti-stick pan without oil for about 5 minutes per side.

title: Potatoes Alioli
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Peel the garlics and blend with olive oil until you get an alioli.

title: Goat Cheese Fried
steps: Cut the goat cheese into slices
Fry the slices in a pan with oil until they are golden brown on both sides

title: Potato and Meat Bites
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Mussels Pâté
steps: Step 1: Cook the mussels until they open.
Step 2: Mix the mussels with garlic and chopped parsley.

title: Chicken Fingers Homemade
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and season with salt and pepper.
Pass the chicken strips through flour, beaten egg, and breadcrumbs.
Fry the chicken fingers in hot oil until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain excess oil over kitchen paper before serving.

title: Goxua
steps: Step 1: Mix milk, eggs, and flour.
Step 2: Add sugar and bake.

title: Intxaursalsa (walnut cream)
steps: Step 1: Beat the walnuts with milk until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Step 2: Add sugar and cinnamon, mix well and refrigerate before serving.

title: Fartons (for horchata)
steps: Dissolve the yeast in warm water.
Add flour gradually until forming a homogeneous dough.
Let it rise for an hour.
Form balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Casadielles (hajerdre of walnuts)
steps: Step 1: Mix flour, sugar, and butter until a dough forms.
Step 2: Add chopped walnuts to the dough.
Step 3: Roll out the dough and cut it into casadielles shapes.
Step 4: Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Cookie Cake with Mocha
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Add the milk cream and sugar to the melted chocolate.
Mix until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Let the mixture cool for a few minutes.
Place the cookies on a baking sheet, covering the bottom completely.
Pour the chocolate mixture over the cookies and distribute it evenly.
Cover the cake with transparent film and let it cool in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Piononos of Santa Fe
steps: Step 1: Mix flour, sugar, and butter until a dough forms.
Step 2: Add eggs and milk. Mix well until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.

title: Hojaldres de Astorga
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with water to form a dough.
Step 2: Add butter to the dough and knead until you get an uniform mixture.
Step 3: Spread the dough on a floured surface and cut it into hojaldre shapes.
Step 4: Bake the hojaldres at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until they are golden brown.

title: Lemon Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the eggs and sugar until well combined.
Add lemon zest and lemon juice.
Incorporate flour and chemical yeast, mixing carefully until a smooth dough forms.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown on top and a skewer inserted comes out clean.

title: Spanish Omelets from Murcia
steps: Mix eggs and sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Add flour gradually while continuing to mix.
Add orange juice and mix well.
Heat a pan with oil and pour the mixture to form omelets.
Once golden, remove them from the pan and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Peaches in Syrup
steps: Peel the peaches and cut them into pieces.
In a pot, bring the water to a boil. Add the peaches and simmer until they are tender.
Remove the peaches from the heat and let them cool before serving.

title: Cheese with Quince
steps: Step 1: Cut the cheese into slices.
Step 2: Peel and cut the quince into pieces.

title: Madrid-Style Bartolillos
steps: Step 1: Spread the bartolillo dough on a flour-dusted surface.
Step 2: Cut the dough into circles of the desired size.
Step 3: Fill each circle with cream pudding and seal to form the bartolillos.
Step 4: Fry the bartolillos in hot oil until golden brown.
Step 5: Remove the bartolillos from heat and drain on paper towels.

title: Coca de San Juan (fruit glazed)
steps: Mix the flour, sugar, and chemical yeast.
Add eggs and water to form a dough.
Stretch the dough in a rectangular mold.
Decorate with glazed fruit.
Bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Almond Cookies
steps: Chop the almonds into small pieces.
Mix the sugar with the rice flour until a uniform mixture is formed.
Add the chopped almonds to the mixture and mix well.
Form small balls with the mixture and place them on a baking sheet.

title: Suspiros de amante
steps: Beat the eggs and sugar until they are light and fluffy.
Add flour gradually, mixing well.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil.
Take them out of the oil and let them cool before sprinkling them with granulated sugar.

title: Coleslaw with Anchovies
steps: Wash the coleslaw and cut it into pieces
Place the coleslaw in a salad plate
Add anchovies

title: Pasta Salad with Pesto
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
Mix the cooked pasta with pesto in a large bowl.
Add cherry tomatoes halved and green leaves.
Mix everything carefully so that ingredients are well combined.

title: Burrata and Dry Tomato Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the burrata into pieces.
Step 2: Mix with dry tomato and season to taste.

title: Rutabaga Salad, Parmesan and Nuts
steps: Wash and dry the rúcula.
Toast the nuts in a pan without oil until they are golden.
Grate the parmesan cheese.
In a bowl, mix the rúcula, toasted nuts, and grated parmesan cheese.

title: Octopus and Potato Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes and octopus separately.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients in a bowl.
Step 3: Add olive oil, vinegar, and salt to taste.

title: Moje Manchego (Tomato and Tuna)
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Mix the tuna with the tomatoes.

title: Turkey and Apple Salad
steps: Cut the turkey into small pieces.
Peel and cut the apples into small pieces.
Wash the lettuce and cut it into small pieces.
Peel and slice the carrots.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Surimi and Pineapple Salad
steps: Cut the surimi into small pieces and the pineapple into medium-sized pieces.
Mix both ingredients in a large bowl.
Add your preferred dressing and mix everything until the ingredients are well coated.
Serve immediately.

title: Tomato and North Sea Bonito Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes into pieces and place them on a plate.
Step 2: Add smoked North Sea bonito to the plate with the tomatoes.
Step 3: Add olive oil, salt, and pepper to taste. Mix well.

title: Chinese Salad (Lettuce, Ham, White Sauce)
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the lettuce.
Step 2: Cut the ham into thin strips.

title: Potatoes Revolconas
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Drain the potatoes and mash them with a fork.
Add the minced garlic, sweet smoked paprika, and parsley to the mashed potatoes.
Mix everything well and serve hot.

title: Garlic Rice
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add rice and stir until it is lightly browned.
Step 3: Add water and salt to taste, then cook on medium heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Ratatouille
steps: Step 1: Cut the eggplant, zucchini, and red peppers into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until it is transparent.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomatoes and the cut vegetables. Cook until they are tender.

title: Steamed Greens
steps: Step 1: Wash the greens and cut them into small pieces.
Step 2: Heat the olive oil in a large pan.
Step 3: Add the greens to the pan and sauté for a few minutes until they are tender.

title: Lamb Cutlet with Apple
steps: Step 1: Cut the lamb cutlet into thin strips.
Step 2: Peel and chop the apples.

title: Puré de castañas
steps: Peel and cook the chestnuts until they are soft.
Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Mix the cooked chestnuts with the cooked potatoes and mash them until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Add milk little by little while stirring the mixture until the desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot.

title: Caramelized Onion
steps: Peel and chop the onion into small pieces.
Heat a pan with a little oil over medium heat.
Add the onion to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until it's soft and golden.
If you want to sweeten the onion more, add a little sugar or honey towards the end of cooking.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Potatoes with Parchment
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into thin strips.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan.
Add the potatoes and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess oil.

title: Fried Tomato at Home
steps: Heat the oil in a pan.
Add the ripe tomatoes and fry until they are soft.
Remove the tomatoes from the pan and reserve.

title: Trigueros with bacon
steps: Cook the bacon until it is crispy.
Add the trigueros and cook until they are tender.

title: Ajoblanco
steps: Peel the eggs and put them in a mortar with hard bread soaked in water.
Add olive oil little by little while mashing everything until you get a paste.
Add water until you achieve the desired consistency. Season to taste.

title: Beef Stew with Noodles
steps: Step 1: Place the beef, pork leg, and lamb shanks in a large pot. Add enough water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Step 2: Add the onion, garlic, carrot, celery, and parsnip to the pot. Let cook for several hours until the meat is tender.
Step 3: Remove the meat from the pot and set aside. Strain the broth and return it to the pot. Add the potatoes cut into pieces and cook until they are soft.
Step 4: Return the meat to the pot and add the noodles. Cook until the noodles are al dente.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Cream of Peas
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot. Add the chopped onion and cook until it's soft.
Step 2: Add the diced potatoes and peas to the pot. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil until the potatoes are tender.
Step 3: Using an immersion blender, blend all the ingredients until smooth. If necessary, add more broth to achieve the desired consistency.
Step 4: Serve hot and enjoy your delicious Cream of Peas.

title: Porra Antequiana
steps: Mix the flour with water until a thick dough forms.
Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Pour the flour-water mixture into the pan and cook over medium heat until the porra is golden brown.

title: Seafood Bisque
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, celery, and garlic until golden.
Step 2: Add seafood and cook until pink.
Step 3: Add tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add white wine and reduce.
Step 5: Add fish stock and simmer for 20 minutes.
Step 6: Blend the mixture to obtain a cream.

detailedIngredients.name: seafood (better if it's a mix of shrimp and mussels)

title: Valencia Water
steps: Squeeze the oranges and lemons.
Mix the orange and lemon juice with sugar until it dissolves.
Add vodka and cava to the mixture.
Stir well to mix all ingredients.

title: Rebujito
steps: 1. Mix rum and lemonade in a cocktail shaker with ice.
2. Shake well for a few seconds.
3. Strain the mixture into a tall glass filled with ice.

title: Asian Coffee
steps: Grind the coffee beans.
Place the ground coffee in a coffee filter.
Pour hot water over the coffee and wait until it has filtered completely.

title: Spicy Sauce
steps: Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Add the minced garlic and sauté until golden.
Add the tomato, diced, and cook for a few minutes.
Incorporate the sweet paprika and stir well.
Add vinegar and let the sauce reduce for a few more minutes.

title: Mojo picón
steps: Step 1: Grill the red peppers on a grill until they are slightly charred.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 3: Add the grilled peppers, chopped garlic, red wine vinegar, and olive oil to a food processor and blend until smooth.

title: Rice in the oven Valencian
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
In a suitable baking dish, mix the rice with whole tomatoes, peeled but not halved garlic, sweet smoked paprika, and extra virgin olive oil.
Bake for about 45 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the tomato has lost its skin.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.

title: Fried Noodles
steps: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
In a pot, sauté the onion, potatoes, and garlic in hot oil until they are golden brown.
Add pork to the pot and cook until it is well done.
Add chicken broth to the pot and let it simmer for a few minutes.
Add cooked noodles to the pot and mix everything together with soy sauce.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Duck and Foie Gras Canelones
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Lasagna with Vegetables
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Cut the eggplant into thin slices and sauté them in a pan with a little oil until they are golden brown. Reserve.
Do the same with the broccoli, cutting it into florets and sautéing it in the same pan that was used for the eggplant.
In a bowl, mix the crushed tomato with a little oregano and salt.
Assemble the lasagna in a baking dish. First put a layer of lasagna pasta, then a layer of eggplant, another of broccoli, another of red bell pepper, and finally a layer of crushed tomato.
Repeat the process until you finish with the lasagna pasta. Sprinkle mozzarella and parmesan cheese on top.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.

title: Chicken in Old Mustard Sauce
steps: Step 1: Marinate the chicken with old mustard sauce and garlic for at least one hour.
Step 2: Cook the chicken in a hot pan until it is golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add black pepper to taste.

title: Roast Turkey with Vegetables
steps: Cut the turkey into pieces and season.
Brown the turkey pieces in a pot with a little oil until they are golden brown. Remove the turkey from the pot and reserve.
In the same pot, sauté the chopped onion, garlic, carrot, and celery until they are tender.
Add the chopped tomato to the mixture and cook for a few minutes until the tomatoes soften.
Add the browned turkey to the pot. Add enough beef broth to cover the turkey and vegetables.
Add cornmeal and stir well to avoid lumps.
Cover the pot with a lid and let the stew simmer over medium heat for 45 minutes or until the turkey is tender.
Serve hot.

title: Pan-Seared Trout with Molinera Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add the trout fillets and cook for a few minutes until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and fresh parsley to the skillet.
Step 4: Pour white wine into the skillet and let it reduce.
Step 5: Squeeze lemon juice over the trout fillets and serve hot.

title: Calamari in its Ink (Classic)
steps: Clean the calamari and separate the tentacles from the body.
Cut the tentacles into small pieces.
Mix the squid ink with a little water and simmer for a few minutes.
Add the calamari pieces to the ink mixture and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Pork Chop with Green Pepper
steps: Season the pork chop with green pepper and salt.
Heat a pan with oil and add the pork chop. Cook until it is browned on all sides.
Remove the pork chop from the pan and reserve.

title: Rice with Ilicitan Crust
steps: Step 1: Sauté the minced garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the rice and cook until it is transparent.
Step 3: Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the sweet paprika and stir well.
Step 5: Add the beef broth gradually, while cooking the rice.
Step 6: Once the rice is cooked, let it rest covered for a few minutes.
Step 7: Finish the recipe with a crispy crust in a pan.

title: Ray with Smoked Paprika
steps: Step 1: Clean the ray and cut it into pieces.
Step 2: In a pan with olive oil, sauté the minced garlic.
Step 3: Add the pieces of ray and fry until they are golden brown.
Step 4: Sprinkle with smoked sweet paprika and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Fish Stew
steps: Step 1: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until they are golden.
Step 2: Add the diced tomato and bell pepper and cook until they release their vegetable water.
Step 3: Add the fish cut into large pieces, vinegar, smoked paprika, and laurel leaves. Cover with water and simmer over medium heat for about 20 minutes.
Step 4: Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Yakisoba with Vegetables and Chicken
steps: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
Sauté the chicken until it is browned and cooked. Add the vegetables and cook until they are tender.
Add the yakisoba sauce to the wok and mix with the chicken and vegetables. Add the cooked noodles and mix everything well.
Serve hot and enjoy your Yakisoba with Vegetables and Chicken.

title: Omelette with Garlic Shrimp and Potatoes
steps: Finely chop the garlic and sauté it in a pan with olive oil.
Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink.
Beat the eggs in a bowl, add salt to taste and mix with the garlic and shrimp mixture.
Pour the mixture into a non-stick pan that is hot and cook until it is set on both sides.

title: Eggs in Flamenca Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a pan and add the minced garlic.
Step 2: Add the red peppers cut into pieces and sauté until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the tomatoes chopped and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Make a hole in the center of the pan and crack the eggs directly into it.
Step 5: Cover the pan with a lid or aluminum foil and let the eggs cook until they are to your liking.

title: Cod with Vizcaian Sauce
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for at least 24 hours to remove salt.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the chopped red peppers and tomato puree to the pot.
Step 4: Cook everything for a few minutes until it's tender.
Step 5: Add the soaked and flaked cod to the vegetable mixture.
Step 6: Cook on low-medium heat for 10-15 minutes, adding water if necessary.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Omelette
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Mix the beaten eggs with the cooked potatoes and season to taste.
Fill the bell peppers with the potato and egg mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Hawaiian Pizza (Ham and Pineapple)
steps: Preheat the oven to 230 degrees Celsius.
Stretch the pizza dough in a pizza mold and add the tomato sauce.
Add mozzarella cheese, cooked ham, and pineapple.
Bake for approximately 15 minutes or until the pizza is golden brown.

title: Grilled Snails in Spanish-Style Sauce
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in a pan with olive oil.
Step 2: Add the red peppers cut into small pieces and cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Incorporate the snails cut into pieces, season them, and brown them on all sides.
Step 4: Add the raked tomato and let everything cook together for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious Spanish-style sauce with the snails.

title: Rabbit with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces and season.
Step 2: Sauté garlic in olive oil until golden.
Step 3: Add rabbit pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Step 4: Add tomatoes and let sauce thicken.
Step 5: Add chopped parsley and serve.

title: Pork Ribs Marinated Fried
steps: Mix the sweet and hot smoked paprika, garlic, and white vinegar to make a marinade.
Fry the pork ribs in a pan until they are golden brown.
Add the marinade to the pan with the pork ribs and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Pork with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the pork loin into small pieces.
Step 2: Fry the pork pieces in a pan with olive oil until they are golden brown.

title: Cod with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the cod into small pieces.
Step 2: Sear the cod pieces in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: Add chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook until they are tender.
Step 4: Add salt, pepper, and cinnamon to taste.
Step 5: Cook for a few more minutes until the cod is cooked through.

title: Fried Salmonettes
steps: Step 1: Season the salmonettes with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Coat the salmonettes in cornmeal until they are completely covered.
Step 3: Fry the salmonettes in a pan with hot oil for about 5 minutes on each side or until they are golden brown and crispy.

title: Fried Boquerones
steps: Step 1: Season the boquerones with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Coat the boquerones in flour.
Step 3: Fry the boquerones in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Grilled Mero
steps: Clean the mero and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and wait until it's hot.
Add the mero to the pan and cook for about 4 minutes on each side or until it's well cooked.

title: Filet in Russian Sauce
steps: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic until they are golden.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Incorporate the sweet paprika and vinegar, mix well.
Add the filet of beef cut into pieces and cook at medium heat until it is done.

title: Fish Meatballs
steps: Step 1: Mix the fish, eggs, and breadcrumbs.
Step 2: Make meatballs with the mixture.

title: Stuffed Eggplants with Tuna
steps: Cut the eggplant in half and scoop out the pulp.
Mix the tuna with the eggplant pulp.
Fill the eggplant halves with the mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Spaghetti with Squid Ink and Shrimp
steps: Cook the spaghetti in squid ink according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat olive oil and add the shrimp. Cook until they are pink.
Add cooked spaghetti to the pan with the shrimp and mix well.
Serve hot.

title: Gnocchi with Four Cheeses
steps: Cook the gnocchi according to package instructions.
Melt the butter in a pan and add cooked gnocchi.
Add parmesan, mozzarella, and gorgonzola cheese to the pan and stir until melted and creamy.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Ravioli with Meat and Tomato
steps: Cook the ground meat until it is well cooked. Remove from heat and reserve.
Prepare the ravioli pasta according to package instructions.
Fill the ravioli with the ground meat.
Cook the tomatoes in a sauce until they are soft.
Cook the stuffed ravioli in boiling water for a few minutes.
Serve the ravioli hot with tomato sauce on top.

title: Club Sandwich
steps: Cut the bread loaf in half.
Place a layer of lean pork belly on one half of the bread.
Add a layer of cheese on top of the meat.
Add lettuce leaves and tomato slices over the cheese.
Cover with the other half of the bread.

title: Eggs Benedict
steps: Cook the eggs in boiling water for 3 minutes.
Toast the brioche bread.

title: Pork Tacos
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork.
Step 2: Warm the corn tortillas.
Step 3: Chop the onion, garlic, and cilantro.
Step 4: Cut the bell pepper into small pieces.
Step 5: Assemble the tacos with the pork, onion, garlic, cilantro, and bell pepper.

title: Toasted Morcilla and Pine Nut Dish
steps: Step 1: Slice the morcilla into thin slices.
Step 2: Toast the bread and place the morcilla slices on top of each slice.
Step 3: Sprinkle pine nuts over the morcilla and serve hot.

title: Brie Cheese Empanaded with Jam
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with a little water to make a dough.
Step 2: Cover the brie cheese with the prepared dough.
Step 3: Dip the cheese empanada pieces in beaten egg and fry them in hot oil until golden brown.
Step 4: Serve the cheese empanada hot accompanied by jam.

title: Nachos with ground meat and cheese
steps: Cook the ground meat until it is well done.
Mix the ground meat with shredded cheese and place over the nachos.
Heat in the oven for a few minutes until the cheese is melted.

title: Chips of Artichoke
steps: Peel the artichokes and cut them into thin slices.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the artichoke slices to the pan and fry until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove the chips of artichoke from the pan with a slotted spoon and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot.

title: Hojaldre Pastry with Asparagus and Ham
steps: Roll out the pastry dough and cut it into rectangles.
Place cooked asparagus on top of the pastry, along with ham serrano.
Close the pastry around the filling and brush with beaten egg.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Canapápes variados de salmǳn y paté
steps: Step 1: Prepare the salmon canapés...
Step 2: Prepare the paté canapés...

title: Salmon Tartar with Mango
steps: Step 1: Cut the salmon and mango into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients.

title: Carpaccio of Zucchini and Parmesan
steps: Finely chop the zucchini with a vegetable peeler or mandoline.
Arrange on individual plates in a circular shape.
Shred parmesan over the zucchini.
Dress with olive oil and salt to taste.

title: Mussels Tiger (Stuffed and Fried)
steps: Step 1: Open the mussels and separate the meat from the shells.
Step 2: In a bowl, mix the mussel meat with minced garlic and fresh parsley.
Step 3: Add lemon juice and breadcrumbs to the previous mixture. Mix well.
Step 4: Stuff the mussel shells with the prepared mixture.
Step 5: Coat the stuffed mussels with breadcrumbs and fry in a hot pan with oil until golden brown.

title: Fritter with Mushrooms and Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Cook the mushrooms until they are tender.
Step 2: Mix the cooked mushrooms with the shrimp and other ingredients.

title: Shrimp Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the shrimp and let them cool.
Step 2: Chop the onion and bell peppers.
Step 3: Mix the shrimp, onion, bell peppers, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Step 4: Serve the salad cold.

title: Baby Onions in Garlic Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add whole baby onions and fry until golden brown.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Eggs Mimosa (Filled with Yolk and Mayonnaise)
steps: Cook the eggs until they are almost set.
Separate the egg yolks from the whites and reserve the yolks.
Mix the yolks with mayonnaise to obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Fill each cooked egg with the yolk and mayonnaise mixture.

title: Cheese Fondue (Savoyarde)
steps: Melt the cheese in a pan with white wine.
Serve hot with bread pieces.

title: Crystal Bread with Tomato and Olive Oil
steps: Cut the crystal bread into slices.
Rub the slices with fresh tomato and olive oil.

title: Duck Rillettes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Season the duck with salt and pepper.

title: Foie Gras Mousse Homemade
steps: Step 1: Freeze the duck liver for 2 hours.
Step 2: Cook at low temperature in a preheated oven at 65°C during 45 minutes.

title: Mushroom Empanadas with Alioli
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and finely chop them.
Step 2: Mix flour with water to make a dough.
Step 3: Knead the dough until it reaches a smooth texture.
Step 4: Add chopped garlic to the dough.
Step 5: Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.
Step 6: For the alioli, mix minced garlic with olive oil until you get a smooth paste.

title: Langoustines in Whiskey
steps: Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add the langoustines and sauté them until they are pink.
Add the whiskey and cook until it has reduced to half.
Serve hot.

title: Brochettes of Watermelon with Ham
steps: Cut the watermelon into small pieces.
Thread the watermelon and ham pieces onto skewers for brochettes.

title: Sacher Torte
steps: Melt the bitter chocolate along with the butter in a bain-marie.
Add the sugar and eggs, mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Incorporate the flour and mix well.
Pour the dough into a greased mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 40 minutes.

title: Homemade Chocolate Truffles
steps: Melt the black chocolate along with the unsalted butter in a saucepan over low heat.
Once melted, remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes.
Using a spoon or small pastry bag, shape chocolate balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate the truffles for at least 30 minutes before serving.

title: Chocolate Rocks and Almonds
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Mix the melted chocolate with the chopped almonds.
Form balls with the mixture and let cool.

title: Spoon Buns from Alpujarra
steps: Step 1: Mix flour with water until a dough forms.
Step 2: Add sugar to the mixture and knead for a few minutes.

title: Almond Macarons
steps: Step 1: In a rectangular mold, mix the ground almonds with sugar until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Step 2: With your hands in a ball shape, take portions of the dough and shape them into circles. Place the macarons on a baking sheet.
Step 3: Bake at medium-low temperature (150°C) for about 20 minutes or until they are golden brown.

title: Homemade Polvorones
steps: Mix the flour with the glazed sugar.
Add the butter and mix until a homogeneous dough is obtained.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Crunchy Chocolate Turrón
steps: Melt the butter in a medium-sized pan over medium heat.
Add black chocolate chopped and stir until it's completely melted.
Remove from heat and incorporate rice flour, mixing well.
Pour the mixture into a rectangular mold and level it with a spatula.
Let it cool at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: King's Wreath
steps: Dissolve the yeast in a little warm water with a pinch of sugar.
Mix the flour with the rest of the sugar, eggs, and butter until you get a soft dough.
Add the dissolved yeast and knead for a few minutes.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for about two hours.
Prepare the dough to shape the wreath, and let it rise again for half an hour.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes or until golden brown.

detailedIngredients.quantity: the peel and juice of 1 unit

title: Homemade Magdalenas from the Countryside
steps: Mix the eggs with sugar until a light, airy mixture is obtained.
Add flour and chemical yeast, mixing well.
Gradually add water while continuing to mix.
Fill magdalena molds with the obtained dough.
Bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Orange Cake
steps: Mix eggs with sugar until foamy.
Add flour and baking powder, mix well.
Add orange juice and mix until no lumps remain.
Add melted butter and mix until well incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 30 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat.
Mix the flour with the chemical yeast.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and add sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Add the flour mixture to the egg and sugar mixture.
Incorporate the melted butter into the previous mixture.
Place pineapple slices in a tart mold.
Pour the mixture over the pineapple slices.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Turrón Mousse
steps: Mix the rolled turrón with whipped cream until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Unmold and serve.

title: Mango Sorbet
steps: Freeze the mangoes peeled and chopped for at least 2 hours.
Process the frozen mangoes with sugar until a smooth texture is achieved.
Add water gradually while continuing to process until the desired consistency is reached.
Serve Immediately

title: Crepes Suzette (orange)
steps: Beat the eggs and milk together.
Add flour gradually until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Let the mixture rest for 30 minutes.
Cook the crepes in a pan greased with butter.

title: Cup of Chocolate and Cream (Homemade Dalky)
steps: Melt the chocolate using a bain-marie.
Whip the cream and mix it with the melted chocolate.
Pour the mixture into individual cups and let it cool before serving.

title: Cannonball Salad with Bacon and Goat Cheese
steps: Step 1: Wash and drain the cannonballs.
Step 2: Cut the bacon into small pieces and fry until crispy. Drain on paper towels to remove excess fat.
Step 3: Cut the goat cheese into small portions.
Step 4: Mix the cannonballs, bacon, and goat cheese in a bowl. Add your preferred vinaigrette and serve.

title: Potato Salad (German Potato Salad, No Mayo)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Peel them and cut them into pieces.
Mix the potatoes with chopped onion, fresh parsley, vinegar, and oil.

title: Niçoise Salad (green beans, egg, anchovies)
steps: Step 1: Cook the green beans until they are tender.
Step 2: Cut the cooked eggs into slices.
Step 3: Mix the green beans, eggs, and anchovies in a plate.

title: Chicken Curry Salad
steps: Cook the chicken until it is browned and cooked.
Add the carrots and garlic to the pan with the chicken.
Add the coconut milk and curry powder. Cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken curry salad hot or cold.

title: Avocado and Shrimp Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the avocado into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the shrimp until they are well done.
Step 3: Mix the avocado and shrimp in a bowl.

title: Tomato Salad with Laminated Garlic
steps: Peel the garlic and finely chop it.
Wash the tomatoes and cut them into pieces.
Mix the tomatoes with the laminated garlic in a bowl.
Serve the salad chilled.

title: Lentil Salad with Rice
steps: Cook rice and lentils separately according to package instructions.
Finely chop the onion, garlic, and red bell pepper.
Peel and chop the carrots into small pieces.
In a hot pan with oil, sauté the onion, garlic, and red bell pepper until they are golden.
Add the carrots to the pan and cook for a few minutes more.
Mix cooked rice, cooked lentils, vegetable mixture, and a little oil in a large bowl. Mix well.
Serve hot or cold.

title: Shrimp and Squid Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the squid and shrimp.
Step 2: Mix with lettuce and dress with olive oil.

title: Salad with Feta Cheese and Sandia
steps: Cut the lettuce into pieces.
Peel it and cut the sandia into cubes.
Rake the feta cheese over the salad.

title: Curry Rice
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic.
Add the carrot and zucchini, cut into dice, and cook until tender.
Add curry powder and stir well.
Add crushed tomatoes and let them simmer over low heat for a few minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Once boiling, add cooked rice and mix everything well.
Let the rice absorb the liquid and serve hot.

title: Hasselback Potatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 220°C.
Wash and peel the potatoes. Cut them into thin slices without reaching the end so they stay united.
Place the potatoes in a baking dish, drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.

title: Brussels Sprouts with Ham
steps: Step 1: Cook the Brussels sprouts in steam until they are tender.
Step 2: In a hot pan, add the ham and cook until it is golden.
Step 3: Add the cooked Brussels sprouts to the pan with the ham and mix everything together.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Roasted Pumpkin with Spices
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and place them in a bowl.
Add olive oil, sweet paprika, ground cinnamon, and salt to the bowl. Mix until the pumpkin is well coated with the spices.
Place the pumpkin pieces on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until they are tender.

title: Carrots with Moroccan Spices (Stir-Fried)
steps: Peel and cut the carrots into slices.
Cook the carrots until they are tender.
Stir-fry with olive oil, salt, and black pepper.

title: Roasted Bell Peppers in Strips
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Wash and dry the bell peppers. Cut them into strips.
Place them in a bowl, add olive oil and mix so they are well coated.
Arrange the pepper strips on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until tender.

title: Sanfaina (fried vegetables)
steps: Step 1: Cut the onion, bell peppers, and zucchini into large pieces.
Step 2: Heat oil in a large skillet and add the vegetables.
Step 3: Cook at medium heat until they are soft and golden brown.

title: Puré de guisantes
steps: Step 1: Cook the peas until they are tender.
Step 2: Strain the peas and puree them until you get a smooth paste.
Step 3: Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Mushrooms in Green Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add the mushrooms and cook until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 4: Add the vinegar and let it reduce.
Step 5: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Yuca Boiled with Mojo
steps: Peel the yuca and cut it into pieces.
Cook the yuca until it is tender.
Mash the garlic with sweet paprika and vinegar.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and add the garlic-paprika mixture.
Add the boiled yuca to the pan and stir so that it absorbs the mojo.

title: Rice and Fish Soup
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice until it is smooth.
Step 2: Add the fish and cook until it is well done.

title: Cream of Nécoras
steps: Cook the nécoras in boiling water for a few minutes.
Peel the nécoras and reserve the broth.
Chop the pumpkin and potato and sauté them in a pot with a little oil.
Add the peeled nécoras to the pot and cook everything together for a few minutes.
Add the reserved broth and let it simmer everything for a few more minutes.
Blend the mixture until you get a smooth cream.

title: Miso Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the miso, ginger, onion, garlic, and pumpkin to the pot.
Step 3: Cook over medium heat until the ingredients are tender.
Step 4: Add the chicken and cook until it is cooked through.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Spinach Cream
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add the chopped onion and cook until it's soft.
Step 2: Add the chopped potatoes to the pot and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 3: Add the chopped spinach to the pot and cook until it's tender.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and simmer everything for a few minutes.
Step 5: Remove from heat and blend everything in a food processor until smooth.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Galician Stew (Lentils, Cabbage, Potato)
steps: Step 1: Cook the lentils until they are tender.
Step 2: Add the cabbage and potato, cut into pieces, and cook until they are soft.
Step 3: Add enough water to cover the ingredients, season to taste, and let the stew simmer for a few minutes.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Michelada
steps: Mix the egg white with lemon juice and spicy sauce.
Fill a glass with beer and add the prepared mixture.
Stir well until everything is combined.

title: Pineapple Smoothie
steps: Cut the pineapple into pieces and heat until smooth.
Blend the pineapple with coconut milk until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Add rum to taste and mix well.
Serve over ice and garnish with a pineapple wedge.

title: Carajillo of rum
steps: Heat the coffee in a pot until it boils.
Add rum to taste and mix well.
Serve hot.

title: Vinegar Honey Sauce
steps: Mix honey and mustard until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Add vinegar and olive oil to taste.

title: Genovese Pesto Homemade
steps: Step 1: In a food processor, blend the minced garlic and fresh basil leaves until a paste is formed.
Step 2: Add pistachios and Parmesan cheese to the processor and blend until well combined.
Step 3: Gradually add olive oil while blending in the processor until the desired consistency is reached.

title: Hinojo and Orange Salad
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the hinojo into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel the orange and separate the segments.

title: Chicken Tandoori
steps: Mix yogurt, garlic, ginger and spices in a bowl.
Add chicken to the mixture and marinate for at least one hour.
Cook the chicken in preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius until cooked.

title: Salmon Poke Bowl
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Cut the salmon into small pieces and season with paprika.
Heat oil in a pan and add chopped onion. Cook until it is transparent.
Add the salmon to the pan and cook until it is well done. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, mix cooked rice with soy sauce.
Assemble the ingredients in a bowl: first the rice, then the salmon and finally the onion.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tuna Tataki
steps: Cut the tuna into thin slices.
Heat a pan with olive oil over high heat.
Sear the tuna slices for 30 seconds on each side.
Remove the tuna from the pan and let it cool.
Cut the tuna into fine strips and serve with soy sauce.

title: Grilled Salmon with Lemon Butter Sauce
steps: Cut the salmon into small pieces and place them in a bowl.
Squeeze the lemons over the salmon and mix well.
Finely chop the onion and garlic, and add them to the bowl.
Add butter to taste and mix everything again.
Let it rest in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.

title: Beef Stroganoff
steps: Cut the meat into pieces and season it.
Cook the meat in a pan with a little oil.
Add the chopped onion and mashed garlic. Cook until they are golden brown.
Add sweet paprika and mustard. Mix well.
Incorporate cooking cream. Let it reduce for a few minutes.
Serve hot with rice or potatoes as accompaniment.

title: Hungarian Goulash
steps: Cut the beef into small pieces.
Peel and chop the garlic, peel and cut the onion into cubes.
Heat oil in a large pot and sauté the meat until it is browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pot and cook until they are soft.
Add the red bell peppers, cut into strips, and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the sweet paprika and stir well to combine with the meat and vegetable mixture.
Add the crushed tomato and cook at medium heat for 20-25 minutes.
Add enough meat broth to cover the mixture and cook at low heat for another 30 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious Hungarian Goulash.

title: Chili con carne
steps: Cook the pork meat until it is well done.
Add red peppers, onion, and garlic. Cook until they are soft.
Add canned tomatoes and red beans. Simmer for a few minutes more.

title: Chicken and Lemon Tagine
steps: Heat oil in a pot.
Add chicken cut into pieces and brown.
Add chopped onion, crushed garlic, and red peppers cut into pieces.
Cook until tender.
Incorporate lemon juice and a little water.
Cover the pot and cook at medium heat for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Rancher's Eggs
steps: Cook the eggs to taste.
Heat the ranch dressing sauce and refried beans in a pan.
Heat the corn tortillas in another pan.

title: Shakshuka
steps: Cook the onion, bell pepper, and garlic until they are golden.
Add tomatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Make holes for the eggs in the tomato mixture and add the eggs.
Cover with a lid and cook until the eggs are cooked.

title: Spaghetti with Meatballs
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Step 2: Prepare the ground meat mixture by combining it with finely chopped onion, minced garlic, and fresh parsley.
Step 3: Form small meatballs from the mixture and fry them until they are golden brown on all sides.
Step 4: Add tomato sauce to a pot and let it simmer over medium heat for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the fried meatballs to the tomato sauce and let them cook together for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve the spaghetti hot with the meatballs on top of the tomato sauce.

title: Pizza Dough
steps: Stretches the pizza dough into a circular shape.
Adds tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese to half of the dough.
Places cooked ham on top of the cheese.
Folds the other half of the dough over the filling and secures it with a fork.
Bakes at 200°C for 15 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Mixed Sandwich (Bikini)
steps: Cut the bar bread in half horizontally.
Place a slice of cooked ham on each half of the bread.
Add a slice of semi-cured cheese over the cooked ham.
Join the two halves of the bread and press them together well.

title: Lentil Burger
steps: Cook the lentils according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until they are golden.
Mix the cooked lentils with the onion and garlic in a food processor until you get a homogeneous mixture.
Form patties with the lentil mixture and fry them in a pan until they are golden brown on all sides.
Toast the hamburger bread in a pan.

title: Grilled Sausages in Red Wine
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic in a pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the sausages and cook until they are golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the red wine to the pan, stir well to deglaze and let reduce the liquid until a thick sauce is obtained.

title: Pork Chops from Saxonland
steps: Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
Mix minced garlic and fresh parsley with rumbled bread.
Coat the pork chops evenly with the rumbled bread mixture.
Heat oil in a pan and fry the pork chops at medium heat for 5 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cooked.
Serve hot and enjoy

title: Beef Liver in Caramelized Onion Sauce
steps: Chop the onion into small pieces and sauté in a pan with a little oil.
Add beef liver cut into small pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add salt, pepper, and cinnamon to taste. Cook for a few minutes more until the liver is cooked.

title: Kidneys in Sherry
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan and add the chopped onion.
Step 2: Add the cleaned kidneys and brown them on all sides.
Step 3: Add sherry and reduce to half.
Step 4: Add water until the kidneys are covered, cover the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add chopped garlic and parsley, cook for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Beef Stew
steps: Step 1: Clean the beef brisket and place it in a pot with boiling water.
Step 2: Add chopped onion, whole garlic, sweet paprika, vinegar, laurel leaves, and cook for about two hours until the beef is tender.
Step 3: Add crushed tomato and cook for an additional 10 minutes.

title: Pork Knuckle in Sauce
steps: Step 1: Sear the pork knuckle until it is golden.
Step 2: Add the chopped onions and parsley.
Step 3: Add the tomato and cook until it softens.
Step 4: Incorporate the red wine and let reduce until the sauce thickens.

title: Picantones in the Oven
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
Clean and cut the picantones into pieces.
In a bowl, mix together the sweet smoked paprika and hot smoked paprika with minced garlic and olive oil.
Brush the chicken pieces with the mixture.
Place the chicken pieces on a baking sheet.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and cooked.

title: Bacalao in Riojan Style
steps: Step 1: Soak the bacalao overnight.
Step 2: In a pan with olive oil, sauté the garlic and red peppers until they are golden.
Step 3: Add the soaked and flaked bacalao to the pan. Cook for a few minutes until it is well done.
Step 4: Add the sweet paprika and laurel. Mix everything well.
Step 5: Let cook for a few more minutes, until the mixture is well combined.

title: Rape in Green Sauce
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the rape into pieces.
Step 2: In a pan with hot olive oil, brown the rape pieces until they are cooked.

title: Pan-Seared Trout with Cream Sauce
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a skillet with oil and cook the trout on both sides until golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
Step 3: In the same skillet, add cream and let it simmer over medium-low heat.
Step 4: Add cooked trout to the cream and cook for a few minutes more until the cream is hot. Serve Immediately.

title: Grilled Chicken
steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat with a little oil.
Add the seasoned chicken to the pan and cook until it's golden brown and cooked through.

title: sole Meuniere
steps: Season the sole fillets with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic, minced, to the skillet and cook until golden.
Add the sole fillets to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes per side or until cooked through.
Add parsley, chopped, to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the sole hot with garlic butter and parsley.

title: Cod with Salt
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Rinse the cod and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the cod inside and out with salt.
Place the cod in a baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the fish is cooked.

title: Escudella and Beef Stew
steps: Step 1: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until they are golden.
Step 2: Add beef cut into large pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Step 3: Add potatoes, carrots, celery, and pepper, chopped. Cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add rice and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Cover the mixture with water and add tomato paste. Bring to a boil.
Step 6: Cook the stew at medium heat for about two hours, until the beef is tender and the rice is cooked.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious traditional Catalan dish.

title: Trinxat de la Cerdanya
steps: Peel and chop the potatoes and onion.
In a pan, fry the bacon until it is golden brown.
Add chopped onion and fry until it is translucent.
Add chopped potatoes and wild garlic, season with salt and cook everything together for 10 minutes.
Once done, press the trinxat gently with a fork or a spoon to give it its characteristic texture.

title: Cornmeal Cakes with Chicken and Avocado (Queen's Pepiada)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the cornmeal according to package instructions.
Step 2: Cook the chicken until it is well done. Let cool and chop.
Step 3: Peel and finely chop the onion, garlic, and cilantro. Mix with paprika and salt to taste.
Step 4: Peel and finely chop the tomatoes. Mix with the onion, garlic, and cilantro mixture.
Step 5: Add the chopped chicken to the previous mixture and mix well.
Step 6: Peel and cut the avocado into small pieces. Mix with the chicken and other ingredients.
Step 7: Shape the cornmeal cakes and fill them with the chicken and avocado mixture.
Step 8: Cook the cornmeal cakes in a hot skillet with oil until they are golden brown on both sides.

title: Confit Duck (Confit)
steps: Preheat the oven to 250°C.
Rub salt all over the duck, including the interior cavities.
Place the duck in a baking dish and put it in the preheated oven for 3 hours.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Rollitos de cabbage stuffed (Sarma)
steps: Step 1: Wash and cook the cabbage until it is soft.
Step 2: Mix the ground meat with cooked rice, chopped onion, garlic, parsley, and salt to taste.
Step 3: Stuff each cabbage leaf with the mixture.
Step 4: Roll up the cabbage leaves to form the rollitos.
Step 5: Place the rollitos in a baking dish, add chopped tomato, and cook at medium temperature for 20 minutes.

title: Lamb Couscous
steps: Step 1: Cut the lamb into small pieces.
Step 2: In a large pot, brown the lamb pieces in hot oil until they are well-cooked on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until they are soft.
Step 4: Add the chopped bell pepper and crushed tomato to the pot and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Add beef broth to the pot and let it simmer. Add couscous and cook for about 10 minutes until it is done.
Step 6: Serve the lamb couscous hot in individual plates.

title: Tuna Omelette
steps: Beat the eggs and add the tuna. Cook in a non-stick pan until set on both sides.

title: Crepes with Spinach and Cheese
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the spinach.
Step 2: Mix the spinach with grated cheese.
Step 3: Beat the eggs and add the spinach and cheese mixture.
Step 4: Add flour and mix well.
Step 5: Heat a non-stick pan and pour a little of the mixture to make each crepe.
Step 6: Cook until they are golden brown on both sides.

title: Scottish Eggs
steps: Cut the bread into thin slices.
Toast the bread until it is golden.
Fry the eggs until they are cooked.

title: Edamame with Salt
steps: Cook edamame according to package instructions.
Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Chicken Gyoza
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and mix with other ingredients.
Knead the flour dough until it forms a ball.
Stretch the dough and cut it into circles of desired size.
Fill each circle with the chicken mixture and close the gyoza.
Fry the gyoza in hot oil until they are golden brown on both sides.

title: Pan Bao with Pancetta
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Cut the pancetta into small pieces and fry until crispy.
Step 3: Open the pan buns in half, place the fried pancetta inside and close them again.
Step 4: Place the pan buns on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes until they are warm and golden brown.

title: Tartar of Fuet
steps: Cuts the fuet into small pieces and puts it in a bowl.
Peels and finely chops the onion and garlic. Adds them to the bowl along with chopped cilantro.
Squeezes lemon juice over the bowl and mixes everything well.
Serves the tartar of fuet on a plate and decorates with some cilantro leaves.

title: Chorizo criollo grilled
steps: Heat the grill to high temperature.
Cut the chorizo criollo into 1 cm thick slices.
Place the chorizo slices on the hot grill and cook until they are golden brown on both sides.
Mix the sweet smoked paprika and hot smoked paprika with minced garlic and a little olive oil to form a paste.
Spread the paste over the cooked chorizo slices and serve.

title: Revolt of Morcilla and Pine Nuts
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add the morcilla and cook until it browns.
Step 3: Add the pine nuts and stir everything together.

title: Portobello Mushrooms Gratin
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Clean the portobello mushrooms with a damp cloth and remove the stem.
In a bowl, mix the ruffled bread and parmesan cheese.
Add garlic minced to the bowl and mix well.
Place the mushrooms on a baking sheet and cover each one with the mixture of ruffled bread and parmesan cheese.
Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.

title: Volovanes of Seafood
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Step 2: Finely chop the onion and garlic.
Step 3: In a pan with olive oil, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Step 4: Add the chopped shrimp and mussels to the pan. Cook until they are well-cooked.
Step 5: Incorporate the chopped parsley into the seafood mixture.
Step 6: Fill the sea sausages with the seafood mixture and close them carefully.
Step 7: Place the sea sausages on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until golden.

title: Toasted Anchovy and Brie Cheese Toast
steps: Step 1: Spread the brie cheese over a slice of bread.
Step 2: Place the anchovies on top of the cheese and bake in the oven until they are golden brown.

title: Valencian Eggplant
steps: Peel the eggs and cut them into small pieces.
Heat the extra virgin olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped eggs to the pan and fry until they are golden brown.
Remove the pan from the heat and add the sweet paprika, stirring well to avoid burning.
Let the esgarraet cool before serving.

title: Huevos with Mújol and Almonds
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Grilled Canarian Cheese with Mojo
steps: Cut the grilled canarian cheese into thick slices.
Peel the garlic and mash with a little salt.
Mix olive oil, sweet smoked paprika, and vinegar to make the mojo.
Heat a pan with olive oil and fry the slices of cheese until they are golden brown.
Serve the cheese hot accompanied by the mojo on top.

title: Tostones (Macho Plantain)
steps: Peel and cut the plantains into slices of approximately 1 cm in thickness.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the plantain slices to the pan and fry until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove the plantain slices from the pan and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Mash each slice lightly with a fork or a flat object to achieve a crispy texture.

detailedIngredients.name: Oil
detailedIngredients.quantity: enough to cover the plantains in the pan

title: Potato Stones in the Oven
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into sticks. Whisk the oil and brush the sticks. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Hummus of Beetroot
steps: Step 1: Cook the chickpeas until they are soft.
Step 2: Blend the cooked chickpeas with the cooked beetroot in a blender until you get a smooth texture.

title: Mussels in Marinara Sauce
steps: Step 1: In a pan, sauté the garlic.
Step 2: Add the mussels and cook until they open.
Step 3: Add the white wine and reduce.
Step 4: Incorporate the tomato diced and parsley chopped. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Shrimp in Garlic Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add the minced garlic and sauté until golden brown.

title: Baba Ganoush (Eggplant Dip)
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Place eggplants on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes or until they are tender.
Let eggplants cool, then peel them and remove their seeds.
