In a food processor, combine eggplants with two cloves of garlic minced, two tablespoons of olive oil, one teaspoon of sweet paprika, and the juice of half a lemon.
Process until smooth. If necessary, add more olive oil to achieve the desired consistency.
Transfer to a bowl and serve with toasted bread or raw vegetables.

title: Camembert Fried with Raspberries
steps: Remove the camembert from the fridge and cut it into slices.
Dredge the slices in flour, then in beaten egg and finally in bread crumbs.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Once the oil is hot, add the camembert slices and fry until golden.
Remove the slices with a slotted spoon and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fried camembert slices accompanied by fresh raspberries.

title: Red Velvet Cake
steps: Mix dry ingredients.
Beat butter with sugar until a light batter is obtained.
Add eggs one by one.
Incorporate dry ingredients and non-dairy milk into the previous mixture.
Add red food coloring and white vinegar.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake at 180 degrees for 30 minutes.

title: Oreo Cheesecake
steps: Grind the Oreo cookies until they become powder.
Mix the cream cheese, sugar and whipping cream until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Add the Oreo cookie powder to the cream cheese mixture and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a cheesecake mold and bake at low temperature for 45 minutes.
Let it cool down and serve.

title: Pumpkin Pie
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Step 2: Prepare the pie crust and place it in a tart mold.

title: Apple Crumble
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Peel the apples and cut them into pieces. Mix the apple pieces with a little brown sugar in a baking mold.
In a bowl, mix the flour, the rest of the brown sugar and butter until a crumble mixture forms.
Spread the crumble mixture over the apples in the mold.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the crumble is golden.

title: Strawberry Mousse
steps: Step 1: Wash the strawberries and dry them.
Step 2: Beat the strawberries with sugar until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Step 3: Add water and continue beating.
Step 4: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Step 5: Mix the strawberry mixture with the melted chocolate.

title: Butter Cookies
steps: Mix the butter with the sugar until a creamy mixture is obtained.
Add eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour gradually and mix until no lumps remain.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet lined with paper.
Bake cookies for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Step 1: Mix the softened butter with sugar until a creamy mixture is obtained.
Step 2: Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Step 3: Add flour and mix until well incorporated.
Step 4: Add chocolate chips and mix to distribute them evenly.
Step 5: Form balls of dough with your hands and place them on a baking sheet.
Step 6: Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
Step 7: Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.

title: American Pancakes
steps: Mix the flour, eggs, and milk in a bowl until you get a smooth mixture.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and grease it with a little oil.
Pour a little of the mixture onto the pan to form each pancake.
Cook the pancakes until they are golden brown on both sides.
Serve hot with maple syrup or jam.

title: Waffles with Chocolate
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Mix the flour with eggs and add the melted chocolate.
Cook the waffles in a waffle iron until golden brown.

title: Fried Pumpkin Fritters
steps: Cut the pumpkin into pieces and cook until it's soft.
Mix the cooked pumpkin with eggs, sugar, and flour.
Form balls with the mixture and fry in hot oil until they're golden brown.

title: Pine Nut Bites
steps: Grind the pine nuts until they reach a flour-like texture.
Mix the rice flour with sugar.
Add the ground pine nuts to the previous mixture and mix well.
Make balls with the obtained dough.
Place the balls on a baking sheet.

title: Coca of Land
steps: Mix the eggs with sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Add flour to the previous mixture and mix well.
Add melted butter to the flour and egg mixture.
Pour the mixture into a landa mold and bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Pastries of Belém (Nata)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the hojaldre dough.
Step 2: Prepare the custard cream.
Step 3: Fill the molds with the dough and cream.
Step 4: Bake the pastries until they are golden brown.

title: Santo Bones
steps: Step 1: Beat the almonds until a dough forms.
Step 2: Add the glazed sugar and mix well.
Step 3: Knead the mixture until a smooth dough is obtained.
Step 4: Roll out the dough on parchment paper and cut into bone-shaped molds.
Step 5: Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Fruits of Aragon
steps: Select your preferred Fruits of Aragon.
Wash the fruits.
Enjoy your Fruits of Aragon.

detailedIngredients.name: Fruits of Aragon
detailedIngredients.quantity: 4 pieces per person (16 pieces in total)}]}  {

title: Chicken and Pineapple Salad
steps: Cook the chicken and let it cool before cutting into small pieces.
Cut the pineapple into small pieces.

title: Fig Salad with Goat Cheese
steps: Step 1: Wash and dry the spinach.
Step 2: Cut the figs into quarters.
Step 3: In a bowl, mix the spinach, figs, and almonds.
Step 4: Add crumbled goat cheese.

title: White Asparagus Salad with Vinaigrette
steps: Cook the white asparagus until tender.
Mix the lettuce and chopped tomatoes with the cooked asparagus.
Add olive oil and vinegar to make the vinaigrette.

title: Wakame and Cucumber Salad
steps: Step 1: Soaking the wakame in water for a few minutes until it becomes tender.
Step 2: Washing and slicing the cucumber into thin rounds.
Step 3: Mixing the cooked wakame with the sliced cucumber in a bowl.
Step 4: Adding your preferred dressing and mixing well.

title: Broccoli Salad with Bacon and Raisins
steps: Cook the bacon until crispy and reserve it.
Cut the broccoli into small pieces and cook it in a steamer until tender.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked broccoli with raisins and reserved bacon.
Add your preferred dressing and mix everything well.

title: Green Bean Salad with Potato
steps: Cook the green beans and potatoes separately until tender.
Combine the green beans and potatoes in a bowl.
Add your preferred dressing and serve.

title: Tuna Salad with Piquillo Peppers
steps: Step 1: Cut the tuna into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix the tuna with the piquillo peppers chopped.

title: Pasta Salad with Smoked Salmon
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
Cut the smoked salmon into small pieces.
Finely chop the onion and garlic.
In a bowl, mix together the cooked pasta, smoked salmon, onion, and garlic.
Add olive oil and balsamic vinegar to taste.
Mix everything well until the ingredients are well incorporated.

title: Corn, Tomato, and Fresh Cheese Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the corn until it is tender.
Step 2: Cut the tomato into cubes.
Step 3: Cut the fresh cheese into cubes.
Step 4: Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Tomato and Cucumber Salad
steps: Cut the tomatoes and cucumbers into pieces.
Mix the tomato and cucumber pieces in a bowl.
Add your preferred dressing (optional).

title: Basmati Rice with Cardamom
steps: Cook the basmati rice according to package instructions.
Add ground cardamom to the water used for cooking the rice.
Cook on medium heat until the rice is cooked and all the water has evaporated.

title: Potato Pure
steps: Peel and cut the potato into pieces.
Cook the potato pieces in water until they are tender.
Drain the water and mix the potato pieces until a smooth puree is obtained.
Add salt and pepper to taste and serve hot.

detailedIngredients.name: water
detailedIngredients.quantity: enough to cover the potato pieces

title: Grilled Zucchini
steps: Cut the zucchini into slices.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the zucchini slices and cook until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove from heat and season to taste.

title: Vegetable Chips (Beet/Yuca)
steps: Peel the beet and yuca.
Cut the roots into thin slices with a mandoline or a sharp knife.
Fry the slices in hot oil until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess grease.
Season with sea salt to taste.

title: Fried Banana
steps: Cut the bananas into slices.
Heat oil in a pan.
Add banana slices and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Remove fried banana slices and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.

title: Wrinkled Potatoes with Mojo
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Boil the potatoes until they are tender.
Mix olive oil, garlic, smoked paprika, and vinegar to make the mojo.
Remove the potatoes from the hot water and fry them until they are golden.
Serve the potatoes with the mojo on top.

title: Black Beans Refried
steps: Cook black beans until they are soft.
In a pan, heat the oil and add the chopped onion and garlic. Cook until they are golden.
Add cooked black beans to the pan and mash them with a fork or blender until you get a smooth mixture.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Quinoa with Vegetables
steps: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
Season and pepper to taste.

title: Soft Refined Wheat Stir-Fry
steps: Cook the soft refined wheat until it is tender but still crunchy.
Add oil and stir-fry for a few minutes more.

title: Fried Polenta
steps: 1. Mix the polenta with maize flour until a compact dough is formed.
2. Heat oil in a pan and fry the dough into balls until they are golden brown on all sides.
3. Remove the balls from the pan and place them over paper towels to drain excess oil.

title: Julian Vegetable Soup
steps: Step 1: Cut the vegetables into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the onion and garlic in a pot with oil until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the remaining vegetables and cook at medium heat for about 10 minutes.
Step 4: Add water or vegetable broth to cover the vegetables and let it simmer at low heat for 20 minutes.
Step 5: Once the vegetables are tender, puree the soup until you get a creamy texture.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Melon Soup with Ham
steps: Step 1: Cut the melon into pieces.
Step 2: Cook the melon pieces until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the ham and cook for a few minutes more.

title: Cream of Cauliflower Curry
steps: Step 1: Cook the cauliflower until it is tender.
Step 2: Mix the cooked cauliflower with vegetable broth and curry powder until a cream is obtained.
Step 3: Serve hot.

title: Tomato Soup (Hot)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and smoked paprika, cook for an additional minute.
Step 3: Add the chopped tomatoes and laurel, cook for about 10 minutes.
Step 4: Blend the mixture to obtain a thick soup.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Harira (Moroccan Soup)
steps: Cook the lentils until they are soft.
Peel and chop the onion and garlic, then fry in a pot with olive oil until they are golden.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the pot and cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked lentils, chicken broth, salt, and pepper to taste. Let everything simmer together for 20 minutes.
Grind the fresh parsley in a mortar or food processor until it forms a paste.

title: Coffee Bombon
steps: Heat the milk in a pot until it's hot but not boiling.
Grind the coffee beans and prepare an adequate amount for two cups.

title: Clara Beer (with Lemon)
steps: Step 1: In a large glass, mix the beer clear with lemon juice.
Step 2: Add ice and stir well until it's cold.

title: Tomato Juice Prepared
steps: Step 1: Washing the tomatoes.
Step 2: Cutting the tomatoes into pieces and placing them in a blender or mixer.

title: Tartar Sauce
steps: Mix the mayonnaise and mustard in a bowl.
Finely chop the pickles and add them to the mixture.
Mix everything until it becomes a homogeneous sauce.

title: Chimichurri Sauce
steps: Grind the egg and parsley in a food processor.
Add red wine vinegar and olive oil to the food processor and mix until the mixture is well combined.

title: Chicken in the Garden
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken into pieces and fry it in a pan with oil.
Step 2: Add chopped bell peppers, onion, tomato, garlic, and carrots. Cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Add water and rice to the pan and cook until the rice is cooked.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Green Beans from La Granja
steps: Step 1: Soak the green beans from La Granja for at least 8 hours.
Step 2: In a large pot, sauté the onion and garlic, chopped with a little oil.
Step 3: Add sweet smoked paprika and reheat for a few minutes.
Step 4: Incorporate the soaked green beans, laurel, and crushed tomato.
Step 5: Cook on medium heat until the green beans are tender. Add water if needed during cooking.

title: Garbanzo with Shrimp
steps: Cook the garbanzos until they are tender.
In a pan, sauté the shrimp with a little oil.
Add the cooked garbanzos to the pan and mix everything.
Let cook for a few minutes until the flavors integrate.
Serve hot.

title: Hake in Roman Style (Breaded)
steps: Step 1: Dry the hake with parchment paper.
Step 2: Coat the hake in beaten egg and then in breaded breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Fry the hake in hot oil until it is golden brown on both sides.

title: Bonito with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the bonito into small pieces.
Step 2: Wash and chop the tomatoes.
Step 3: Sear the bonito in a pan with a little oil until it's golden brown.
Step 4: Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook for a few minutes until they're soft.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Spanish Rice
steps: Step 1: Sauté the minced garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add rice and sauté until it is translucent.
Step 3: Add tomato puree and cook at medium heat for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add smoked paprika, stir well and add water (double the volume of rice).
Step 5: Cook until the rice is cooked and the broth has evaporated completely.
Step 6: Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Spaghetti with Putanesca Sauce
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the garlic and bell pepper chopped.
Add anchovies and olives, cook until dissolved.
Incorporate crushed tomatoes and let it simmer at medium heat.
Once done, mix cooked spaghetti with the sauce.

title: Tuna Lasagna
steps: Cook the lasagna pasta according to package instructions.
In a pan, brown the tuna in a little oil until it is well cooked. Add the tomato sauce and let it cook for a few minutes.
Assemble the lasagna in an oven-safe dish. Start with a layer of lasagna pasta, followed by a layer of tuna and tomato sauce mixture, and finish with a layer of mozzarella cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.

title: Stuffed Zucchini with Meat
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Cut the zucchinis in half and scoop out the pulp. Reserve.
Sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the ground meat and cook until it is browned.
Incorporate the crushed tomato and cook for 5 minutes.
Stuff the zucchinis with the meat mixture and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until they are tender.

title: Stuffed Tomatoes with Rice and Meat
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes in half and remove their pulp.
Step 2: Cook the rice and mix with the minced meat.

title: Grilled Steak with Black Pepper
steps: Season the steak with black pepper.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add olive oil.
Add the seasoned steak to the pan and cook for 4 minutes per side until it reaches a medium point.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Pan-Seared Pork Chops with Cabrales Cheese
steps: Season the pork chops with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan and add the pork chops.
Cook until they are golden brown on both sides.
Add Cabrales cheese to the pan and cook until it melts.
Serve hot.

title: Rabbit in Salmorejo (Canarian)
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces and season.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the garlic cloves with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the rabbit pieces and brown them on all sides.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomato and cook for 15 minutes.
Step 5: Add water until it covers the rabbit pieces, sweet paprika, and vinegar. Simmer at low heat for 40 minutes or until the rabbit is tender.
Step 6: Remove from heat and let rest before serving.

title: Pork Chops with Pedro Ximenez Sauce
steps: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add pork chops and cook on all sides until cooked to desired doneness.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Pour in Pedro Ximenez wine, increase heat and reduce liquid until sauce is thickened.
Remove from heat and serve pork chops with sauce on top.

title: Chicken in Curry Sauce
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces.
Sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Add curry powder and stir.
Add triturated tomato and cook for 5 minutes.
Incorporate chicken broth and let it simmer at medium heat for 20 minutes.
Add the chicken pieces and cook until they are well done.

title: Chicken Enchiladas
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and shred it.
Step 2: Warm the tortillas.
Step 3: Fill the tortillas with the chicken and roll them up.
Step 4: Cover the enchiladas with sauce and bake.

title: Pad Thai with Shrimp
steps: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large pan, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add the shrimp to the pan and cook until pink.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the pan and mix with fish sauce, tamarind, and sweet paprika.
Cook for a few more minutes until everything is well combined.
Serve the Pad Thai in individual plates and sprinkle with fresh cilantro and lime.

title: Pork Ramen (Tonkotsu)
steps: Cook the pork with potatoes, onion, and ginger until tender.
Add water and chicken broth to the cooked pork and let it simmer.
Beat the mixture with a blender until you get a puree.
Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions.
Serve the ramen in a bowl and add the cooked noodles.

title: Meatballs in Garden Style
steps: Step 1: Mix the ground pork with chopped onion and garlic.
Step 2: Form meatballs with the mixture and fry them in a pan until they are golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add chopped tomatoes to the pan with the meatballs and cook for a few more minutes.

title: San Jacobos of Zucchini
steps: Cut the zucchini into thick slices.
Place a slice of mozzarella cheese over each zucchini slice.
Dredge the slices in flour, beaten egg, and breadcrumbs.
Fry in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess grease.

title: Eggs Baked with Tomato and Chorizo
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Cut the tomatoes into slices and place them in a baking dish.
Add raw eggs in the center of the dish, without them spilling out.
Cut the chorizo into thin slices and distribute them around the eggs.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the eggs are cooked.

title: Eggplant Omelette
steps: Step 1: Slice the eggplants into thin rounds.
Step 2: Dredge the eggplants in beaten eggs and fry them until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Chop the onion and sauté it in a pan until it is transparent.
Step 4: Mix the fried eggplant with the sautéed onion and pour the mixture into a round mold.
Step 5: Beat the eggs and pour them over the eggplant and onion mixture. Cook until they are set.

title: Chorizo Omelette
steps: Step 1: Fry the chorizo until it is golden brown.
Step 2: Add beaten eggs and cook until they are set.

title: Potato Stew with Cod
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Cook the cod until it is tender.
Step 3: Mix the cooked potatoes with the cod, broken down.

title: Baked Cod
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Clean and dry the cod. Make some superficial cuts on the skin.
Season the cod inside with salt, pepper, and a bit of lemon juice.
Add olive oil to a pan and heat it at medium heat.
Add garlic and fresh parsley. Sauté until they are golden.
Put the cod in the pan with the skin facing down and cook for 5 minutes.
Flip the cod and cook for another 3 minutes.
Transfer the cod to a baking dish and put it in the preheated oven. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the fish is cooked.
Take it out of the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Mackerel in Malt Vinegar
steps: Cut the mackerel into pieces and season.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and fry the mackerel pieces until they are golden brown.
Remove the mackerel from the pan and reserve the oil.
In the same oil, sauté the garlic until it is golden brown.
Add the vinegar and sweet paprika to the pan and mix well.
Return the fried mackerel to the pan and stir so that it is well coated with the marinade.
Let it cool down and serve.

title: Hake in Galician Style (with Garlic)
steps: Season the hake with salt and sweet paprika.
In a pan, heat the olive oil and add the minced garlic.
Add the hake to the pan and cook until it is golden brown on both sides.
Remove the hake from the pan and serve with fried garlic.

title: Calamari in Garlic Sauce
steps: Step 1: Slice the onion into thin rings.
Step 2: Fry the calamari in a pan with oil until golden brown.
Step 3: Add the fried onion and cook until tender.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Grilled Octopus
steps: Preheat the grill or a large skillet until it is very hot.
Season the octopus with salt and sweet paprika.
Place the octopus on the grill or skillet and cook for 10 minutes per side.
Add minced garlic to olive oil and pour over the octopus.
Serve hot with an additional pinch of salt if needed.

title: Salmon in parchment paper with vegetables
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and chop the vegetables into small pieces.
Place the salmon on a piece of aluminum foil, season with salt and pepper.
Add the vegetables around the salmon.
Close the aluminum foil forming a sealed package.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the salmon is cooked.

title: Tuna Burger
steps: Drain the tuna can well.
Place a spoonful of tuna on each hamburger bun.
Add lettuce and tomato slices.
Close the burger and serve.

title: Vegetable Sandwich with Egg and Mayonnaise
steps: Cook the eggs until they are well-cooked.
Toast the whole wheat bread to your liking.
Spread the vegetarian mayonnaise on both slices of bread.
Place the iceberg lettuce leaves on one slice of bread.
Add tomato and finely chopped onion slices over the lettuce.
Place the cooked eggs on top of the sandwich and cover with the other slice of bread.

title: Pizza with Pepperoni
steps: Preheat the oven to 230°C.
Stretch the pizza dough in a pizza mold.
Add tomato sauce and distribute it evenly over the dough.
Add mozzarella cheese and distribute it evenly over the dough.
Add pepperoni on top of the mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 15 minutes or until the pizza is golden brown.

title: Pinto Beans with Rice
steps: Step 1: Cook the pinto beans until they are tender.
Step 2: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Step 3: Mix the cooked pinto beans with the cooked rice and serve.

title: Chinese Noodles with Vegetables and Soy Sauce
steps: Heat oil in a large pan.
Add the chopped onion and garlic, cook until golden.
Add the bell peppers and broccoli cut into small pieces, cook until tender.
Add the noodles and soy sauce, mix well and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Cod Fritters
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Break down the soaked cod and mix it with the egg.
Step 3: Add crushed bread and mix until a compact dough forms.
Step 4: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil.

title: Cheese Fritters
steps: Mix the blue cheese and flour
Make balls with the mixture

title: Stuffed Eggs with Grilled Meat
steps: Cook the ground meat until it is well done.
Mix the ground meat with cooked eggs, chopped and breadcrumbs.
Fill the empty eggs with the meat mixture.
Place the stuffed eggs on a baking sheet, sprinkle with more breadcrumbs and grill in the oven until golden brown.

title: Shrimp Salad (Surimi)
steps: Finely chop the shrimp surimi.
Peel and finely chop the red peppers.
Chop the onion into small pieces.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Add mayonnaise to taste and mix well.

title: Mussels in Spicy Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and sauté until golden brown.

title: Zamburiñas on the Grill
steps: Heat the grill to medium-high heat.
Add a drizzle of olive oil to the grill.
Place the zamburiñas on the grill.
Cook for 2-3 minutes per side or until they are open and golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Shrimp on the grill with black salt
steps: 1. Clean the shrimp and season them with black salt.
2. Cook the shrimp on the grill until they are pink.

title: Langostines in the Oven
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Peel and clean the langostines.
Mix in a bowl the langostines, garlic minced, parsley fresh chopped, and lemon juice.
Place the langostines on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes or until lightly golden.

title: Octopus in Vinegar Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cook the octopus in water with salt and paprika until tender.
Step 2: Once cooked, chill the octopus in water with ice to prevent further cooking. Cut into pieces.
Step 3: Mix olive oil and vinegar to make the vinegar sauce.
Step 4: Season the cut pieces of octopus with the vinegar sauce and serve.

title: Fried Chopitos (Puntillitas)
steps: Step 1: Clean the chopitos and dry them with paper towels.
Step 2: Dredge the chopitos in flour and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Calamari in Andalusian Style
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the calamari into rings.
Step 2: Dust the calamari with flour and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Drain the fried calamari on paper towels to remove excess grease.

title: Tuna Galician Empanada
steps: Step 1: Mix flour with water and salt until a dough forms.
Step 2: Roll out the dough and fill it with tuna mixed with sweet paprika, chopped egg, and olive oil.
Step 3: Close the empanada and brush it with a little bit of olive oil.
Step 4: Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes.

title: Meat Empanadillas
steps: Step 1: Mix the ground meat with spices to taste.
Step 2: Fill empanada dough with the meat mixture.
Step 3: Close the empanadillas and bake until golden brown.

title: Homemade Chicken Nuggets
steps: Cuts the chicken into pieces and seasons with salt and pepper.
Passes the chicken pieces through beaten egg and then through ruffled bread.
Fries the homemade chicken nuggets in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Vegetable Tempura
steps: Cut the vegetables into large pieces.
Mix the flour with water until a thick batter is obtained.
Dip the vegetable pieces in the flour mixture and fry them in abundant hot oil.
Drain excess oil and serve immediately.

title: Ham and Cheese Rolls (Cold)
steps: Spread a slice of ham on a flat surface.
Place a small portion of cheese at one end of the ham.
Roll the ham inwards to cover the cheese and form a roll.

title: Toast with Avocado and Poached Egg
steps: Toast the bread.
Mash the avocado and spread it over the toast.
Poach the eggs and place them on top of the avocado toast.

title: Toast with Shrimp and Mussels
steps: Step 1: Cut the shrimp and mussels into small pieces.
Step 2: Toast the bread until it is crispy.
Step 3: Mix the shrimp and mussels with a little olive oil.
Step 4: Place the mixture on top of the toasted bread.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Boquerones Rebozados Open
steps: Step 1: Clean the boquerones and cut them in half.
Step 2: Dip the boquerones in beaten egg and then coat with breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Fry the boquerones in hot oil until golden brown.
Step 4: Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Mussels in Marinara Sauce
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the mussels and white wine. Cook until the mussels open.
Step 3: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Pineapple Carpaccio (dessert or appetizer)
steps: Cut the pineapple into thin slices.
Arrange the pineapple slices on a plate.
Add lemon juice and fresh mint chopped.
Serve immediately.

title: Scrambled Eggs (Bechamel)
steps: Cook the eggs until they are almost set. Chill them under running water.
Make a bechamel with milk, flour, and butter.
Peel the eggs and cut them in half.
Place the egg halves in a suitable baking dish.
Cover the eggs with bechamel and sprinkle shredded cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.

title: Parmesan Cheese Bites
steps: Step 1: Melt the parmesan cheese in a pan over medium heat until it's liquid.
Step 2: With the help of a spoon, form small balls onto a baking sheet greased with olive oil.

title: Fried Cheese with Strawberry Sauce
steps: Cut the cheese into slices and fry them in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown on both sides.
Meanwhile, prepare the strawberry sauce by crushing the strawberries and adding a little water and sugar to taste. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it thickens.
Serve the fried cheese hot with the strawberry sauce on top.

title: Nachos with guacamole (without meat)
steps: Finely chop the onion and cilantro.
Mix the avocado with the onion, cilantro, lemon juice, and salt to taste.
Warm the nachos in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for a few minutes.
Serve the guacamole over the warm nachos and enjoy.

title: Cheesecake (No Baked)
steps: Mix the cream cheese, milk, and sugar in a bowl.
Add flour and mix until a smooth dough is obtained.
Pour the mixture into a tart pan.
Let it chill in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours before serving.

title: Coffee Flan
steps: Mix milk with instant coffee in a pot.
Add sugar to the milk and coffee mixture.
Heat the mixture until the sugar dissolves completely.
Remove from heat and add beaten eggs.
Pour the mixture into flan molds and bake in a water bath for 45 minutes.

title: Cheesecake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Mix milk and eggs until well combined.
Add grated cheese to the mixture and stir until it melts completely.
Pour the mixture into a cheesecake mold and bake in a preheated oven for 45 minutes or until firm.
Let cool before serving.

title: Bread Pudding (Waste Reduction)
steps: Soak the hard bread in milk for 30 minutes.
Beat the eggs and add them to the bowl of soaked bread.
Mix everything until a uniform mixture is obtained.
Empty the mixture into a mold for pudding and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 45 minutes.

title: Yogurt Mousse
steps: Mix the yogurt with sugar until smooth.
Add milk slowly while mixing.
Pour the mixture into mousse molds and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Unmold and serve.

title: Homemade Chocolate Smoothie
steps: Step 1: Heat the milk.
Step 2: Add chocolate chunks and mix until melted.

title: Pear Compote
steps: Peel and chop the pears.
Cook the pears in a pot with a little water until they are soft.
Grind the cooked pears to obtain a smooth texture.

title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Melt the chocolate with butter in a bain-marie.
Mix eggs with sugar until they are frothy.
Add the chocolate mixture to the eggs and mix well.
Incorporate flour gradually, mixing carefully to avoid lumps.
Pour the dough into a greased mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Carrot Cake (without cream)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Grate the carrots and mix them with the eggs and sugar.
Add flour and yeast to the previous mixture.
Pour the mixture into a cake mold.
Bake for 30 minutes or until cooked.

title: Oatmeal Cookies
steps: Mix the softened butter with sugar until smooth.
Add eggs and mix well.
Add flour and oatmeal, mix until well combined.
Make balls of the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 15 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Melt the butter along with the chocolate in a double boiler.
Add flour and sugar to the chocolate and melted butter mixture. Mix well until forming a homogeneous dough.
Let the dough cool for a few minutes.
With your hands, shape balls from the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180°C for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Pastry Bonds with Honey
steps: Stretch the pastry dough
Cut into desired shapes
Paint with melted honey
Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes

title: Lemon Cookies
steps: Mix the eggs with sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Peel the lemon skin and add it to the previous mixture.
Add flour gradually while mixing everything well.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.
Remove the cookies from the heat and let them cool over parchment paper to remove excess oil.

title: Grilled Milk Canaria
steps: Heat the milk until it is hot but not boiling.
Beat the eggs with sugar until they are well mixed.
Add the hot milk to the eggs slowly, stirring constantly to avoid the eggs from curdling.
Pour the mixture into a mold and bake in a water bath for 45 minutes or until firm.
Remove from the oven and let cool. Sprinkle with cinnamon before serving.

title: Pastry Layers with Cream
steps: Stretch the hojaldre pastry dough until it is thin.
Cut the dough into triangles.
Fill each triangle with cream pudding.
Roll the triangles over themselves, forming a sort of snail.
Place the layers on a baking sheet and brush them with beaten egg.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Rutabaga Salad, Apple and Nuts
steps: Wash and dry the rutabaga.
Peel and finely chop the apple.
Toast the nuts in a pan without oil until they are golden brown.
Mix the rutabaga, chopped apple, and toasted nuts in a bowl.

title: Red Pepper Salad with Tuna
steps: Cut the red peppers into strips.
Mix the tuna with the peppers.
Add your preferred dressing.

title: Tomato and Mozzarella Salad
steps: Cut the tomatoes into slices.
Cut the mozzarella into slices.
Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices in a plate.
Season with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.

title: Lombardy Collard Salad with Apple
steps: Cut the lombardy collard into small pieces.
Peel and chop the apple into small pieces.
Mix the lombardy collard and apple in a bowl.

title: Spinach Salad with Fresh Spinach and Bacon
steps: Step 1: Cook the bacon until it is crispy and set aside.
Step 2: Wash the fresh spinach leaves thoroughly and dry them carefully.
Step 3: Mix the spinach with cooked bacon and serve.

title: Chicken and Apple Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Cut the apple and lettuce into small pieces.
Step 3: Mix the cooked chicken with the apple and lettuce.

title: Avocado and Tomato Salad
steps: Cut the avocado and tomato into pieces.
Mix the pieces of avocado and tomato in a bowl.
Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Smoked Salmon Salad with Avocado
steps: Cut the avocado and onion into small pieces.
Wash the lettuce and cut it into pieces.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Serve Immediately.

title: Beet Salad with Fresh Cheese
steps: Step 1: Cook the beets until they are tender.
Step 2: Peel and cut the beets into pieces.
Step 3: Mix the beets with the fresh cheese crumbled.

title: Orange and Pomelo Salad
steps: Peel and cut the oranges and pomelo into slices.
Arrange the slices in a decorative plate.
Serve the salad immediately.

title: Broccoli Puree
steps: Step 1: Cut the broccoli into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the broccoli pieces until they are tender.
Step 3: Blend the cooked broccoli to obtain a puree.

title: Potatoes in the Microwave with Spices
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Place the potato pieces in a bowl with spices and mix until they are covered.
Introduce the bowl with the potatoes into the microwave for 5 minutes or until they are tender.

title: Green Peppers Fried
steps: Cut the green peppers into strips.
Mix the chickpea flour with water until a thick paste is obtained.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan.
Dip the peppers in the flour mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden brown.
Remove the fried peppers from the pan and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the green peppers fried hot as a side dish.

title: Roasted Red Peppers
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and dry the roasted red peppers.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet.
Roast the peppers in the preheated oven for approximately 30 minutes or until they are tender.

title: Mushrooms on the grill (without ham)
steps: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and wait until it's hot.
Add the mushrooms cleaned and cut into large pieces.
Cook the mushrooms for about 5 minutes or until they're golden brown.

title: Broccoli with Bechamel Sauce
steps: Cook the broccoli until it is tender.
Prepare the bechamel: melt the butter in a pan, add the flour and cook for a few minutes. Add the milk little by little and stir constantly until it thickens. Add the ground nutmeg.
Mix the cooked broccoli with the bechamel sauce.

title: Boiled Carrots with Butter
steps: Peel the carrots and cut them into pieces.
Boil the carrots until they are tender.
Add butter to the hot pan and cook the carrots for a few minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Rice with Vegetables (Vegetable Paella)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the peppers, carrots, and garlic cut into small pieces.
Step 2: Add rice and stir until it is lightly browned.
Step 3: Add crushed tomato and green beans. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add water or vegetable broth and cook at medium-high heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Crispy Fried Onion
steps: Step 1: Slice the onion into thin rings.
Step 2: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add the onion rings and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Step 4: Remove the fried onions from the pan with a spoon and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.

title: Cherry Tomatoes Stir-Fried
steps: Cut the cherry tomatoes in half.
Stir-fry them in a pan with a little oil until they are lightly browned.
Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chicken Noodle Soup with Fine Noodles
steps: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion, bell pepper, and garlic and cook until tender.
Add chicken and cook until cooked through.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add fine noodles and cook until tender.
Serve hot.

title: Purée (Spinach and Potato Soup)
steps: Step 1: Chop the spinach into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and chop the potatoes into cubes.
Step 3: Cook the spinach and potatoes together until they are tender.
Step 4: Add vegetable broth and let it simmer for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Mushroom Cream (hot)
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the mushrooms, onion, and potatoes.
Step 2: Sauté the mushrooms and onion in a pot with a little oil until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the chopped potatoes to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and let everything simmer together until the potatoes are soft.
Step 5: Blend the mixture with a blender until you get a smooth and homogeneous cream.
Step 6: Heat the cream in the pot before serving.

title: Carrot Cream
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the carrots into pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the onion until it's tender.
Step 3: Add the carrots to the onion and cook until they're soft.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and let it simmer for a few minutes.
Step 5: Blend the mixture with an immersion blender until you get a smooth cream.
Step 6: Add the cream and mix well. Heat the cream without letting it boil.

title: Garlic Soup with Egg (Castellana with Egg)
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the minced garlic and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add water and salt to taste, let boil.
Step 4: Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
Step 5: Pour the beaten eggs into the pot while constantly stirring.
Step 6: Cook until the soup thickens and serve hot.

title: Cuban Mojito
steps: Muddle the fresh mint leaves with sugar in a mortar.
Add lemon juice and white rum to the mortar and mix well.
Serve over ice cubes in a tall glass.

title: Caipirinha
steps: Muele el azúcar con un poco de cáscara de limón.
Agrega la cachaña y mezcla bien.
Agita en una coctelera con hielo durante unos segundos.
Cuela y sirve en un vaso.

title: Strawberry Daiquiri
steps: Mix the washed and chopped strawberry with lemon juice in a blender until smooth.
Add white rum and orange juice, and mix well.
Serve over ice.

title: Homemade Alioli Sauce
steps: Peel the garlic and finely chop it.
Grind the garlic in a mortar with olive oil until a smooth paste is obtained.

title: Green Sauce (parsley and garlic)
steps: Finely chop the parsley and garlic.
Mix both ingredients in a mortar or food processor until a paste is obtained.

title: Serranito (sandwich of loin, pepper, and ham)
steps: Cuts the loin into thin slices.
Chops the peppers into small pieces.
Greases bread with olive oil.
Places the loin slices on top of the bread.
Adds pepper pieces on top of the loin.
Covers with ham slices and closes the sandwich.

title: Beef Fritters
steps: Step 1: Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Chop the onion and parsley and mix it with breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Dip the pieces of beef in beaten egg and then coat them with the breadcrumb mixture.
Step 4: Fry the fritters in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Calamari Sandwich with Alioli
steps: 1. Fry the calamari in hot oil until golden.
2. Mix garlic and oil to make the alioli.
3. Spread the alioli on bread slices.
4. Place fried calamari on top of bread with alioli.
5. Serve immediately.

title: Rice with Pork Ribs
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add pork ribs and fry until browned on all sides.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Step 4: Add rice and stir to absorb the oil and meat juices.
Step 5: Add enough water or chicken broth to cover the rice, bring to a boil, and then reduce heat to minimum.
Step 6: Cover the pot and let cook for 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and has absorbed all liquid.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Fideuá de pato y setas
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice in a pot with boiling water until it is al dente.
Step 2: In a large pan, cook the pieces of duck until they are golden and crispy. Add the mushrooms and cook them along with the duck for a few minutes more.
Step 3: Add the cooked rice to the pan and mix everything so that the ingredients blend well.
Step 4: Cook the fideuá for a few minutes more until it is ready to serve.

title: Seafood Canelones
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Add the shrimp, mussels, and clams to the pan and cook until they are well done.
Mix the tomato puree with the seafood mixture and let it cook for a few minutes more.
Rake the cheese and mix it with the parsley and bread crumbs.
Fill the canelones with the seafood mixture and top each one with a layer of cheese.
Place the canelones in a baking dish, sprinkle with more cheese and bake at medium-high temperature until golden.

title: Lasagna with Spinach and Pine Nuts
steps: Cook the spinach finely.
Mix the spinach with pine nuts, salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the base of a baking dish with tomato sauce.
Place a layer of lasagna pasta in the dish.
Distribute the spinach and pine nut mixture over the pasta layer.
Add a generous layer of grated cheese on top of the spinach mixture.
Repeat steps 4-6 until the dish is completely covered, finishing with a layer of grated cheese on top.
Bake at high temperature for 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.

title: Beef Burger at the Right Point
steps: Cook beef to your liking.
Place cooked beef on the hamburger bun.
Add chopped lettuce, tomato, and onion.

title: Chicken with Almonds (Chinese Style)
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and sauté it in a wok with hot sesame oil.
Add minced garlic and cook until golden.
Add the chicken and cook until almost done.
Add almonds and cook until lightly toasted. Serve hot.

title: Pork with Blue Cheese Sauce
steps: Cook the pork until it is browned and cooked.
Add chopped egg and cook for a few minutes more.
Add cream and blue cheese, mix well until the cheese melts.
Let the sauce reduce a bit before serving.

title: Short ribs with potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the short ribs with spices and marinade.
Step 3: Add peeled and cut large potatoes to a baking sheet.
Step 4: Place the marinated short ribs on top of the potatoes.
Step 5: Bake for 45 minutes or until the short ribs are golden brown and the potatoes are tender.

title: Rabbit Hunter Style
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the garlic and parsley in olive oil.
Step 3: Add the rabbit and brown it on all sides.
Step 4: Add thyme and red wine, cook until the rabbit is tender.

title: Grilled Turkey with Vegetables
steps: Cuts the turkey into pieces and seasons with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Heats a pan over medium-high heat and adds the turkey pieces. Cooks until they are golden brown on all sides.
Removes the turkey from the pan and reserves in a plate.
In the same pan, adds chopped onion and whole garlic (without peeling). Cooks until they are golden.
Adds spinach and carrots sliced into thin strips to the pan. Cooks until they are tender.
Re-adds the turkey to the pan and mixes everything together so that flavors can meld.
Serves hot and enjoy your delicious grilled turkey with vegetables.

title: Beef with Peppers (Chinese Style)
steps: 1. Cut the beef into small pieces and marinate them with red wine vinegar for 30 minutes.
2. In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated beef pieces and cook until they are golden brown on all sides. Remove the meat from the pan and reserve.
3. In the same pan, add minced garlic and grated ginger. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add large pepper pieces to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Return the beef to the pan and add soy sauce and sugar. Mix well and cook for another 2 minutes.
6. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Lamb Shanks in Rioja Sauce
steps: Cut the lamb shanks into pieces and season.
Mince the garlic and sauté it in olive oil.
Add the sliced red bell peppers and cook until they are tender.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked lamb shanks and sauté with the vegetables.
Pour in the red wine and reduce the sauce until it thickens.
Add the laurel leaves and cook everything at low heat for 20 minutes.

title: Fried Eggs with Pesto
steps: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add oil and wait until it's hot.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
Pour the beaten eggs into the pan and cook until they're set.
Cook the pesto separately in another pan.
Once the eggs are done, remove them from the pan and place them on a plate.

title: Shrimp Omelette
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the shrimp.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 3: Add the chopped shrimp to the beaten eggs.
Step 4: Pour the mixture into a hot pan with oil.
Step 5: Cook until both sides are golden brown.

title: Bean Omelette
steps: Step 1: Soaking dried beans for at least 6 hours.
Step 2: Cooking soaked beans until they are tender.
Step 3: Sautéing chopped onion in olive oil until it is transparent.
Step 4: Adding chopped fresh parsley and cooking for an additional minute.
Step 5: Mixing cooked beans with the onion and parsley mixture.
Step 6: Placing the mixture into a round mold and flattening to form an omelette.
Step 7: Baking the omelette in the oven at medium temperature for 20 minutes or until it is firm.

title: Greens and Shrimp Stir-Fry
steps: Step 1: Cook the greens until tender.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook until pink.

title: Cod with Fennel
steps: 1. Season the cod with black pepper.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan and add chopped onions.
3. Add fennel, chopped, and cook until golden.
4. Add cod to the pan and cook for 5 minutes per side.
5. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Dorado in the oven with potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Cut the potatoes into pieces and season them.
Step 3: Place the fish in a baking sheet along with the potatoes.
Step 4: Bake for 20 minutes or until the fish is cooked.

title: Tuna Steak Grilled
steps: Step 1: Season the tuna with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add a little oil to the hot pan.
Step 4: Place the tuna steak in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Sepia Stew with Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Cut the sepia into pieces and season it.
Step 2: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Step 3: Add the garlic, minced, and cook for one minute.
Step 4: Add the sepia pieces and brown them on all sides.
Step 5: Add the crushed tomato, sweet paprika, laurel, and peeled potatoes cut into quarters. Cook for 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Step 6: Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Grilled Squid with Garlic and Parsley
steps: Step 1: Clean the squid by removing the skin and head.
Step 2: In a hot skillet with olive oil, sauté the minced garlic until it is golden.
Step 3: Add the squid to the skillet and cook for a few minutes on each side until it is lightly browned.
Step 4: Add the chopped parsley to the skillet and mix everything well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy your grilled squid with garlic and parsley.

title: Calamari in American Sauce
steps: Chop the onion and garlic into small pieces.
In a pan, heat oil and add the onion and garlic. Cook until they are golden brown.
Add the calamari to the pan and cook for a few minutes until they are golden brown.
Add the tomato sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Fish Stew (Catalan Fish Stew)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the tomato, carrot, parsley, and laurel leaves. Cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the fish cut into large pieces and cook on medium heat until almost done.
Step 4: Add water or fish stock to cover the ingredients, add potato cut into large pieces and cook until the potato is tender.
Step 5: Add vinegar and salt. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Chicken and Mushroom Crepes
steps: Step 1: Mix the eggs, milk, and flour to make the crepe batter.
Step 2: Cook the mushrooms in a pan until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the cooked chicken and mushrooms to the crepe batter.
Step 4: Pour the batter into a hot pan to make the crepes.
Step 5: Serve the crepes hot with your choice of accompaniment.

title: Carbonara Pizza
steps: Prepare the pizza dough according to package instructions.
Cook the bacon until crispy and remove from heat.
Stretch the pizza dough in a pizza mold.
Add tomato sauce over the dough.
Add mozzarella cheese over the tomato sauce.
Place cooked bacon on top of the mozzarella cheese.
Bake the pizza in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.

title: Vegetable Quiche
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Spread the pasta brisa dough in a quiche mold.
Poke the dough with a fork and bake for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, sauté the onion and red bell pepper until they are soft.
Add the spinach to the soffrito and cook until it is tender.
Mix the eggs and milk in a bowl.
Rallie the cheese and add it to the egg and milk mixture.
Pour the mixture over the cooked dough and add the vegetable filling.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chicken and Mayonnaise Sandwich
steps: Cut the bread in half.
Spread mayonnaise on both halves of the bread.
Add chicken slices to one half of the bread.
Cover with the other half of the bread.

title: Beef Fajitas
steps: Cut the beef into thin strips.
Chop the onion and bell pepper.
Peel and chop the garlic.
Heat oil in a large skillet.
Add the beef, onion, bell pepper, and garlic to the skillet.
Cook until the beef is browned on all sides.
Add chopped tomato and cook for a few minutes more.
Serve fajitas in individual plates with warm wheat tortillas.

title: Chicken Tacos (Tinga)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it's well done.
Step 2: Blend the tomatoes, onion, garlic and peppers to make the sauce.

title: Vegetable and Rice Burritos
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Warm the black beans in a pot until they are tender.
Grill the red peppers and onion in a pan until they are soft.
Add diced tomatoes to the pan and cook for a few minutes more.
Warm the corn tortillas in a pan.

title: Sushi Variado (Maki and Nigiri)
steps: Prepare sushi rice.
Cut raw fish into small pieces.
Place a nori seaweed sheet over a bamboo mat.
Spread the sushi rice over the nori, leaving a space uncovered at the top.
Place the raw fish pieces on top of the rice.
Add wasabi and soja sauce to taste.
Roll the nori with the help of the bamboo mat to form a roll.
Cut the roll into individual portions.

title: Potatoes al Importance
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into large pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan.
Add the potatoes to the pan and fry until they are golden brown on all sides.
Remove the potatoes from the pan with a slotted spoon and drain them over paper towels to remove excess oil.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Grilled Filet Mignon and Brie Cheese Toast
steps: Cook the filet mignon on the grill until it is well done.
Cut the bread into slices and toast them.
Rasp the brie cheese over the toasted bread.
Place a slice of cooked filet mignon on top of each toasted bread with brie cheese.
Serve hot.

title: Toasted Escalivada and Anchovies
steps: Step 1: Prepare the escalivada.
Step 2: Place the anchovies on top of the toast.

title: Spinach and Pine Nut Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Cook the spinach until it is tender.
Step 2: Mix the cooked spinach with pine nuts and form croquettes.

title: Croquettes of Stew
steps: Step 1: Cooking the beef and potatoes.
Step 2: Grinding the cooked beef and potatoes.
Step 3: Mixing the ground meat with chopped onion.
Step 4: Forming balls with the mixture and frying them in hot oil.

title: Shrimp Fritters
steps: Clean the shrimp and cut them into small pieces.
Peel the onion and finely chop it.
In a hot skillet with oil, sauté the onion until it is transparent.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Remove from heat and add chopped parsley.
Grind the shrimp with the onion in a food processor or blender until you get a homogeneous mixture.
Add flour and mix well to form a dough.
Make small balls with the mixture, pass through beaten egg and then through breadcrumbs.
Fry the fritters in abundant hot oil until they are golden brown on all sides.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.

title: Fried Cheese Fritters
steps: Mix the flour with water until a dough forms.
Add cheese to the dough and mix well.
Make balls with the cheese dough.
Fry the balls in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Vegetable Dips with Yogurt Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cut the red peppers, carrots, and onion into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix the natural yogurt with minced garlic and fresh mint.
Step 3: Place the vegetables in a bowl and add the yogurt sauce.

title: Variety of Pâtés Table
steps: Step 1: Prepare the ingredients.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a large bowl.
Step 3: Serve the pâtés on a table and garnish with fresh herbs.

title: Carpaccio of mushrooms and parmesan
steps: Clean the mushrooms and cut them into thin slices.
Arrange on a plate, sprinkle with parmesan cheese and serve.

title: Tomato and Avocado Tartar
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes and avocados into small cubes.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Zorongollo extremeño (salad of peppers)
steps: Chop the peppers and onion into small pieces.
Mix the peppers and onion with olives.
Add olive oil and vinegar to taste.

title: Potatoes with Aliñas from Cádiz
steps: Cook the potatoes in water with salt until they are tender.
Once cooked, peel and cut them into large pieces.
In a mortar, crush the garlic cloves without skin.
Add the extra virgin olive oil to the mortar and mix well with the garlic.
Add the cooked and seasoned potatoes to the garlic and oil mixture.
Mix everything until the potatoes are well coated with the mixture.

title: Bread of Eggplant in Tempura
steps: Cut the eggplant into bread slices.
Prepare the tempura mixture by mixing flour and water.
Dip the bread slices of eggplant in the tempura mixture.
Fry the bread slices in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Fried Pepper Sticks
steps: Cut the peppers into sticks and remove the seeds.
Dredge the pepper strips in flour.
Fry the strips in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain them on paper towels to remove excess grease.

title: Stuffed Mushrooms with Cheese
steps: Clean the mushrooms and cut off the top to make a hole.
Grate the cheese and fill each mushroom with it.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.

title: Mussels in Cream Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the butter in a large skillet until melted.
Step 2: Add the mussels and cook until they open.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic and cream of milk. Cook until the mixture thickens.
Step 4: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Coquinas in marinara sauce
steps: Step 1: In a pan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the coquinas, cook until they open.
Step 3: Add the tomato pulp, sweet paprika, and white wine. Cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Shrimp on the Grill
steps: Step 1: Clean the shrimp and dry them with paper towels.
Step 2: Brush the shrimp with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Step 3: Place the shrimp on a hot grill and cook for 3 minutes per side or until they are lightly browned.

title: Fried Octopus
steps: Clean the octopus and cut it into small pieces.
Put flour in a plate and season with salt and pepper.
Pass the octopus pieces through the flour until they are completely covered.
Fry the octopus in hot oil for a few minutes until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Birds Egg Fried
steps: Heat a pan with a little oil.
Add the birds eggs and fry until they are golden brown on the outside but still liquid inside.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Orujo Cake
steps: Mix flour with sugar and butter until a homogeneous dough is obtained.
Add orujos to the mixture and knead well.
Stretch the dough in a tart mold and bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Chocolate Ice Cream
steps: Melt the black chocolate in a bain-marie.
Add milk gradually while stirring with a spoon or blender until you get a homogeneous mixture.
Let the mixture cool down in the fridge for at least two hours.
Once the mixture is chilled, pour it into the freezer and follow the manufacturer's instructions to make the ice cream.

title: Turrón Ice Cream
steps: Melt the turrón in a bain-marie.
Add the liquid cream and mix well.
Incorporate the milk slowly, stirring constantly.
Chill in the refrigerator for several hours before serving.

title: Orange Sorbet
steps: Peel the oranges and squeeze the juice.
Mix the orange juice with sugar until it dissolves.
Freeze the mixture in a suitable container for sorbets.

title: Tropical Fruit Salad
steps: Cut the strawberry, pineapple, kiwi, and papaya into small pieces.
Mix all the fruits in a large bowl.
Serve the tropical fruit salad immediately.

title: Strawberry Carpaccio with Balsamic Vinegar
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into thin slices.
Arrange the strawberry slices on a plate, without overlapping.
Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Flambéed Banana
steps: Peel the bananas and cut them into slices.
In a pan, heat some rum until it's hot but not boiling.
Add the banana slices to the pan and cook until they're golden brown on both sides.
Remove the bananas from the pan and serve them hot.

title: Tarte Tatin of Apples
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Peel and cut the apples into quarters.
Place the apples in a pan with the honey and cook until they are tender.
Roll out the tart pastry in a tart mold.
Place the caramelized apples in the center of the mold, covering the pastry.
Fold the edges of the pastry inward to cover the apples.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the tarte is golden.

title: White Chocolate Brownie
steps: Melt the white chocolate with butter in a double boiler.
Add sugar and mix until well incorporated.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour and mix until no lumps remain.
Pour the mixture into a brownie mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 25 minutes.

title: Musical Bites (Nuts and Chocolate)
steps: Melt the black chocolate in a bain-marie.
Mix the toasted nuts with the melted chocolate.
Make balls with the mixture and let them cool.

title: Almond Squares
steps: Step 1: Soak the almonds in water for at least 4 hours.
Step 2: Drain the almonds and grind them until a paste is obtained.
Step 3: Mix the almond paste with sugar until a homogeneous mass is obtained.
Step 4: Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Step 5: Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Butter Tea Cookies
steps: Mix the butter with the glazed sugar until a light batter is formed.
Add flour gradually and mix well to form a dough.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake for 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.

title: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix ripe bananas with sugar until a smooth paste is obtained.
Add eggs one by one and mix well after each addition.
Add flour and chemical yeast gradually, mixing carefully.
Pour the dough into a greased and floured cake pan.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.

title: Wine Buns
steps: Mix the flour with red wine until a homogeneous dough is obtained.
Add sugar to the mixture and knead for a few minutes.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.
Drain the buns on paper towels and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Oil Buns
steps: Step 1: Mix the oil with flour.
Step 2: Make balls with the mixture.

title: Pasta Salad with Pink Sauce
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
Cut the tomatoes and onion into small pieces.
Mix the cooked pasta with the tomatoes, onion, and olives.
Prepare the pink sauce and mix it with the salad.

title: Lentil Salad with Feta Cheese
steps: Cook the lentils according to package instructions.
Cut the feta cheese into cubes.
Mix the cooked lentils with the feta cheese and other desired ingredients such as tomato, cucumber, or lettuce.

title: Empanada (white beans and cod)
steps: Step 1: Soak the white beans for at least 8 hours.
Step 2: Cook the white beans until they are tender. Let cool down.
Step 3: Salt the cod if necessary. Break it into large pieces.
Step 4: Mix the white beans and cod in a large bowl.
Step 5: Add olive oil, vinegar, and chopped garlic to taste. Mix well.
Step 6: Let the salad rest in the refrigerator for at least one hour before serving.

title: Chickpea Salad with Cumin
steps: Cook the chickpeas according to package instructions.
Chop the onion and red bell pepper.
In a bowl, mix the cooked chickpeas, chopped onion, chopped red bell pepper, halved olives, and garlic.
Add ground cumin to taste and mix well all ingredients.
Serve the salad chilled or at room temperature.

title: Tomato and Sardine Salad
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the tomatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Open a small can of sardines and drain the water. Mix with the tomatoes.

title: Mango and Shrimp Salad
steps: Cut the mango into small pieces.
Cook the shrimp and chill them before adding to the salad.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.

title: Rice Salad with Pineapple
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Cut the pineapple, carrot, and red pepper into small pieces.
Mix the cooked rice with the other ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and vinegar to taste. Mix well.

title: Quinoa Salad
steps: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
Cut the tomato, red pepper, and onion into small pieces.
Wash and finely chop the mint.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked quinoa, tomato, red pepper, onion, and mint.
Squeeze the lemon and add the juice along with olive oil to the bowl. Mix well all ingredients.

title: Cauliflower Salad with Raw Romaine Lettuce Shredded
steps: Shred the cauliflower and red bell peppers.
Peel and shred the carrots.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.

title: Potato and Sausage Salad (German)
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes and sausages separately.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients in a bowl.

title: Potatoes (milk and parsley)
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
In a pan, heat the milk and add the cooked potatoes. Simmer over medium heat until a cream forms.
Add chopped parsley and cook for a few minutes more.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Apio and Cabbage Pure
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the apios and cabbage.
Step 2: Cook the apios and cabbage in water until they are tender.
Step 3: Beat the cooked apios and cabbage to obtain a smooth puree.
Step 4: Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Mushrooms in White Wine
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and cut them into quarters.
Step 2: In a large pan, heat some oil and sauté the garlic until it's golden.
Step 3: Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until they're tender.
Step 4: Add the carrot, chopped, and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Add the white wine and let it reduce by half.
Step 6: Add the parsley, chopped, and mix well. Serve hot.

title: Steamed Beans with Mint
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a pan.
Step 2: Add beans and sauté until tender.
Step 3: Add chopped mint and salt.
Step 4: Mix well and serve.

title: Roasted Carrots with Cumin
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Peel and cut the carrots into slices.
Place the carrots in a bowl, add cumin and mix.
Arrange the carrots on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until tender.

title: Fried Pumpkin with Garlic
steps: Step 1: Cut the pumpkin into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.

title: Green Beans with Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cook the green beans until they are tender.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped tomatoes in a pan with a little oil.
Step 3: Add the cooked green beans to the pan and stir to combine well with the tomatoes.

title: Roasted Sweet Peppers
steps: Preheat the oven to 150°C.
Wash and dry the red peppers.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and add enough olive oil to cover them.
Bake for about two hours or until they are tender and the skin is soft.

title: Salute Rice with Garlic and Parsley
steps: Heat oil in a large pan.
Add rice and cook until slightly browned.
Add minced garlic and cook for a few minutes more.
Add water or vegetable broth, salt to taste, and cook until the rice is cooked.
Serve hot and sprinkle with chopped parsley.

title: Green Salad Basic (Lettuce and Scallion)
steps: Wash and chop the lettuce.
Finely chop the scallion.

title: Almond Soup (Sweet or Salty)
steps: Step 1: Soak the almonds in water for at least 4 hours.
Step 2: Add the soaked almonds to a pot along with the water and salt to taste. If desired, add also sugar or sweetener for a sweet soup.
Step 3: Cook over medium heat until the almonds are soft.
Step 4: Blend the mixture with an immersion blender until you get a creamy texture. If necessary, add more water to achieve the desired consistency.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tapioca Soup
steps: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
Add tapioca and let it cook until it dissolves completely.
Add salt to taste.
Let the soup simmer for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Pea Cream with Mint
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic until they are soft.
Step 2: Add the peas and cook for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth and let it simmer.
Step 4: Add the mint and cook along with the other ingredients.
Step 5: Blend the soup to achieve a creamy texture.

title: Lentil Cream
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in oil until golden.
Step 2: Add the rinsed and dried lentils, stir to absorb the flavors of the onion and garlic.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth and sweet paprika, bring to a boil and then reduce heat for 25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Step 4: Remove from heat and add salt to taste. Blend everything with a blender until smooth.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious Lentil Cream that is vegan and gluten-free.

title: Consommé with Sherry
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion in a pot with a little oil until it is transparent.
Step 2: Add the chicken cut into pieces and brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the garlic, sweet paprika, and laurel. Simmer for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add sherry and let it reduce a bit.
Step 5: Add water until the ingredients are covered and bring to a boil. Cook for at least an hour.
Step 6: Remove from heat, strain the consommé and season with salt to taste.

title: Zurracapote (wine drink)
steps: Put red wine and sugar in a pot.
Heat at medium heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
Let cool down and serve in cups or glasses.

title: Barley Water
steps: Add barley to soak for the entire night.
Strain and wash the barley.

title: Apple Juice Natural
steps: Peel the apples and cut them into pieces.
Place the apple pieces in a juicer or fruit press.
Juice or process until smooth and uniform juice is obtained.
Serve immediately.

title: Green Pepper Sauce
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the onions.
Step 2: Wash and finely chop the green peppers.

title: Blue Cheese Sauce
steps: Melt the blue cheese in a pan over medium heat
Add milk and stir until a homogeneous mixture is obtained
Remove from heat and serve hot

title: Pizza Marinara (tomato, garlic, oregano)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to high temperature.
Step 2: Mix pizza dough with necessary ingredients and spread it on a baking sheet.
Step 3: Add tomato sauce and distribute evenly over the dough.
Step 4: Add garlic and oregano on top of the tomato sauce.
Step 5: Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked.

title: Pizza Prosciutto (cooked Ham)
steps: Prepare the pizza dough according to package instructions.
Stretch the dough in a pizza mold and add tomato sauce.
Add mozzarella cheese and cooked prosciutto in thin strips.
Cook the pizza in a preheated oven at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.

title: Fettuccine Alfredo
steps: Cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
In a pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the cream to the pan and mix until it integrates with the butter.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan and mix well so that it is well covered with the Alfredo sauce.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Spaghetti with Genovese Pesto
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a bowl, mix the Genovese pesto with cooked and hot spaghetti.

title: Lasagna with Chicken and Vegetables
steps: Cook the chicken and vegetables in a pan until they are golden.
Mix the cooked pasta with the tomato sauce and melted cheese.
Place a layer of the pasta mixture in a baking dish, followed by a layer of chicken and vegetables.
Repeat the previous steps until finishing with a layer of pasta on top.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until the lasagna is golden.

title: Tortellini in Broth (in broth)
steps: Cook the tortellini according to package instructions.
Heat the chicken broth in a pot until it boils.
Add cooked tortellini to the broth and serve.

title: Risotto with Butternut Squash and Gorgonzola
steps: Heat the butter in a pan and add the chopped onion. Cook until it's soft.
Add the rice and cook for a few minutes until it's lightly browned.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Pour in the white wine and cook until it's evaporated.
Add the vegetable broth little by little, stirring constantly. Continue adding broth until the rice is cooked.
Add the butternut squash cubed and cook until it's soft.
Incorporate the gorgonzola and mix well until it's fully melted.
Season with black pepper to taste.

title: Chicken with Lemon (Chinese Style)
steps: Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, garlic and ginger for 30 minutes.
Cook the chicken in a pan until it is golden brown on all sides.
Add soy sauce and cook for another 5 minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Beef with Broccoli and Oyster Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cook the beef until it is golden brown on all sides.
Step 2: Add broccoli and cook until tender.
Step 3: Add oysters and cook until they are well incorporated into the sauce.

title: Peking Duck (with pancakes)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Mix all the ingredients of the hoisin sauce and reserve.
Step 3: Dust and fry the duck until it is golden brown.
Step 4: Place the duck in a baking dish, add the hoisin sauce, and bake for 20 minutes.
Step 5: Prepare the pancakes according to package instructions.

title: Chicken Korma (Smooth with Almonds)
steps: Cook the onion, garlic, and ginger in a pan until they are golden.
Add the chicken and cook until it is golden brown on all sides.
Add the smooth curry powder and cook for an additional minute.
Add the milk and coconut cream. Mix well.
Cook over medium heat for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked.
Add the almonds and fresh cilantro. Cook for an additional minute.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Butter Chicken (Chicken in Butter Sauce)
steps: Cook the chicken until it is golden.
Add butter and coconut cream.
Cook over low heat for 20 minutes.

title: Fish and Chips (Fish and Chips)
steps: Step 1: Cut the potatoes into pieces and fry them until they are golden.
Step 2: Sauté the fish in a hot pan until it is cooked through.

title: Shepherd's Pie (Lamb Pie)
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
In a pan, brown the lamb together with the onion and mushrooms.
Add gluten-free flour and cook for a few minutes.
Add water or beef broth and reduce until a thick sauce is obtained.
Place the meat mixture in a baking dish, add green beans and cover with mashed potatoes.
Bake at 200°C for 20 minutes or until the surface is golden brown.

title: Bangers and Mash
steps: Step 1: Cook the sausages until they are golden brown and cooked.
Step 2: Boil the potatoes until they are soft, then mash with a potato masher.
Step 3: Serve the sausages over the mashed potatoes.

title: Pork Schnitzel (Viennese Cutlet)
steps: Season the pork cutlets with salt and pepper.
Dip each cutlet in beaten eggs and then coat with all-purpose flour.
Fry the pork cutlets in a hot skillet with oil until golden brown and cooked.
Serve hot with salad or fried potatoes.

title: Beef Stew in Guinness
steps: Cook the beef in a pot until it is browned on all sides.
Add chopped onion and garlic, cook until they are soft.
Add Guinness and beef broth, bring to a boil.
Add large potatoes, cut into big pieces and cook until they are soft.
Thicken the sauce with flour dissolved in cold water.
Serve

title: Pulled Pork Sandwich
steps: Cook the pork until it's tender and shreds easily.
Prepare the hamburger with the hamburger bun.
Add the pulled pork to the hamburger.

title: Short Ribs
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Step 2: Season the beef short ribs with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chicken Buffalo Wings (Spicy)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Mix the chicken with Buffalo sauce.
Step 3: Place the chicken wings on a baking sheet and cook for 25 minutes.

title: Macaroni with Cheese (American Mac & Cheese)
steps: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, prepare a cheese sauce and mix with cooked macaroni.

title: Jambalaya (Cajun Rice with Chicken and Shrimp)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and bell peppers in oil until they are tender.
Step 2: Add the rice and sauté for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the tomato and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the chicken and shrimp, and cook until they are almost done.
Step 5: Add the chicken broth and let it simmer. Then, reduce the heat and let it cook for 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.

title: Shrimp Fajitas
steps: Step 1: Cut the bell peppers and onion into thin strips.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Step 4: Add the shrimp, bell peppers, and onion to the skillet. Cook until they are golden brown.
Step 5: Add the chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Step 6: Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chiles in Nogada
steps: Step 1: Cook the green chilies until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix the nogada sauce with milk and cinnamon.
Step 3: Sauté the onion, garlic, and apple until they are golden brown.
Step 4: Add the brown sugar and vinegar to the sautéed mixture.
Step 5: Fill the chilies with the apple mixture and cover them with the nogada sauce.
Step 6: Sprinkle ground bread over the chilies before serving.

title: Chicken Tamales
steps: Cook the rice until it is smooth.
Grind the chicken in a blender or food processor.
Mix the ground chicken with cooked rice, garlic, and smoked paprika.
Stuff corn leaves with the chicken and rice mixture.
Tie the tamales with kitchen twine.

title: Tortilla Soup (Main Course)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and bell pepper until they are golden.
Step 2: Add the tomatoes and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 3: Add the chicken broth and let it simmer.
Step 4: Cut the corn tortillas into strips and add them to the soup. Cook until they are tender.

title: Feijoada (Black Beans with Pork)
steps: Cook the black beans until they are tender.
Sauté the onion and garlic in hot oil.
Add the pork cut into small pieces and cook until browned.
Add the black beans, sweet paprika, laurel, and salt to taste. Cook everything together for a few more minutes.

title: Grilled Short Rib (Short Ribs on the Grill)
steps: Preheat the grill to high heat.
Season the short ribs with coarse salt and black pepper.
Place the meat on the grill and cook for 10-15 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and let rest before serving.

title: Chicken Cutlet with Napolitan Sauce (Tomato and Cheese)
steps: Season the meat with salt and pepper.
Pass the meat through beaten eggs and then breadcrumbs.
Fry the meat in a hot pan until it's golden brown.
Remove the meat from the pan and place it on a plate lined with parchment paper to remove excess fat.
In the same pan, add chopped tomatoes and cook until the water is released.
Place the fried meat on a baking sheet, cover it with tomato sauce and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Bake at medium-high temperature for a few minutes until the cheese is melted and golden brown.

title: Chicken Ají Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Blend the yellow peppers with the onion, egg, and tomato.
Step 3: Add the cooked paprika to the blended mixture.
Step 4: In a large pot, fry the eggs until they are golden brown on both sides.
Step 5: Add the cooked chicken and the ají sauce blend to the pot with the fried eggs.
Step 6: Mix everything well and add milk until you get a creamy consistency.

title: Causa Limeña (Potato and Tuna)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Mix the cooked potatoes with the tuna.
Add other ingredients such as onion, pepper, and olive oil to taste.
Form a puree with the mixture and let it cool in the refrigerator for a few hours.
Serve the causa chilled.
