title: Beef Shredded Meat Arepas
steps: Cook the beef shredded meat until it is tender.
Grind the corn flour to obtain a soft dough.
Add water to the dough and knead until obtaining an uniform consistency.
Make balls with the dough and flatten them to form the arepas.
Cook the arepas in a hot pan until they are golden brown on both sides.
Fill the arepas with the beef shredded meat and serve.

title: Bibimbap (Korean Rice with Meat and Egg)
steps: Cook the rice.
Cook the meat to taste and cut it into small pieces.
Beat the eggs and cook them in a pan.
Peel the carrots.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add soy sauce spirit and mix well.

title: Chicken Teriyaki
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and mix with teriyaki sauce.
Fry them in a hot pan until they are golden brown on all sides.

title: Nasi Goreng (Indonesian Fried Rice)
steps: Cook the rice until it is tender.
Season and pepper the chicken, then fry in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on all sides. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until they are golden.
Add cooked rice to the pan with onion and garlic, stir well to combine with the oil in the pan.
Add soy sauce and fried chicken that we had reserved, stir everything together until it is well mixed.
Serve hot.

title: Bruschetta with Tomato and Basil
steps: Cuts the bread into thin slices and toasts them.
Washes the tomatoes and cuts them into small pieces.
Chops the fresh basil.
Mixes the tomatoes with the chopped basil.
Once the bread slices are toasted, rub a little garlic on them.
Places the tomato-basil mixture on top of the toasted bread.

title: Focaccia with Rosemary
steps: Mix flour and water to form a dough.
Add yeast and mix well.
Let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Add rosemary and salt, knead again.
Stretch the dough into a mold and bake at 200 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Arancini of cheese (fried rice balls)
steps: Cook the rice and let it cool.
Mix the rice with cheese and form balls.
Pass the balls through beaten eggs and fry them in hot oil.

title: Bresaola Carpaccio with Rucula
steps: Freeze the bresaola for a few hours to make it easier to slice.
Slice the bresaola into thin strips and arrange them on a plate.
Wash and dry the rucula and place it over the slices of bresaola.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.

title: Beef Tonnato (Beef with tuna sauce)
steps: Cook the beef until it is well done.
Grind the canned tuna with mayonnaise and chopped onion.
Add red peppers and capers to the tuna grinder.
Slice the cooked beef into thin strips and serve with tuna sauce on top.

title: Falafel (chickpea patties)
steps: Soak the chickpeas for several hours.
Cook the onion and garlic until they are soft.
Grind the chickpeas, onion, and garlic in a food processor.
Add chickpea flour, parsley, cumin, and smoked paprika to the chickpea mixture.
Form patties with the mixture and fry them in oil until they are golden brown.

title: Labneh (Yogurt Cheese)
steps: Strain the yogurt in a colander for several hours to remove as much liquid as possible.
Add salt to taste and mix well.
Serve cold with bread or vegetables.

title: Potato and Pea Samosas
steps: Peel and cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Mix the cooked potatoes with the peas, salt and pepper to taste.
Fill the samosa dough with the potato and pea mixture.
Close the samosas and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Vegetable Pakoras (Chickpea Flour)
steps: Grind the chickpeas into a paste.
Add smoked paprika, garlic, and onion chopped.
Incorporate parsley chopped.
Form patties with the mixture and fry in hot oil.

title: Summer Rolls with Shrimp (Rice Paper)
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice and let it cool.
Step 2: Mix the cooked rice with chopped shrimp.

title: Chicken Satay with Peanut Sauce
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and mix with soy sauce and curry.
Grind the peanuts until a paste is obtained.
Form the satay of chicken and cook on a grill or in the oven.
Serve the satay accompanied by peanut sauce.

title: Naan Bread with Garlic
steps: Mix the all-purpose flour, garlic, and yeast in a bowl.
Add water until forming a smooth dough.
Let it rise for 1 hour.
Divide the dough into portions and shape them into Naan bread.
Cook over a hot skillet until they are golden brown.

title: Jalapenos stuffed with cheese (Poppers)
steps: Cut jalapenos in half and remove seeds.
Fill each half with cheese.
Dredge stuffed jalapenos in breadcrumbs until coated.

title: Corn Dogs (Corn on the Cob)
steps: Prepare cornmeal according to package instructions.
Dip each hot dog into prepared cornmeal.
Fry hot dogs in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Melted Cheese with Chorizo (Mexican)
steps: Heat the chorizo in a pan until it's cooked. Remove from heat.
Add the cheese to the same pan and mix with the chorizo until it melts completely.

title: Shrimp Ceviche
steps: Clean and cut the shrimp into small pieces.
Squeeze the limes and mix the juice with the shrimp.
Cut the red onion and red bell pepper into small pieces and add to the bowl of shrimp.
Add chopped cilantro and salt to taste.
Mix everything well and let it rest for 15 minutes before serving.

title: Tostadas of Tinga Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Grind the chiles, onion, and garlic in a blender.
Fry the mixture of chiles, onion, and garlic in a pan with oil.
Add the crushed tomato to the pan and cook until reduced.
Shred the cooked chicken and add it to the pan.
Cook the eggs scrambled separately.

title: Empanadas criollas (meat)
steps: Step 1: Mix the meat with the other ingredients.
Step 2: Knead the wheat flour and water dough.
Step 3: Fill the empanadas with the meat mixture.

title: Cheese Bread (Brazilian Cheese Bread)
steps: Mix the melted butter with hot water.
Add tapioca flour and mix well until a dough forms.
Incorporate raked cheese into the mixture and knead until well combined.
Make balls with the dough and place them in a cupcake mold.
Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Provoleta with Oregano
steps: Cut the provolone into thin slices.
Place the slices of provolone on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle fresh oregano over the cheese.
Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: New York Cheesecake (oven)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 170 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the flour with sugar in a bowl.
Step 3: Add eggs and beat until obtaining a homogeneous mixture.
Step 4: Incorporate milk cream and mix well.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into a cheesecake mold and bake for 1 hour.
Step 6: Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Muffins
steps: Melt the chocolate with butter in a bain-marie.
Mix eggs with sugar until a foamy mixture is obtained.
Add the melted chocolate mixture to the egg and sugar mixture.
Incorporate flour, sifted along with yeast.
Fill muffin molds with the previous mixture.
Bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

title: Donuts glazed classic
steps: Mix the flour, yeast, and sugar in a bowl.
Add eggs and butter and knead until you get a smooth dough.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Cut the dough into donut shapes and fry them in hot oil.
Remove the donuts from the oil and let them cool before glazing.

title: Cinnamon Rolls
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Spread rolls flour over a floured surface.
Apply butter on the dough.
Sprinkle powdered cinnamon and sugar on the dough.
Roll the dough carefully.

title: Blondie (White Chocolate Brownie)
steps: Melt the butter with white chocolate in a bain-marie.
Add sugar and mix until well combined.
Incorporate flour and mix until a homogeneous batter is obtained.
Pour the mixture into a brownie mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 25 minutes.
Let cool before serving.

title: Key Lime Pie
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the butter with sugar until a light batter is formed.
Add eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour and mix until a uniform dough is achieved.
Pour the mixture into a tart mold and bake for 25 minutes.
Let cool before serving.

title: Pavlova of Red Fruits
steps: Preheat the oven to 150 degrees Fahrenheit.
Beat the egg whites until firm peaks form.
Add sugar slowly while continuing to beat.
Bake the mixture in a mold for one hour and a half.
Let cool down and decorate with red fruits before serving.

title: Baklava (Phyllo and Pistachio)
steps: Spread the phyllo dough.
Cover the base of the mold with a layer of pistachios.
Cut the dough into triangles and place them over the pistachios.
Paint the surface with a little water and sugar.
Bake at 180°C for 30 minutes or until golden.
Once baked, soak in a mixture of water and honey.

title: Cannoli Sicilian
steps: Prepare the cannoli dough according to package instructions.
Fill the cannoli tubes with a mixture of sweetened ricotta, vanilla extract, and sugar.
Dip each cannoli's ends in ground pistachios.
Fry the cannoli in hot oil until golden.
Let cool on parchment paper before serving.

title: Pistachio Gelato
steps: Step 1: Mix pistachios with milk in a blender until a smooth paste is obtained.
Step 2: Add sugar to the mixture and blend again until it dissolves completely.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into an appropriate ice cream container and freeze for at least 4 hours.
Step 4: Remove from freezer, whip with hand mixer or large spoon to break down ice crystals that have formed.
Step 5: Put back in freezer and let cool for another 2 hours before serving.

title: Churros with Dulce de Leche
steps: Mix the flour with water and salt to form a dough.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan until it is well hot.
Shape the churros using a piping bag or a pastry bag.
Fry the churros in the hot oil until they are golden.
Remove the churros from the oil and dust them with paper towels to remove excess oil.
Roll the churros in glazed sugar.
Serve the churros with dulce de leche on one side.

title: Three Leches Cake
steps: Mix eggs and sugar until well incorporated.
Add flour gradually and mix until a smooth dough is obtained.
Bake the mixture in a cake pan for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Mix evaporated milk, cream of milk, and sweetened condensed milk in a bowl.
Poke the cake with a fork and pour the three leches mixture over the cake.
Let the cake cool before serving.

title: Mochi Ice Cream
steps: Soak the glutinous rice in water until it is soft.
Add the rice flour and mix well.
Let the mixture cool down in a mold.
Cut the mochi into small portions.
Serve each portion of mochi with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

title: Gulab Jamun (Doughnuts in Syrup)
steps: Mix the flour with milk and butter until a soft dough forms.
Make small dough balls.
Heat the sugar in water until it dissolves and add rose water.
Fry the dough balls in hot oil until they are golden.
Soak the fried dough balls in the prepared syrup.

title: Hummingbird Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the flour, sugar, mashed bananas, and vegetable oil in a large bowl.
Add chopped nuts and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake for 40 minutes or until a skewer inserted comes out clean.

title: Cobb Salad (chicken, bacon, egg, blue cheese)
steps: Cook the chicken and cut it into strips.
Fry the bacon until crispy.
Boil the eggs until they are hard and cool them before cutting them in half.
In a large salad bowl, mix together romaine lettuce, cherry tomatoes, celery sticks, blue cheese crumbled, cooked chicken, crispy bacon, and hard-boiled egg halves.
To serve, place the salad mixture in individual plates and dress with desired dressing.

title: Asian Collard Greens Salad (Sesame)
steps: Cut the Chinese Collard Greens into small pieces and reserve.
Mix Sesame Seeds, Soja, and a little bit of minced garlic in a small bowl.
Add Olive Oil to the bowl and mix well to create the dressing.
In a large bowl, combine the Chinese Collard Greens with the dressing and mix until the greens are well coated.

title: Fattoush (Lebanese Salad with Fried Bread)
steps: Cut the red peppers and tomatoes into small pieces.
Wash the fresh mint and cut it finely.
Heat a little olive oil in a pan and fry the pita bread slices until they are golden.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.

title: Larb Gai (Thai Chicken Salad)
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and cook until it's cooked. Let cool.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add the cooked chicken to the ingredient mixture.
Stir everything together well.
Serve the salad cold.

title: Som Tam (Green Papaya Salad)
steps: Chop the green papaya and mix it with garlic, red pepper, and rice vinegar.
Add fish sauce to taste.

title: Shopska Salad (Bulgarian)
steps: Cut the tomatoes and red peppers into large pieces.
Finely chop the onion.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Rice Noodle Salad (Cold)
steps: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Cut the red bell peppers, carrots, and onion into small pieces.
Mix the cooked noodles with the chopped vegetables and olives.
Add vinegar and olive oil to taste for dressing the salad.

title: Chicken Chinese Salad (Mandarin and Almonds)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and let it cool.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Corn and Bean Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the beans until they are tender.
Step 2: Mix cooked corn with beans and serve.

title: Roasted Pumpkin Salad with Feta Cheese
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and roast it in a baking sheet for 25 minutes or until tender.
In a large bowl, mix the spinach leaves with the roasted pumpkin pieces.
Add crumbled feta cheese to the salad mixture.
Serve Immediately

title: Rice with Jasmine, Steamed
steps: Wash the rice jasmine until the water runs clear.
Place the rice in a pot with water (the amount of water will depend on the type of pot and the amount of rice) and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Cook over medium-high heat until the water starts to boil. At that moment, reduce the heat to minimum and cover the pot.
Let cook without stirring or opening the pot for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let rest for another 10 minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Fried Rice with Egg
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add eggs and stir until cooked.
Add cooked rice to the pan with eggs and mix well.
Cook for a few minutes more until everything is well mixed.

title: Kimchi (Spicy Korean Kimchi)
steps: 1. Cut the Chinese cabbage into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
2. Add the finely chopped pierrot, grated ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sugar, and salt to the bowl with the Chinese cabbage.
3. Mix everything well so that the ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Cover the bowl with a lid or transparent film and let ferment in a cool place for 2-3 days.

title: Pak Choi Stir-Fried with Garlic
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the pak choi into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and finely chop the garlic.
Step 3: Heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic to the pan and cook until it's golden brown.
Step 5: Add the pak choi cut into the pan and stir-fry for a few minutes until it's tender.
Step 6: Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Sauteed Spinach with Garlic
steps: Heat oil in a large skillet.
Add minced garlic and cook until golden.
Add washed and chopped spinach to the skillet.
Cook until the spinach is tender, stirring constantly.

title: Potato Pure with Roasted Garlic
steps: Peel and chop the potatoes into small pieces.
Boil the potatoes until they are tender.
In a pan, heat olive oil and add whole garlic cloves. Fry them until golden.
Remove the garlic from the pan and mash in a mortar or food processor along with cooked potatoes to obtain a smooth puree.
Add fried garlic and its oil to the potato mixture. Mix well all ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Creamed Corn
steps: Step 1: Cook the corn until it is soft.
Step 2: Mix the cream with cooked corn and cook over low heat until thickened.

title: Cornbread
steps: Mix cornmeal, flour and eggs.
Add milk and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a bread mold.

title: Hush Puppies (cornbread fried balls)
steps: Mix the ingredients in a bowl until forming a thick dough.
Cover the cornbread balls with breadcrumbs.
Fry the cornbread balls in hot oil for a few minutes until they are golden brown.

title: Hash Browns (Potatoes)
steps: Peel and grate the potatoes.
Remove excess water from the potato mixture.
Form patties with your hands or using a specific mold.
Fry in hot oil until golden brown on both sides.

title: Wonton Soup
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and pumpkin in a pot.
Step 2: Add the carrot and cook until it's soft.
Step 3: Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 4: Add the wontons and cook until they float in the soup.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Hot and Sour Soup
steps: Step 1: Soak the dried red chilies in hot water for 30 minutes.
Step 2: Finely chop the onion, garlic, and ginger.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large pot and add the chopped onion. Cook until it is transparent.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Step 5: Add the chopped ginger and cook for another minute.
Step 6: Add the soaked dried red chilies, along with their soaking water, to the oil and cook for a few minutes until they are soft.
Step 7: Add the rice vinegar and chicken broth. Bring to a boil and then reduce the heat to let the soup simmer slowly for 15 minutes.
Step 8: If desired, add some tofu or chicken pieces to give more flavor and body to the soup. Cook until they are cooked.

title: Clam Chowder (Clam Soup)
steps: Step 1: Cook the clams in a pot with water and a little salt for a few minutes until they open.
Step 2: Remove the clams from the heat and reserve the broth.
Step 3: In another pot, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Step 4: Add the potatoes cut into small pieces to the pot and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the fish cut into small pieces to the pot and cook until it is done.
Step 6: Incorporate the cream and the clam broth to the pot and let everything mix well.
Step 7: Add the clams and laurel to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 8: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Beet Soup (Vegetarian)
steps: Peel and finely chop the onion, pumpkin, carrot, beet, and garlic.
In a large pot, heat some oil and add the chopped vegetables. Cook over medium heat until they are tender.
Add the grated ginger and sweet paprika. Cook for a few minutes more.
Add the potato and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Remove from heat and stir in balsamic vinegar. Mix well.
Serve hot and enjoy your vegetarian beet soup.

title: Lentil Soup Dhal (India)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic, and ginger in a pot with a little oil until they are golden.
Step 2: Add the spices (curry powder, ground cumin, and sweet paprika) and cook for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the lentils and crushed tomato. Cook everything together for 20-25 minutes until the lentils are soft.
Step 4: Add enough water to cover the lentils, salt to taste, and let it simmer at medium heat for an additional 30 minutes.

title: Margarita (Cocktail)
steps: Mix tequila, lemon juice and Cointreau in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well until it's cold.
Strain the mixture into a glass rimmed with salt.
Serve Immediately.

title: Mango Lassi
steps: Peel and cut the mango into pieces.
Add the mango pieces to a blender along with yogurt and milk.
Blend until a smooth and creamy mixture is obtained.
Serve Immediately.

title: Matcha Latte
steps: Mix 1 teaspoon of matcha powder with a little warm water.
Heat the vegetable milk until it's hot but not boiling.
Pour the matcha mixture into a cup and then add the hot milk.

title: Homemade BBQ Sauce (BBQ)
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the tomatoes, onion, and garlic.
Step 2: In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden brown.
Step 3: Add the tomatoes, sweet paprika, hot paprika, balsamic vinegar, and honey. Cook over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
Step 4: Let the mixture cool down and blend it until you get a smooth sauce.

title: Pico de Gallo
steps: Cut the tomatoes into small pieces.
Peel and chop the onion and cut it into small pieces.
Peel and chop the garlic and cut it into small pieces.
Wash the cilantro and chop it finely.
Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add salt to taste and squeeze the juice of lemon over the mixture. Mix everything well.

title: Beef Bourguignon
steps: 1. Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a pan and brown the beef on all sides.
3. Remove the beef from the pan and add the onion, garlic, and mushroom chopped.
4. Cook until they are soft.
5. Add the beef back to the pan along with the red wine, carrot chopped, ginger grated, laurel, and thyme.
6. Cook at low heat for 2 hours or until the beef is tender.
7. Serve hot.

title: Chicken in Red Wine (Pollo al Vino)
steps: 1. Sauté the onion, garlic, and mushroom until they are golden.
2. Add ground pork and cook until it is well done.
3. Add chicken cut into pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
4. Add red wine and flour, mix well and let reduce the liquid.
5. Cover the pot and cook at medium-low heat for 2 hours or until the chicken is tender.

title: Cassoulet (White Bean and Duck Stew)
steps: Cook the white beans until they are tender.
Fry the pork meat and duck until browned, add the chopped onion and sauté until it is transparent.
Add the garlic, triturated tomato, and laurel. Cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked white beans and season with salt. Cook everything together for 20 minutes more.

title: Moules-frites (Mussels with Potatoes)
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large pot. Add the garlic and cook until golden.
Step 2: Add the mussels to the pot and cook until they open. Remove the mussels from the pot and reserve them.
Step 3: In the same pot, add the sliced potatoes and cook until they are golden. Add the white wine and cook until the alcohol evaporates.
Step 4: Return the mussels to the pot and mix everything together to combine flavors. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Hachis Parmentier (French Meat Pie)
steps: Step 1: Cook the ground meat with chopped onion until it is golden.
Step 2: Add beef broth and cook at medium heat for about 10 minutes.
Step 3: Peel and cook the potatoes until they are tender. Once cooked, mash them until you get a smooth texture.
Step 4: Mix the meat with mashed potatoes and season to taste.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into a pie mold and sprinkle with crushed bread.
Step 6: Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until the bread is golden brown.

title: Chicken Souvlaki
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and mix with minced garlic, chopped onion, olive oil, and salt.
Wrap the chicken pieces on skewers and grill them in a pan or skillet until golden brown.
Cut the tomatoes and peppers into pieces and add them to the pan with the chicken. Cook for a few minutes until they are tender.
Serve the chicken souvlaki hot accompanied by salad or rice.

title: Doner Kebab homemade beef
steps: Cut the beef into small pieces and mix with other ingredients.
Let marinating for at least 2 hours.
Cook the mixture in a pan until it's well done.
Serve hot with pita bread and your favorite accompaniments.

title: Lamb Kebabs (Brochetas)
steps: Step 1: Mix the lamb minced with the onion minced, garlic mashed and parsley fresh.
Step 2: Add eggs and bread crumbs to the previous mixture. Mix well all ingredients.
Step 3: Make balls with the mixture and pierce each one in a skewer to make the kebabs.
Step 4: Cook the lamb kebabs on a grill or pan at medium heat until they are fully cooked.

title: Lamb Tagine with Prunes
steps: Heat oil in a pot and brown the lamb until it's well done.
Add chopped onion and mashed garlic, cook until they're soft.
Add sweet paprika and harissa, stir well.
Incorporate prunes and beef broth. Bring to a boil and let cook for 30 minutes.
Season with salt and serve.

title: Couscous real (Chicken, Lamb, and Merguez)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and lamb until they are cooked.
Step 2: Add the merguez and cook until it is well done.

title: Pho Bo (Vietnamese Beef Noodle Soup)
steps: Cook the beef until it is tender.
Add the onion, ginger, and garlic to the meat broth.
Add the rice noodles and cook until they are soft.
Serve the soup in a large bowl with chopped pork bones as garnish.

title: Banh Mi (Vietnamese Pork Sandwich)
steps: Cook the pork until it's well done and let it cool.
Cut the Vietnamese bread in half and toast the slices lightly.
Spread mayonnaise on both halves of the bread.
Place the cooked pork on one half of the bread.
Add red pepper flakes and garlic chopped over the pork.
Add lettuce leaves and tomato slices to the sandwich.
Cover with the other half of the bread and cut into individual portions.

title: Pad See Ew (Rice with Soy Sauce)
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until golden.
Add soy sauce and cook for a few minutes.
Stir in cooked rice and cut broccoli into small pieces.
Mix well and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Thai Green Curry Chicken
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is golden.
Step 2: Add Thai green curry paste and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 3: Add coconut milk and let it simmer over low heat for a few minutes.

title: Beef Rendang (Indonesian Stew)
steps: Cook the beef with paprika and ginger until browned.
Add coconuts and cilantro, cook low heat until the meat is tender.

title: Kung Pao Chicken (with Peanuts)
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken into small pieces.
Step 2: Fry the peanuts until they are golden and remove them.

title: Mapo Tofu (Tofu Spicy with Meat)
steps: 1. Cut the tofu into cubes and fry until golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
2. In a pan, heat oil and add pork meat chopped. Cook until well done.
3. Add garlic and ginger to the pan with the meat. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Add fried tofu cubes, smoked paprika, and soy sauce to the pan. Mix all ingredients well.
5. Serve hot and accompany with rice or noodles.

title: Roasted Duck Cantonese
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix soy sauce, ginger and garlic in a bowl. Add duck and marinate for 30 minutes.
Step 3: Place duck on a baking dish and add vinegar over it.
Step 4: Bake for 1 hour or until duck is well cooked. Remove from oven and let rest before serving.

title: Tonkatsu (Breaded Pork Cutlet Japanese-style)
steps: Cut the pork into thin strips.
Bread the pork strips with flour, eggs, and breadcrumbs.
Fry the breaded pork strips in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and serve with Worcestershire sauce and salad.

title: Katsudon (Tonkatsu with egg over rice)
steps: Cook the rice.
Season the pork and coat it with breadcrumbs.
Fry the pork until golden brown on both sides.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and add a little tonkatsu sauce.
Place the cooked rice in a plate, put the fried pork on top and pour the beaten eggs over the meat.

title: Yaki Udon (Thick Noodles Stir-Fried)
steps: Cook the thick noodles udon according to package instructions.
In a large wok or frying pan, heat the oil at medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is transparent.
Add the sweet paprika pieces and cook for a few minutes more.
Incorporate the soya sauce and stir well. Add the cooked thick noodles udon and mix everything.
Cook for a few minutes more, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.

title: Shoyu Ramen (Soy Sauce Noodle Soup)
steps: Cook the pasta ramen according to package instructions.
In a pot, heat the chicken broth over medium heat until it boils.
Add soy sauce to the broth and stir well.
In a pan, cook the pork until browned. Remove from heat and cut into small pieces.
In a large bowl, place cooked pasta and add hot broth with soy sauce.
Add pork pieces to each bowl.
Decorate with cucumber slices and green onion chopped.

title: Croque Monsieur
steps: Butter two slices of bread loaf with melted butter.
Place a generous layer of cooked ham on one of the slices.
Cover the ham with an abundant amount of Gruyère cheese rind.
Place the other slice of bread over the cheese and put it in a preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius until the cheese is melted and golden brown.

title: Cuban Sandwich (Pork, ham, Swiss cheese)
steps: Cook the pork until it is well-cooked and golden.
Take two slices of Cuban bread or French bread, and spread them with butter on both sides.
Place a layer of pork on one slice of bread.
Add a layer of ham on top of the pork.
Add a generous layer of Swiss cheese on top of the ham.
Cover the sandwich with the other slice of bread.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Place the sandwich in the skillet and cook until both sides are golden brown and crispy. Repeat for the other side of the sandwich.

title: Philly Cheesesteak (Beef and Cheese Sandwich)
steps: Cut the beef into thin strips and cook until it's done. Remove from heat.
In the same pan, sauté the onion and green peppers until they're soft.
Add the beef back to the pan with the onion and green peppers.
Cover the mixture with slices of provolone cheese.
Place the bread in a skillet for lightly toasting both sides.
Fill each half of the bread with the meat, onion, and pepper mixture. Serve hot.

title: Lobster Roll
steps: Cook the lobster and cut it into pieces.
Toast the hamburger bread lightly.
Fill the bread with the lobster pieces.
Serve Immediately

title: Seafood and Sausage Gumbo
steps: Step 1: Saute the onion, bell pepper, and garlic until they are soft.
Step 2: Add the sausage, diced, and cook until it is golden brown.
Step 3: Add the flour and stir well.
Step 4: Add water or chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 5: Add the seafood and cook until it is done.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Tacos of Carnitas (Confit Pork)
steps: Cook the pork in oil until it is golden.
Add onions and tomatoes, cook for 10 minutes more.
Add cilantro and serve with corn tortillas.

title: Chicken Mole with Turkey
steps: Step 1: Toast the anchovy and pasilla peppers until crispy.
Step 2: Process the toasted peppers with almonds, pumpkin seeds, garlic, and onion to make a paste. Add water if necessary.

title: Swiss-style Enchiladas (Green Sauce and Cream)
steps: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Warm the corn tortillas in a pan.
Place a bit of chicken inside each tortilla and roll them up.
In a pot, mix the green sauce with the cooking cream.
Place the Swiss-style enchiladas on a plate and cover with the prepared sauce.

title: Pupusas of Cheese (El Salvador)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the cornmeal dough according to package instructions.
Step 2: Fill the dough with cheese and form a ball.
Step 3: Flatten the ball to form a pupusa.
Step 4: Cook the pupusa in a hot skillet until golden brown on both sides.

title: Corn Pudding (Maize and Meat)
steps: Step 1: Mix ground maize with water and salt.
Step 2: Fry minced meat with onion and garlic until golden brown.

title: Lamb Shanks (with Egg and Onion)
steps: Cut the lamb shanks into thin strips.
Season and pepper the strips.
In a hot pan, add a little oil and cook the strips on both sides until they are cooked through.
Remove the strips from the pan and reserve them on a plate.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add eggs to the pan with the onion and cook until they are done to your liking.
Serve the lamb shanks with eggs and onion.

title: Shrimp Moqueca (Brazilian Stew)
steps: Step 1: In a large pot, heat the oil and sauté the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Step 2: Add the chopped red peppers and cook until they are tender.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Step 4: Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink.
Step 5: Add the white vinegar and cook for another two minutes.
Step 6: Add the large tomatoes and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 7: Add the grated coconut and cook until the moqueca is thick and well combined.

title: Chili without meat (Vegetarian)
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot and add the red peppers, onion, and garlic chopped.
Step 2: Add tomato chopped and cook until it's smooth.
Step 3: Add red beans and sweet corn. Cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add zucchini chopped and cook until it's tender.
Step 5: Add green peppers chopped and salt to taste.

title: Dolmadakia (Stuffed Grape Leaves)
steps: Step 1: Cook the grape leaves until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix cooked rice with chopped onion, garlic, and parsley.
Step 3: Stuff each grape leaf with the rice mixture.
Step 4: Fold the grape leaves stuffed with rice to form a sealed package.
Step 5: Heat oil in a pan and fry the grape leaves stuffed with rice until they are golden brown.

title: Spanakopita (Spinach and Feta Pie)
steps: Step 1: Mix spinach and feta in a bowl.
Step 2: Roll out the pastry dough and place the filling.
Step 3: Fold the dough to form the pastries.

title: Cheese Börek (Turkish Pastry)
steps: Spread the phyllo dough on a baking sheet.
Grate the feta cheese and spread it over the dough.
Brush the dough with melted butter.
Fold the dough in half and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Kibbeh (Meatballs with Bulgur)
steps: Step 1: Soak the bulgur in water for half an hour.
Step 2: Drain the bulgur well and mix with ground meat, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Step 3: Knead everything until a homogeneous mixture is formed.
Step 4: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil.

title: Vietnamese Fresh Rolls (Goi Cuon)
steps: Cook the vermicelli according to package instructions.
Wash and chop the fresh mint.
Peel and chop the garlic.
Fill each rice pastry leaf with a portion of vermicelli, fresh mint, and garlic.
Roll up each leaf carefully to form the rolls.
Serve with fish sauce.

title: Siu Mai (Dim Sum Pork)
steps: Step 1: Mix the chopped pork with puerro, ginger, and green onion.
Step 2: Add wheat flour and mix well.
Step 3: Make balls with the mixture and cook in steam.

title: Ha Gao (Steamed Shrimp Dumplings)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the Ha Gao dough according to package instructions.
Step 2: Mix chopped shrimp with green onion, seasoned to taste.
Step 3: Fill the dough with the shrimp mixture and close the dumplings.
Step 4: Steam the dumplings for 10 minutes.

title: Meat Bao (Steamed Bread)
steps: Mix the ground meat with salt and pepper.
Dissolve the flour in water and form a dough.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cover each baozi with the flour and water dough.
Steam for 20 minutes.

title: Takoyaki (Octopus Balls)
steps: Step 1: Cut the octopus into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix flour with water and beat until a smooth batter is obtained.

title: Okonomiyaki (Japanese Pancake)
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with water until a thick batter is obtained.
Step 2: Add sweet smoked paprika, chopped onion, and angel hair to the batter.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large pan and add the previous mixture.
Step 4: Cook until both sides are golden brown and crispy.
Step 5: Serve hot with your favorite sauce.

title: Yakitori (Chicken Skewers)
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces.
Mix the soy sauce with a little water and brush the chicken pieces.
Pass the chicken pieces through the skewer and cook until golden brown.

title: Tempura of Shrimp and Vegetables
steps: Prepare the tempura batter with flour and water.
Submerge the shrimp and vegetables in the batter.
Fry the ingredients submerged in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Edamame Spicy (with Garlic and Chili)
steps: Step 1: Soak the edamame for at least 2 hours.
Step 2: Peel and finely chop the garlic and chili.
Step 3: Cook the edamame in boiling water for 5 minutes.
Step 4: Drain the edamame and mix with chopped garlic and chili.
Step 5: Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Nachos with chili con carne
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork with the chiles until they are tender.
Step 2: Add the sauce and let it reduce.
Step 3: Serve over the nachos.

title: Coxinhas (Brazilian Chicken Croquettes)
steps: Cook the chicken until it is well done. Drain the cooking water.
Mix the cooked chicken with cornmeal batter and minced garlic in a food processor.
Add oil and salt to taste. Mix everything until you get a homogeneous dough.
Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.

title: Argentine Beef Empanadas
steps: Cook the ground beef with onion and garlic until browned.
Add cooked potatoes and flatten them inside the mixture.
Add salt to taste.
Fill empanada dough with the meat mixture and form the empanadas.
Brush the edges of the empanadas with beaten egg and bake at medium temperature until browned.

title: Fried Arepas with Nata
steps: Step 1: Prepare the arepa dough according to package instructions.
Step 2: Fry the arepas in a hot skillet with oil until they are golden and crispy.
Step 3: Serve the fried arepas hot with nata on top.

title: Anticuchos (Brochette of Beef Heart)
steps: Cut the beef heart into large pieces and place them in a marinade made with vinegar, yellow pepper, onion, and garlic.
Leave marinating for at least 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the beef heart pieces onto skewers and cook over an open flame or in a hot pan until well cooked.
Serve with a tomato and onion salad.

title: Ceviche of Octopus
steps: Clean and cut the octopus into small pieces.
Soak the octopus pieces in lemon juice for 30 minutes.
Add chopped onion, red bell pepper, and cilantro to the marinated octopus.
Add salt to taste and mix all ingredients.

title: Tuna Cakes (Mexican Style)
steps: Sauté the onion and tomato until they are soft.
Add canned tuna, cilantro, lemon juice, and salt to the pan. Mix everything.
Fry corn tortillas in a hot pan until they are golden brown.
Place a generous spoonful of tuna mixture on each tortilla.
Garnish with more chopped cilantro and serve.

title: Chocolate Éclairs
steps: Prepare the choux pastry according to package instructions.
Fill the éclairs with cream puff filling.
Melt the black chocolate and dip the éclairs in it.
Chill and serve.

title: Profiteroles with Truffle
steps: Melt the butter in a pot.
Add water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Add flour and mix until forming a dough.
Let the dough cool before adding eggs, one at a time.
Make balls with the mixture and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes.
Melt black chocolate and fill each profiterole with it.

title: Macarons Varieties
steps: Mix the almond flour with the glazed sugar.
Add the egg whites and mix until forming a paste.
Make small balls with the mixture and bake at 150°C for 20 minutes.

title: Madeleines of Lemon
steps: Preheat the madeleine mold in the oven to 180 degrees.
Mix the melted butter with sugar until a light batter is obtained.
Add eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour and mix carefully.
Add lemon juice and zest and mix everything until it's well combined.
Pour the dough into the preheated mold and bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Crepes with Nutella and Banana
steps: Mix the flour, eggs, and milk to make the crepe batter.
Add melted butter to the mixture.
Cook each crepe in a hot pan until both sides are golden brown.
Spread Nutella on each crepe and add banana slices.
Roll up the crepes and serve with more Nutella and bananas if desired.

title: Chocolate Soufflé
steps: Melt the black chocolate in a bain-marie.
Mix the unsalted butter with sugar until a light, airy mixture is obtained.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate rice flour and mix until well combined.
Pour the chocolate mixture into a soufflé mold greased with unsalted butter.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20-25 minutes or until firm in the center.

title: Black Forest Tart
steps: Mix the sugar, butter, and eggs until a homogeneous mixture is obtained.
Add flour and cocoa powder to the previous mixture.
Incorporate cream and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a greased tart mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Linzer Torte (Almond Cake with Strawberry Jam Tart)
steps: Grind the almonds until a fine powder is obtained.
Mix the flour, sugar, and butter to form a dough.
Add eggs to the previous mixture and mix well.
Add almond powder to the dough and knead until it is well incorporated.
Stretch the dough in a tart mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Once baked, let the cake cool down and then spread with strawberry jam.

title: Sticky Toffee Pudding
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the butter with the sugar until a light batter is formed.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour and baking powder into the previous mixture.
Add vanilla extract and mix everything together until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a pudding mold and bake for 20-25 minutes or until firm.
Meanwhile, prepare the caramel with brown sugar syrup and water.
Once the pudding is cooked, remove it from the oven and pour the hot caramel over it.
Let it cool before serving.

title: Victoria Sponge Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Beat the butter and sugar until a light and airy mixture is obtained.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Incorporate flour and chemical yeast, along with vanilla essence.
Pour the batter into a greased cake pan.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and a skewer inserted comes out clean.

title: Banoffee Pie
steps: Prepare the pastry dough according to package instructions.
Cover a tart mold with prepared pastry and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool.
Mix sweetened condensed milk with mashed bananas in a bowl.
Pour the sweetened condensed milk and banana mixture over the cooled pastry dough and spread evenly.
Top whipped cream and cover the banana and sweetened condensed milk mixture with whipped cream. Decorate with chocolate shavings if desired.

title: Scones with cream and jam
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Mix the flour, butter, milk, sugar, eggs, and baking powder until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface and cut it into scone shapes.
Place the scones on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Once baked, let the scones cool on a wire rack.
Spread with spreadable cream and add jam to taste before serving.

title: Suspiro a la limeña
steps: Mix eggs with sugar until well combined.
Add corn flour and cinnamon powder to the previous mixture.
Add milk slowly while continuing to stir.
Stir the mixture in a pot over medium heat until it thickens.
Remove from heat and add ground cloves.
Let cool before serving.

title: Alfajores of Chocolate
steps: Step 1: Mix the butter with sugar until a light batter is obtained.
Step 2: Add flour gradually while continuing to mix.
Step 3: Add chocolate and mix well until a uniform dough is formed.
Step 4: Make balls with the dough and bake at medium heat for about 15 minutes.

title: Brigadeiros (Brazilian Truffles)
steps: Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add sweetened condensed milk and mix until well combined.
Cook the mixture for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and let cool.
Once cooled, shape into balls with hands greased with butter.
Roll the balls through confectioner's sugar or cocoa powder.
Let them set in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Orzo and Feta Salad
steps: Cook the orzo according to package instructions.
Mix in a bowl the cooked orzo, cherry tomatoes halved, black olives and green leaves.
Add crumbled feta to the bowl.
Dress with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.

title: Lentil and Salmon Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the lentils until they are tender.
Step 2: Cut the salmon into small pieces.

title: Couscous Salad with Grapes
steps: Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
Peel and chop the onion into small pieces.
Wash and chop the red peppers into thin strips.
In a bowl, mix the cooked couscous with the onion, red peppers, and grape juice.
Add olive oil to taste and mix all ingredients.

title: Spinach and Mushroom Salad
steps: Wash and drain the spinach.
Clean the mushrooms and slice them into thin strips.
Mix spinach and mushrooms in a bowl.
Season with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and salt to taste.
Serve immediately.

title: Pear and Gorgonzola Salad
steps: Cut the lettuce into small pieces.
Peel and cut the pear into thin slices.
Crush the gorgonzola.
Toast the nuts in a pan until they are golden brown.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Apple Cider Slaw
steps: Cut the apples and cabbage into small pieces.
Mix the yogurt with apple cider, garlic, and parsley.
Mix all ingredients.

title: Potato Salad with Dill (Scandi)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Let the potatoes cool down and then cut them into large pieces.
Mix the fresh dill chopped with mayonnaise and mustard to make a sauce.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked potatoes with the dill sauce.
Add finely chopped onion and parsley to the bowl and mix everything.

title: Wild Rice Salad
steps: Cook the wild rice according to package instructions.
Chop the red peppers, carrots, and onion into small pieces.
Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and balsamic vinegar to taste.

title: Quinoa Red Salad with Vegetables
steps: Cook the quinoa red according to package instructions.
Cut the carrots, celery, and red bell pepper into small pieces.
Wash and drain the spinach.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Add your favorite salad dressing.

title: Blue Tomato Salad with Onion
steps: Step 1: Cut the blue tomato and onion into pieces.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Rice with Coconut
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Add shredded coconut during the cooking of the rice.

title: Charro Beans (with Bacon/Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Heat the bacon in a pan until crispy.
Step 2: Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pan with the bacon and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the chilies and tomato to the pan and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 4: Add the beans and cook everything together for a few minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Mature Figs (Sweet Fried Plantains)
steps: Peel the mature figs and cut them into slices.
Heat the oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the plantain slices to the pan and fry until they are golden brown on both sides.
Remove the figs from the pan and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Potato Puree with Malva Fruits
steps: Peel and cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Mash the cooked potatoes to obtain a smooth puree.
Add the malva fruits and mix well until they are completely incorporated.
Serve hot as a side dish.

title: White Asparagus with Mayonnaise
steps: Cook the white asparagus until tender.
Serve the white asparagus with mayonnaise.

title: Spinach in Catalan Style (Pine Nuts and Raisins)
steps: Step 1: Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add minced garlic and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add spinach and cook until tender.
Step 4: Incorporate pine nuts and raisins, stir well and cook for a few minutes more.
Step 5: Serve hot as a side dish.

title: Gratin Dauphinois (Potatoes gratin)
steps: Peel and slice the potatoes into thin slices.
Melt the butter in a pan and sauté the garlic until it's golden.
Add the potatoes to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour the cream into a baking dish and place the potatoes in layers, sprinkling each layer with the butter and garlic mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for 45 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.

title: Vegetable Tian
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Slice the eggplant and zucchini into thin slices.
Peel and finely chop the onion and garlic.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add sliced red peppers and cook for a few minutes.
Incorporate diced tomatoes with the other vegetables.
Alternate layers of eggplant, zucchini, vegetable mixture, and tomato in a baking dish.
Drizzle each layer with olive oil and season to taste.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.

title: Mexican Rice (Red)
steps: Cook the rice until it is smooth.
In a pan, heat oil and add chopped onion and garlic. Cook until they are golden brown.
Add diced tomatoes and chopped chiles to the pan. Cook for a few minutes.
Add water and let it boil. Then, add cooked rice and stir well.
Cook on medium-low heat until the rice is well hydrated and the mixture has a thick consistency.

title: Corn on the Cob with Butter
steps: Cook corn until it is tender.
Add butter and mix well.

title: Tom Yum Goong (Spicy Thai Soup)
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the red chilies, ginger, and garlic to the pot and cook for a few minutes until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the bamboo shoots and coconut milk to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the chicken to the pot and cook until it is fully cooked.
Step 5: Add fresh lime juice and chopped cilantro to the soup and serve hot.

title: Menudo (Callos in Mexican Style)
steps: Cook the beef bones in water with salt until they are tender.
In a pot, sauté the onion and garlic until they are golden.
Add the anchovy peppers clean and without seeds to the pot and cook for a few minutes more.
Add the tomatoes and green tomato to the pot and cook until they are tender.
Incorporate the cooked beef bones into the broth along with the cilantro and epazote.
Cook for a few minutes more until everything is well incorporated.
Serve hot.

title: Miso Soup with Clams
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the clams and cook until they open.
Step 3: Remove the clams from the pot and reserve them.

title: Cold Melon Soup with Mint
steps: Step 1: Cut the melon into pieces and put them in a blender.
Step 2: Add fresh mint to the blender and blend until smooth.
Step 3: Strain the soup to remove the melon fibers.

title: Potato and Coconut Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
Step 2: Blend the cooked potatoes with the coconut in a food processor until a smooth cream is obtained.

title: Pisco Sour
steps: Mix pisco, gum syrup and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Beat well for a few seconds until a foamy mixture forms.
Serve in a highball glass and garnish with a lemon slice.

title: Argentine Mate
steps: Put the yerba mate in the gourd or squash.
Heat water until it boils but does not reach boiling point.
Pour the hot water over the yerba mate.
Move the bombilla to release flavors.
Drink the mate with a straw.

title: Chai Masala Tea
steps: In a pot, heat the milk until it starts to bubble.
Add black tea and spices (ground cinnamon, ground ginger, and ground cloves).
Let it boil for a few minutes to allow flavors to blend.
Add sugar to taste and stir until it dissolves completely.
Serve hot and enjoy your chai masala tea.

title: Hollandaise Sauce
steps: Combine yogurt and mayonnaise until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Add mustard to taste.

title: Bolognese Sauce Classic (single)
steps: Cook the ground meat until it is browned.
Add the chopped onion and garlic, cook until they are soft.
Incorporate the red peppers chopped and cook for a few minutes more.
Add the crushed tomatoes and let cook at medium-low heat for about 2 hours.
Season to taste and serve.
